  description = NUTECH FACTORY LICENSE RENEWAL

•	LOGIN USING THE LINK HTTPS://DISH.TN.GOV.IN/ 
•	CLICK INDUSTRY LOGIN
•	CLICK FACTORY LOGIN
•	ENTER USER ID : ANANDHI@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM WITH PASSWORD, WITH CAPTCHA AND CLICK LOGIN. THIS USER ID WILL BE USED FOR NAPL ALSO. PL SELECT NUTECH IN DROP DOWN
•	IN UNDER “SERVICES OFFERED UNDER FACTORIES ACT”, CLICK “RENEWAL OF FACTORY LICENSE”
•	UPDATE PARTICULARS OF THE FACTORY, PARTICULARS OF THE OCCUPIER (DETAILS OF MD), PARTICULARS OF THE MANAGERS (DETAILS OF MD), PARTICULARS OF THE OWNER (DETAILS OF MD)
•	THEN CLICK “LICENSE RENEWAL”. IN THIS
O	NUMBER OF PRESSURE VESSELS – CURRENTLY AVAILABLE TO BE ENTERED
O	MAXIMUM NUMBER OF WORKERS PROPOSED TO BE EMPLOYED – CURRENTLY AVAILABLE TO BE ENTERED
O	RENEWAL YEAR – UPCOMING YEAR TO BE SELECTED
•	THEN CLICK “PROCEED PAYMENT”
•	AMOUNT WILL SHOW AS DEFAULT (INR 14400.00)
•	SELECT ANY ONE OF THE PAYMENT MODE (NETBANKING, CREDIT CARD, DEBIT CARD, UPI)
•	MAKE PAYMENT TRANSACTION
•	GET THE PAYMENT RECEIPT ON SCREEN
•	TAKE THE SCREENSHOT OF THE PAYMENT RECEIPT
•	ON “PARTICULARS OF THE CONTRIBUTION TO TAMINADU LABOUR WELFARE FUND”, FILL THE DETAILS OF AMOUNT REMITTED, DATE, MODE OF PAYMENT, REFERENCE NUMBER – BASED ON PAYMENT RECEIPT SCREENSHOT
•	CLICK “UPDATE FACTORY REGISTRATION AND LICENSE DETAILS” & GET “SUCCESSFULLY”
•	CLICK “SUBMIT LICENSE RENEWAL”
•	IN SUBMIT TO, SELECT “ JOINT DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL SAFETY AND HEALTH, KANCHEEPURAM” THEN CLICK “SUBMIT”. ENSURE CERTIFICATE IS GENERATED. UNTIL THAT DON’T LOG OUT THE SCREEN
•	CLICK “CERTIFICATE” BUTTON AND DOWNLOAD THE CERTIFICATE.
•	UPLOAD THE CERTIFICATE IN ERP. TAKE THE PRINT OUT AND POST ON THE COMPANY NOTICE BOARD

FORMS 1, 3, AND 5 ARE RELATED TO HOLIDAYS AND ARE USED IN THE CONTEXT OF THE TAMIL NADU INDUSTRIAL ESTABLISHMENTS (NATIONAL AND FESTIVAL HOLIDAYS) ACT, 1958: 
•	FORM 1: AN EMPLOYEE DECLARATION FORM SUBMITTED BY THE EMPLOYER 
•	FORM 3: AN APPROVED FORM THAT LISTS THE FESTIVAL HOLIDAYS 
•	FORM 5: A NOTICE THAT LISTS THE HOLIDAYS FOR THE YEAR 
•	
THE TAMIL NADU INDUSTRIAL ESTABLISHMENTS (NATIONAL AND FESTIVAL HOLIDAYS) ACT, 1958 PROVIDES FOR THE GRANT OF HOLIDAYS TO EMPLOYEES IN INDUSTRIAL ESTABLISHMENTS IN TAMIL NADU. THE ACT STATES THAT EVERY WORKER IS ENTITLED TO FOUR NATIONAL HOLIDAYS AND FIVE FESTIVAL HOLIDAYS IN A YEAR. IF AN EMPLOYEE IS REQUIRED TO WORK ON A HOLIDAY, THEY ARE ENTITLED TO DOUBLE THEIR WAGES OR A SUBSTITUTED HOLIDAY.

CHECK
HAVE YOU ENSURED THAT CURRENT STOCKS MATCH THE REQUIRED LEVELS IN THE LIST? 
HAVE YOU VERIFIED THAT PRS WERE RAISED FOR ALL LOW-STOCK OR CRITICAL ITEMS? 
HAVE YOU REVIEWED STOCK DISCREPANCY REPORTS AND TAKEN CORRECTIVE ACTION? 

ACT
HAVE YOU SENT THE UPDATED WEEKLY REPORT TO MANAGEMENT THROUGH MAIL (AS PER REFERENCE FORMAT/IMAGE)?
HAVE YOU RECORDED LEARNINGS OR ISSUES FACED DURING THE WEEK FOR PROCESS IMPROVEMENT?

ENGLISH:

PURPOSE: TO ENSURE PROPER APPROVAL & DOCUMENTATION OF OVERTIME/COMP OFF ENTRIES.

PLAN

EMPLOYEES MUST SUBMIT OVERTIME/COMP OFF ENTRIES ON THE SAME DAY VIA ERP.
SUBORDINATES SHOULD SEND EMAIL REQUESTS FOR EACH ENTRY.
APPROVERS MUST CHECK SCHEDULES & ELIGIBILITY BEFORE APPROVING.

DO

GO TO PAYROLL → OVERTIME/COMP OFF SCREEN.
ENTER YOUR NAME IN ‘ADMIN LIKE’ TO REVIEW ENTRIES.
APPROVE ONLY AFTER VERIFYING THE EMAIL REQUEST AND ACTUAL WORK DONE.

CHECK

NO EMAIL? DON’T APPROVE.
WARN SUBORDINATES FOR NON-COMPLIANCE.
KEEP RECORDS FOR AUDIT.
VALIDATE ALL APPROVALS WITH EMAIL PROOF.

ACT

APPROVING WITHOUT EMAIL LEADS TO DISCIPLINARY ACTION.
SHARE SOP WITH TEAM.
ACT ON REPEAT OFFENDERS WITH CORRECTIVE STEPS.

3. CHECK:

4. ACT:

ENSURE ALL CHANGES ARE UPDATED IN ERP & COMMUNICATED TO STAKEHOLDERS.

ACT:

IF PLAN IS FEASIBLE, FREEZE & PROCEED.

செக் (CHECK):

DELAY OR FAILURE REASON கண்டு பிடிங்க.

ஆக்ட் (ACT):

LOW STOCK/CRITICAL ITEMS-க்கு PR RAISE பண்ணிருக்கா VERIFY பண்ணிருக்கியா?
STOCK MISMATCH OR ISSUE-ஐ ANALYZE பண்ணி CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுத்திருக்கியா?

ACT (செயல்படு)  
WEEKLY REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL-ல அனுப்பிருக்கியா? (REFERENCE FORMAT/IMAGE-க்கு ஏற்ப)
WEEKLY-யில் எதிர்பட்ட ISSUE OR LEARNING-ஐ NOTE பண்ணிருக்கியா?

  description = SUPER MARKET ITEMS LIST REVIEW AND UPDATION

PLAN
 HAVE YOU IDENTIFIED THE LIST OF SUPER MARKET PARTS THAT REQUIRE REGULAR STOCK MAINTENANCE?
 HAVE YOU COLLECTED STOCK DATA AND CONSUMPTION TRENDS FROM THE PAST QUARTER?
 HAVE YOU SCHEDULED A REVIEW MEETING WITH THE MANAGEMENT/TEAM FOR PARTS LIST DISCUSSION?

DO
 HAVE YOU REVIEWED THE SUPER MARKET PARTS LIST WITH THE MANAGEMENT AS PER THE SCHEDULE?
 HAVE YOU GATHERED INPUTS/SUGGESTIONS FROM MANAGEMENT?
 HAVE YOU PROPOSED CHANGES OR UPDATES REQUIRED IN THE PARTS LIST (ADDITIONS/REMOVALS/REORDER LEVELS)?

CHECK
 HAVE YOU VERIFIED WHETHER ALL FEEDBACK HAS BEEN INCORPORATED INTO THE UPDATED LIST?
 HAVE YOU CROSS-CHECKED THE UPDATED LIST WITH ACTUAL STOCK AND USAGE DATA FOR ACCURACY?
 HAVE YOU VALIDATED THAT NO CRITICAL PART IS MISSED IN THE UPDATED LIST?

ACT
 HAVE YOU FINALIZED AND SAVED THE REVISED SUPER MARKET PARTS LIST IN THE DESIGNATED SYSTEM OR REGISTER?
 HAVE YOU FORMALLY COMMUNICATED THE UPDATED LIST AND CHANGES TO THE MANAGEMENT AND RELEVANT DEPARTMENTS?
 HAVE YOU SET A REMINDER/CALENDAR INVITE FOR THE NEXT QUARTERLY REVIEW?

IN TANGLISH:
PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
SUPER MARKET PARTS-KU STOCK MAINTAIN பண்ண வேண்டிய LIST எடுத்தச்சா?
PREVIOUS QUARTER USAGE & CONSUMPTION DATA COLLECT பண்ணியாச்சா?
MANAGEMENT-ஓட REVIEW MEETING-KU SCHEDULE பண்ணினியா?

DO (செய்)
SUPER MARKET PARTS LIST-ஐ MANAGEMENT கூட REVIEW பண்ணியாச்சா?
MANAGEMENT SUGGESTIONS & FEEDBACK COLLECT பண்ணியாச்சா?
REQUIRED CHANGES (ADD/REMOVE/UPDATE REORDER LEVEL) PROPOSE பண்ணியாச்சா?

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
MANAGEMENT FEEDBACK UPDATED LIST-ல INCLUDE பண்ணியாச்சா?
UPDATED LIST-ஐ ACTUAL STOCK & USAGE DATA-ஓட VERIFY பண்ணியாச்சா?
IMPORTANT PARTS MISS ஆகலானு DOUBLE-CHECK பண்ணியாச்சா?

ACT (நடத்து)
FINALIZED PARTS LIST-ஐ SYSTEM/REGISTER-ல UPDATE பண்ணியாச்சா?
UPDATED LIST & CHANGES-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கும் CONCERNED DEPARTMENTS-க்கும் COMMUNICATE பண்ணியாச்சா?
NEXT QUARTERLY REVIEW-க்காக REMINDER/CALENDAR SET பண்ணியாச்சா?

Row:
  id = 8807
  seq_no = 871
  checking_point = NMI (NON MOVING ITEM) MANAGEMENT - NON BILLING ITEMS
  description = NMI (NON MOVING ITEM) MANAGEMENT - NON BILLING ITEMS

P – PLAN:
LOGIN ERP → MIS → PURCHASE → NON MOVING ITEM
CHANGE LIMIT: 1000 → 10000
SELECT GROUP TYPE: PURCHASE, LOAD → DOWNLOAD EXCEL
SELECT GROUP TYPE: MANUFACTURING, LOAD → DOWNLOAD EXCEL
MERGE BOTH EXCEL FILES → REMOVE “BILLING” ITEMS
SORT BY “AMOUNT” (HIGH → LOW)

D – DO:
REMOVE ITEMS WITH "LAST TRANSACTION" < 90 DAYS
REMOVE ITEM CODES LIKE NT/F1, NT/F2...NT/NA, NP/ ETC. (ASSETS, TOOLS, FIXTURES, ADMIN ITEMS)
CALCULATE TOTAL AMOUNT
HIGHLIGHT TOP 80% ITEMS
FRAME ACTIONS:

CONVERT TO FG

KEEP AS STOCK (NEED MANAGEMENT APPROVAL)

SCRAP/STOCK REDUCE (WITH APPROVAL)

ERP VS PHYSICAL MISMATCH – ADJUST (APPROVAL REQUIRED)

C – CHECK:
VERIFY ACTION ITEMS WITH MANAGEMENT
CROSS-CHECK ERP STOCK & ACTUAL PHYSICAL STOCK

A – ACT:
IMPLEMENT APPROVED ACTIONS
UPDATE ERP NMI STOCK STATUS
MONITOR MONTHLY TO REDUCE NMIS

TANGLISH VERSION (MIX OF TAMIL + ENGLISH)
P – PLAN:
ERPல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க → MIS → PURCHASE → NON MOVING ITEM
LIMIT 1000ல இருந்து 10000க்கு மாறுங்க
GROUP TYPE: PURCHASE செலெக்ட் பண்ணி LOAD → EXCELல DOWNLOAD பண்ணுங்க
அதே மாதிரி MANUFACTURING GROUP TYPEயும் DOWNLOAD பண்ணுங்க
இரண்டு EXCELஐ MERGE பண்ணி “BILLING” ITEMS REMOVE பண்ணுங்க
“AMOUNT” COLUMNல SORT பண்ணுங்க (HIGH TO LOW)

D – DO:
90 DAYSக்குள்ள TRANSACTION உள்ள ITEMS REMOVE பண்ணுங்க
NT/F1, NT/F2, NT/F3... NT/NA, NP/ போன்ற ITEMS (ASSETS/TOOLS/ADMIN USE) REMOVE பண்ணுங்க
TOTAL AMOUNT CALCULATE பண்ணி, TOP 80% ITEMS HIGHLIGHT பண்ணுங்க
ACTIONS பண்ணனும்:

FG-A CONVERT பண்ணலாமா?

STOCK-A MAINTAIN பண்ணலாமா? (APPROVAL தேவை)

SCRAP OR REDUCE பண்ணலாமா? (APPROVAL தேவை)

ERP VS PHYSICAL MISMATCH FIX பண்ணலாமா? (APPROVAL தேவை)

C – CHECK:
MANAGEMENTக்கு ACTIONS EXPLAIN பண்ணி APPROVAL எடுக்கணும்
ERP STOCK & PHYSICAL STOCK CHECK பண்ணணும்

A – ACT:
APPROVED ACTIONS IMPLEMENT பண்ணுங்க
ERPல NMI UPDATE பண்ணுங்க
MONTHLY MONITOR பண்ணி NMI கம்மி பண்ணுங்க

WORK FROM HOME (WFH) REPORT - PLAN


ENGLISH

PLAN

REQUEST WFH APPROVAL BY EMAIL FROM VERTICAL HEAD WITH VALID REASON.
PREPARE LIST OF ACTIVITIES TO BE DONE DURING WFH.
SHARE ACTIVITY LIST VIA EMAIL 2 DAYS BEFORE.
GET APPROVAL 1 DAY BEFORE WFH DATE.

DO

WORK AS PER APPROVED ACTIVITY LIST.
ENSURE AVAILABILITY OVER PHONE/MAIL DURING WORK HOURS.
UPDATE VERTICAL HEAD WITH STATUS IF ASKED.

CHECK

END OF WFH DAY, SEND STATUS UPDATE TO VERTICAL HEAD.
MENTION TASKS COMPLETED, PENDING & REASONS IF ANY.

ACT

IF ANY TASKS PENDING, PLAN TIMELINE FOR COMPLETION.
DISCUSS ISSUES (IF ANY) WITH VERTICAL HEAD FOR FUTURE IMPROVEMENT.


TANGLISH:

PLAN

WORK FROM HOME (WFH) காக VALID REASON MENTION பண்ணி VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல APPROVAL கேக்கணும்.
WFH DAY ல பண்ண வேண்டிய ACTIVITIES LIST தயார் பண்ணணும்.
இந்த ACTIVITY LIST, WFH கு 2 DAYS முன்னாடி MAIL பண்ணி, 1 DAY முன்னாடி APPROVAL வாங்கணும்.

DO

APPROVED ACTIVITY LIST BASE பண்ணி வேலை பண்ணணும்.
WORK HOURS குள்ள PHONE / MAIL REACHABLE ஆ இருக்கணும்.
VERTICAL HEAD கேட்கும் போது STATUS UPDATE குடுக்கணும்.

CHECK

WFH முடிச்சதுக்கு அப்புறம் VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல STATUS UPDATE அனுப்பணும்.
COMPLETE ஆன TASK, PENDING TASK & REASON MENTION பண்ணணும்.

ACT

PENDING இருக்கற TASK கு COMPLETION TIME FIX பண்ணணும்.
FUTURE WFH IMPROVE பண்ண VERTICAL HEAD உடன் DISCUSS பண்ணணும்.

  id = 8809
  seq_no = 873
  checking_point = AUDIT NCR - PENDING FOR APPROVAL REVIEW
  description = AUDIT NCR - PENDING FOR APPROVAL REVIEW

ENGLISH:

PLAN

ENSURE ALL NCR/OFI ENTRIES ARE COMPLETED AND AVAILABLE IN ERP UNDER "AUDIT NCR APPROVAL" WITH STATUS "PENDING FOR APPROVAL".

DO

DOUBLE TAP THE ENTRY TO VIEW DETAILS.

CHECK:

NCR NO, DATE
AUDIT TYPE, AUDIT AREA
AUDIT CRITERIA & NCR COMMENT

VERIFY:

ROOT CAUSE IS VALID
CORRECTIVE ACTION IS PROPER
PREVENTIVE ACTION IS MENTIONED
NCR OBSERVATION IS VALID
CORRECTIVE ACTION EVIDENCE IS ATTACHED

CHECK

IF ALL FIELDS ARE VALID → CLICK "APPROVED".
IF ANYTHING IS INVALID → CLICK "REJECTED" AND MENTION THE REASON.

ACT

REJECTED NCR WILL GO BACK TO THE ORIGINATOR FOR CORRECTION. APPROVAL CYCLE CONTINUES UNTIL NCR IS VALID.

TANGLISH:

PLAN

NCR/OFI உம் முடிக்கப்பட்டு ERP-ல் "AUDIT NCR APPROVAL" என்ற பகுதியில் "PENDING FOR APPROVAL" என்று STATUS-ல் இருக்க வேண்டும்.

DO

ENTRY-யை DOUBLE TAP பண்ணி DETAILS பாக்கவும்.
கீழ்கண்டதை VERIFY பண்ணவும்:

NCR NO, DATE
AUDIT TYPE, AUDIT AREA
AUDIT CRITERIA & NCR COMMENT

கண்டிப்பாக பாக்க வேண்டியது:

ROOT CAUSE சரியாக இருக்கணும்
CORRECTIVE ACTION சரியாக இருக்கணும்
PREENTIVE ACTION MENTION பண்ணிருக்கணும்
NCR OBSERVATION VALID ஆக இருக்கணும்
EVIDENCE ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கணும்

CHECK

எல்லாமே சரியா இருந்தா → "APPROVED" BUTTON CLICK பண்ணுங்க.
எதாவது தவறு இருந்தா → "REJECTED" BUTTON CLICK பண்ணி, REASON FIELD-ல VALID REASON MENTION பண்ணுங்க.

ACT

REJECTED NCR மீண்டும் ORIGINATOR-க்கு திருப்பி அனுப்பப்படும். APPROVAL CYCLE VALID ஆகும் வரை தொடரும்.

  checking_point = HAVE YOU MADE REJECTION ANALYSIS AND SENT REPORT (INCOMING, INPROCESS, JOB ORDER)?
  description = HAVE YOU MADE REJECTION ANALYSIS AND SENT REPORT (INCOMING, INPROCESS, JOB ORDER)?

PLAN

DAILY REJECTION DATA TO BE MONITORED AND REPORTED TO MANAGEMENT.

DO

LOGIN TO OLD ERP → GO TO MIS → QUALITY → REJECTION ANALYSIS

SET:

DATE FROM – YESTERDAY
DATE TO – TODAY
TICK REJECTION ONLY


FOR PURCHASE REJECTION:

SELECT “PURCHASE” → CLICK LOAD
IF DATA EXISTS → DOWNLOAD EXCEL


FOR JOBWORK REJECTION:

SELECT “JOB WORK” → CLICK LOAD
IF DATA EXISTS → DOWNLOAD EXCEL


FOR PRODUCTION REJECTION:

SELECT “JOB WORK” → CLICK LOAD
IF DATA EXISTS → DOWNLOAD EXCEL

COMBINE ALL FILES → SEND TO VERTICAL HEAD & MANAGEMENT


CHECK
WEEKLY “REJECTION REVIEW MEETING” ON TUESDAY WITH AUTO FREQUENCY. REVIEW ISSUES.


ACT
DISCUSS REJECTIONS → FIX ROOT CAUSES → FINALIZE ACTION PLANS TO AVOID REPEATS.


PLAN
DAILY ஆணா REJECT பண்ணுற DATAS-ஐ MONITOR பண்ணி REPORT பண்ணணும்.

DO
OLD ERP-ல LOGIN பண்ணு → MIS → QUALITY → REJECTION ANALYSIS

DATE FROM – நேற்று, DATE TO – இன்று

REJECTION ONLY-க்கு TICK போடு


PURCHASE REJECTION:

REPORT FOR → “PURCHASE” → LOAD
DATA இருந்தா EXCEL DOWNLOAD பண்ணு


JOBWORK REJECTION:

REPORT FOR → “JOB WORK” → LOAD

  description = SUPER MARKET ITEMS STOCK MONITORING

PLAN
DO YOU HAVE THE LATEST AND COMPLETE LIST OF SUPER MARKET PARTS STOCK? 
HAVE YOU CLASSIFIED PARTS BASED ON CRITICALITY AND CONSUMPTION RATE (ABC ANALYSIS)? 
HAVE YOU IDENTIFIED MIN AND MAX STOCK LEVELS FOR EACH ITEM? 
HAVE YOU DISCUSSED STOCK-BUILDING STRATEGIES WITH MANAGEMENT? 

DO
HAVE YOU PHYSICALLY VERIFIED STOCK LEVELS WEEKLY?
HAVE YOU UPDATED THE STOCK MONITORING SHEET AS PER PHYSICAL COUNT? 
HAVE YOU RAISED PR OR ROUTE SHEETS FOR ITEMS WITH LOW STOCK LEVELS? 
HAVE YOU COORDINATED WITH PROCUREMENT FOR PENDING PR/POS? 

CHECK
HAVE YOU ENSURED THAT CURRENT STOCKS MATCH THE REQUIRED LEVELS IN THE LIST? 
HAVE YOU VERIFIED THAT PRS WERE RAISED FOR ALL LOW-STOCK OR CRITICAL ITEMS? 
HAVE YOU REVIEWED STOCK DISCREPANCY REPORTS AND TAKEN CORRECTIVE ACTION? 

ACT
HAVE YOU SENT THE UPDATED WEEKLY REPORT TO MANAGEMENT THROUGH MAIL (AS PER REFERENCE FORMAT/IMAGE)?
HAVE YOU RECORDED LEARNINGS OR ISSUES FACED DURING THE WEEK FOR PROCESS IMPROVEMENT? 

IN TANGLISH:
PLAN (திட்டமிடு)  
SUPER MARKET PARTS STOCK-க்கு LATEST & COMPLETE LIST இருக்கா? (புதிய முழுமையான பட்டியல் இருக்கா?)
PARTS-ஐ CRITICALITY & USAGE-படி CLASSIFY பண்ணிருக்கியா? (ABC ANALYSIS)
MIN-MAX STOCK LEVEL ஒவ்வொரு ITEM-க்கும் DEFINE பண்ணிருக்கியா?
STOCK BUILD STRATEGY MANAGEMENT-ஓட DISCUSS பண்ணிருக்கியா?


DO (செயல்)  
WEEKLY-ஆ PHYSICAL STOCK VERIFY பண்ணிருக்கியா?
PHYSICAL COUNT பண்ணதுக்கப்புறம் STOCK SHEET UPDATE பண்ணிருக்கியா?
LOW STOCK ITEMS-க்கு PR அல்லது ROUTESHEET RAISE பண்ணிருக்கியா?
PROCUREMENT-ஓட PENDING PR/POS-ஐ FOLLOW UP பண்ணிருக்கியா?

CHECK (சரிபார்)  
STOCK LEVELS LIST-படி இருக்கா CONFIRM பண்ணிருக்கியா?
LOW STOCK/CRITICAL ITEMS-க்கு PR RAISE பண்ணிருக்கா VERIFY பண்ணிருக்கியா?
STOCK MISMATCH OR ISSUE-ஐ ANALYZE பண்ணி CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுத்திருக்கியா?

ACT (செயல்படு)  
WEEKLY REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL-ல அனுப்பிருக்கியா? (REFERENCE FORMAT/IMAGE-க்கு ஏற்ப)
WEEKLY-யில் எதிர்பட்ட ISSUE OR LEARNING-ஐ NOTE பண்ணிருக்கியா?

  description = SENDING INWARD REMITTENCE BANK CHARGES (FOR EXPORT PRODUCT COSTING)

ENGLISH VERSION

OBJECTIVE:
TO INCORPORATE INWARD REMITTANCE BANK CHARGES INTO EXPORT PRODUCT COSTING ACCURATELY.

PLAN
COMPILE THE INWARD REMITTANCE BANK CHARGES FROM THE 16TH OF THE PREVIOUS MONTH TO THE 15TH OF THE CURRENT MONTH.

DO
SEND THE COMPILED CHARGES TO THE DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT VIA EMAIL ON THE 17TH OF EVERY MONTH.

CHECK
ENSURE CONFIRMATION EMAIL IS RECEIVED FROM THE DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT TEAM ACKNOWLEDGING RECEIPT.

ACT
MAINTAIN A RECORD OF THE CHARGES SENT AND THE CONFIRMATION RECEIVED FOR MONTHLY AUDITS.

TANGLISH VERSION

OBJECTIVE:
EXPORT PRODUCT COSTING-இல் INWARD REMITTANCE BANK CHARGES-ஐ CORRECT-ஆ INCLUDE பண்ணுதல்

PLAN

DO
ஏற்கனவே COMPILE பண்ணிய CHARGES-ஐ DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT-க்கு EMAIL-ல 17TH தேதி அனுப்பவும்.

CHECK
அவர்கள் CHARGES RECEIVE பண்ணினதற்கும் ACKNOWLEDGE பண்ணினதற்கும் CONFIRMATION MAIL வாங்கவும்

ACT
CHARGES & CONFIRMATION MAIL களை FUTURE REFERENCE காக MAINTAIN செய்யவும்

  checking_point = P & L SUBMISSION TO MANAGEMENT FOR PREVIOUS YEAR - SUBMISSION
  description = P & L SUBMISSION TO MANAGEMENT FOR PREVIOUS YEAR - SUBMISSION

ENGLISH:

PLAN
COLLECT PREVIOUS YEAR DATA:
SALES, OTHER INCOME, INCREASE/DECREASE IN STOCK, PURCHASE, EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO

ADD:
SALES
OTHER INCOME
TOTAL INCOME = SALES + OTHER INCOME
ADD: INCREASE IN STOCK
FINAL TOTAL = TOTAL INCOME + INCREASE IN STOCK

LESS:
DECREASE IN STOCK
PURCHASE (ESTIMATION IF PENDING)
EXPENSES
DEPRECIATION
TOTAL DEDUCTIONS
PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL – TOTAL DEDUCTIONS
PREPARE A TABLE AND EMAIL IT TO MANAGEMENT.

CHECK
IF MANAGEMENT ASKS FOR CLARIFICATION, RESPOND ACCORDINGLY.

ACT
IF MANAGEMENT SUGGESTS CORRECTIONS, UPDATE THE TABLE AND RESEND IT VIA EMAIL.


TANGLISH:

PLAN
PREVIOUS YEAR ஓட DATA COLLECT பண்ணுங்க:
SALES, OTHER INCOME, INCREASE/DECREASE IN STOCK, PURCHASE, EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO
ADD பண்ணுங்க:

SALES
OTHER INCOME
TOTAL INCOME = SALES + OTHER INCOME
ADD: STOCK INCREASE

FINAL TOTAL = TOTAL INCOME + STOCK INCREASE

MINUS பண்ணுங்க:

STOCK DECREASE
PURCHASE (ESTIMATE USE பண்ணுங்க IF NEEDED)
EXPENSES
DEPRECIATION
TOTAL DEDUCTIONS

PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL – TOTAL DEDUCTIONS
TABLE FORMAT ல PREPARE பண்ணிட்டு, MANAGEMENT-KU MAIL பண்ணுங்க.

CHECK
MANAGEMENT CLARIFICATION கேட்டா, PROPER-A REPLY பண்ணுங்க.

ACT
CORRECTION சொன்னா, UPDATE பண்ணி, மீண்டும் MAIL பண்ணுங்க.

  id = 8815
  seq_no = 879
  checking_point = INCOME TAX PAYABLE - FOR THE PERIOD 01.04.25 TO 31.08.25 (SEPTEMBER PAYMENT)
  description = INCOME TAX PAYABLE - FOR THE PERIOD 01.04.25 TO 31.08.25 (SEPTEMBER PAYMENT)

ENGLISH – PDCA FORMAT

PLAN:
COLLECT FINANCIAL DATA FOR THE PERIOD 01.04.25 TO 31.08.25:
- SALES, OTHER INCOME, CHANGE IN STOCK (INCREASE/DECREASE), PURCHASE (ESTIMATED IF PENDING), EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO:
1. ADD:
   - SALES + OTHER INCOME = TOTAL INCOME  
   - ADD INCREASE IN STOCK (IF APPLICABLE) → FINAL TOTAL  
2. LESS:
   - DECREASE IN STOCK  
   - PURCHASE  
   - EXPENSES  
   - DEPRECIATION  
   → TOTAL DEDUCTIONS  
   PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL - TOTAL DEDUCTIONS

3. PREPARE SUMMARY TABLE AND SEND TO MANAGEMENT VIA EMAIL.  
4. ON APPROVAL, PROCEED TO PAY ADVANCE TAX:

PAYMENT STEPS:
1. GO TO HTTPS://WWW.INCOMETAX.GOV.IN/IEC/FOPORTAL/  
2. ENTER PAN, RE-ENTER PAN, GIVE MOBILE NUMBER, ENTER OTP  
3. CONFIRM FIRM NAME → CLICK CONTINUE  
4. CLICK PROCEED UNDER "CORPORATION TAX"  
5. SELECT AY: 2026-27 → TYPE OF PAYMENT: ADVANCE TAX (100) → CONTINUE  
6. ENTER:
   - TAX (28.5% OF PROFIT)  
   - SURCHARGE (2% OF PROFIT)  
   - CESS (1% OF PROFIT)  
   - INTEREST (IF ANY)  
   - PENALTY, OTHERS = NIL  
7. CONTINUE → SELECT NET BANKING → PAY → SAVE RECEIPT  

CHECK:
1. ENTER TRANSACTION IN OLD ERP:  
   ACCOUNTS → VOUCHER → TYPE: PAYMENT, SUB-TYPE: PAYMENT F&A → ATTACH RECEIPT  
2. ENTER TRANSACTION IN TALLY  

ACT:
VERIFY ALL ENTRIES, FILE RECEIPTS, UPDATE TAX LEDGER.

TANGLISH – PDCA FORMAT

PLAN:
01.04.25 - 31.08.25 PERIOD க்கு FINANCIAL DATA COLLECT பண்ணுங்க:
- SALES, OTHER INCOME, STOCK INCREASE/DECREASE, PURCHASE (APPROX), EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO:
1. ADD:
   SALES + OTHER INCOME = TOTAL INCOME  
   STOCK INCREASE ADD பண்ணுங்க → FINAL TOTAL  
2. LESS:
   STOCK DECREASE  
   PURCHASE  
   EXPENSES  
   DEPRECIATION  
   → TOTAL DEDUCTIONS  
   PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL - TOTAL DEDUCTIONS  

3. TABLE PREPARE பண்ணிட்டு MANAGEMENT-KU MAIL பண்ணுங்க.  
4. APPROVAL கிடைத்த பிறகு, BELOW STEPS FOLLOW பண்ணுங்க:

PAYMENT STEPS:
1. VISIT: HTTPS://WWW.INCOMETAX.GOV.IN/IEC/FOPORTAL/  
2. PAN NUMBER TYPE பண்ணுங்க → CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க → MOBILE NUMBER ENTER பண்ணுங்க   → OTP ENTER பண்ணுங்க  
3. FIRM NAME DISPLAY ஆகும் → CONTINUE CLICK பண்ணுங்க  
4. CORPORATION TAX-ல "PROCEED" CLICK பண்ணுங்க  
5. AY SELECT பண்ணுங்க:  → TYPE: ADVANCE TAX (100) → CONTINUE  
6. TAX ENTRY:
   - TAX (28.5% OF PROFIT)  
   - SURCHARGE (2% OF PROFIT)  
   - CESS (1% OF PROFIT)  
   - INTEREST (IF ANY)  
   - PENALTY, OTHERS = NIL  
7. CONTINUE → NET BANKING → PAY பண்ணுங்க → RECEIPT SAVE பண்ணுங்க  

CHECK:
1. OLD ERP-ல ENTRY பண்ணுங்க:  
   ACCOUNTS → VOUCHER → TYPE: PAYMENT, SUB-TYPE: PAYMENT F&A → RECEIPT ATTACH பண்ணுங்க  
2. TALLY-LA SAME ENTRY பண்ணுங்க

ACT:
ENTRIES VERIFY பண்ணிட்டு, FILE UPDATE பண்ணுங்க, TAX LEDGER MAINTAIN பண்ணுங்க.

ENGLISH – PDCA FORMAT

PLAN:
COLLECT FINANCIAL DATA FOR THE PERIOD 01.09.25 TO 30.11.25:
- SALES, OTHER INCOME, CHANGE IN STOCK (INCREASE/DECREASE), PURCHASE (ESTIMATED IF PENDING), EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO:
1. ADD:
   - SALES + OTHER INCOME = TOTAL INCOME  
   - ADD INCREASE IN STOCK (IF APPLICABLE) → FINAL TOTAL

   - DECREASE IN STOCK  
   - PURCHASE  
   - EXPENSES  
   - DEPRECIATION  
   → TOTAL DEDUCTIONS  
   PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL - TOTAL DEDUCTIONS

3. PREPARE SUMMARY TABLE AND SEND TO MANAGEMENT VIA EMAIL.  
4. ON APPROVAL, PROCEED TO PAY ADVANCE TAX:

PAYMENT STEPS:
1. GO TO HTTPS://WWW.INCOMETAX.GOV.IN/IEC/FOPORTAL/  
2. ENTER PAN, RE-ENTER PAN, GIVE MOBILE NUMBER, ENTER OTP  
3. CONFIRM FIRM NAME → CLICK CONTINUE  
4. CLICK PROCEED UNDER "CORPORATION TAX"  
5. SELECT AY: 2026-27 → TYPE OF PAYMENT: ADVANCE TAX (100) → CONTINUE  
6. ENTER:
   - TAX (28.5% OF PROFIT)  
   - SURCHARGE (2% OF PROFIT)  
   - CESS (1% OF PROFIT)  
   - INTEREST (IF ANY)  
   - PENALTY, OTHERS = NIL  
7. CONTINUE → SELECT NET BANKING → PAY → SAVE RECEIPT  

CHECK:
1. ENTER TRANSACTION IN OLD ERP:  
   ACCOUNTS → VOUCHER → TYPE: PAYMENT, SUB-TYPE: PAYMENT F&A → ATTACH RECEIPT  
2. ENTER TRANSACTION IN TALLY  

ACT:
VERIFY ALL ENTRIES, FILE RECEIPTS, UPDATE TAX LEDGER.

TANGLISH – PDCA FORMAT

PLAN:
01.09.25 TO 30.11.25 PERIOD க்கு FINANCIAL DATA COLLECT பண்ணுங்க:
- SALES, OTHER INCOME, STOCK INCREASE/DECREASE, PURCHASE (APPROX), EXPENSES, DEPRECIATION.

DO:
1. ADD:
   SALES + OTHER INCOME = TOTAL INCOME  
   STOCK INCREASE ADD பண்ணுங்க → FINAL TOTAL  
2. LESS:
   STOCK DECREASE  
   PURCHASE  
   EXPENSES  
   DEPRECIATION  
   → TOTAL DEDUCTIONS  
   PROFIT = FINAL TOTAL - TOTAL DEDUCTIONS

  checking_point = ERP USERS PASSWORD UPDATE (NUTECH AND NAPL)
  description = ERP USERS PASSWORD UPDATE (NUTECH AND NAPL)

PLAN:
UPDATE THE OLD ERP PASSWORDS FOR ALL NUTECH AND NAPL USERS EVERY MONTH.
DO:
1.	ACCESS ONEDRIVE FROM ERP ADMIN AND OPEN THE FILE: NUTECH & NAPL ERP USERS PASSWORDS.XLSX. THROUGH THE FOLLOWING LINK : 
HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:X:/G/PERSONAL/ERPADMIN_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/EYAXT25NEFZNV4WXHSED9OCBK10EZAPEIKVBZHEBAEXMIA?E=VP7IXK
2.	INSERT A NEW COLUMN AFTER THE OLD PASSWORD COLUMN.
3.	CREATE NEW PASSWORDS FOR ALL USERS (NUTECH & NAPL). PASSWORD MUST CONTAIN,
•	A LOWERCASE LETTER
•	A CAPITAL (UPPERCASE) LETTER
•	A NUMBER
•	A SPECIAL CHARACTER
•	MINIMUM 8 CHARACTERS
4.	LOG IN TO ADMIN@NUTECH FROM THE EXISTING ERP SYSTEM.
5.	NAVIGATE TO MASTER > USER.
6.	LOAD ALL ACTIVE USERS.
7.	EDIT USER AND UPDATE THE PASSWORD.
8.	SAVE AFTER UPDATING EACH PASSWORD.
9.	REPEAT FOR ALL USERS.
10.	USE ANY DESK/ULTRA VIEWER TO UPDATE PASSWORDS IN EACH EMPLOYEE’S SYSTEM.
11.	AFTER ALL PASSWORDS ARE UPDATED, SEND THE LIST TO MANAGEMENT THROUGH MAIL.
CHECK:
VERIFY THAT ALL PASSWORDS ARE UPDATED BOTH IN THE ERP SYSTEM AND USER SYSTEMS.
ACT:
IF THERE ARE DISCREPANCIES, CORRECT THE PASSWORDS AND NOTIFY CONCERNED USERS. REVIEW STEPS FOR IMPROVEMENT NEXT MONTH.

PLAN:
NUTECH மற்றும் NAPL ERP USERS க்கு PASSWORD மாதம் ஒருமுறை UPDATE செய்ய வேண்டும்.

DO:
1.	ERP ADMIN ONEDRIVE ல் EXCEL FILE (NUTECH & NAPL ERP USERS PASSWORDS.XLSX) OPEN பண்ணவும். THROUGH THE FOLLOWING LINK,
HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:X:/G/PERSONAL/ERPADMIN_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/EYAXT25NEFZNV4WXHSED9OCBK10EZAPEIKVBZHEBAEXMIA?E=VP7IXK
2.	பழைய PASSWORD க்கு பின்புறம் புதிய COLUMN INSERT பண்ணவும்.
3.	NUTECH மற்றும் NAPL USERS க்கு புதிய PASSWORDS CREATE பண்ணவும். PASSWORD MUST CONTAIN,
•	A LOWERCASE LETTER
•	A CAPITAL (UPPERCASE) LETTER
•	A NUMBER
•	A SPECIAL CHARACTER
•	MINIMUM 8 CHARACTERS
4.	EXISTING ERP ல் LOGIN செய்யவும்.
5.	MASTER > USER சென்று செல்லவும்.
6.	எல்லா USERS ஐ LOAD செய்யவும்.
7.	USER ஐ EDIT செய்து PASSWORD UPDATE செய்யவும்.
8.	ஒவ்வொரு PASSWORD UPDATE பண்ணி, SAVE செய்யவும்.
9.	எல்லா USERS க்கும் இதே PROCESS பின்பற்றவும்.
10.	ANYDESK / ULTRAVIEWER மூலம் EMPLOYEE SYSTEMS க்கு சென்று PASSWORD UPDATE செய்யவும்.

CHECK:

ACT:

PLAN:

UPDATE ALL NUTECH AND NAPL MAIL PASSWORDS MONTHLY. STORE AND SHARE UPDATES SECURELY.

DO:

1.	ACCESS ONEDRIVE FROM ERP ADMIN AND OPEN THE EXCEL FILE: NUTECH & NAPL USERS(OFFICE 365).XLSX. THROUGH THE FOLLOWING LINK: 

HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:X:/R/PERSONAL/ERPADMIN_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/DOCUMENTS/NUTECH%20%26%20NAPL%20USERS(OFFICE%20365).XLSX?D=WC9978C848C8040CC9920C8EC5BC98913&CSF=1&WEB=1&E=DK6TZE

2.	INSERT A NEW COLUMN NEXT TO THE CURRENT PASSWORD COLUMN.
3.	CREATE NEW PASSWORDS FOR ALL NUTECH & NAPL USERS. PASSWORD MUST CONTAIN,
•	UPPERCASE LETTERS 
•	LOWERCASE LETTERS 
•	NUMBERS
•	SYMBOLS
•	MINIMUM 8 CHARACTERS
4.	IN ERP ADMIN MAIL, CLICK THE 9-DOT MENU AND OPEN ADMIN PORTAL.
5.	GO TO USERS > ACTIVE USERS.
6.	HOVER ON MAIL ID > CLICK THE KEY ICON > UPDATE THE PASSWORD.
7.	REPEAT FOR ALL USERS.
8.	USE ANY DESK/ULTRA VIEWER TO UPDATE PASSWORDS IN EACH EMPLOYEE’S SYSTEM.
9.	AFTER COMPLETION, SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD LIST TO MANAGEMENT THROUGH MAIL.

CHECK:

VERIFY ALL PASSWORDS ARE UPDATED IN BOTH THE EXCEL SHEET AND USER SYSTEMS.

ACT:

IF ERRORS ARE FOUND, CORRECT IMMEDIATELY AND NOTIFY CONCERNED USERS. REVIEW STEPS MONTHLY.


PLAN:

NUTECH மற்றும் NAPL MAIL ID க்கான PASSWORD மாதம் ஒரு முறை UPDATE செய்ய வேண்டும்.

DO:
1.	ERP ADMIN ONEDRIVEல் EXCEL FILE (NUTECH & NAPL USERS(OFFICE 365).XLSX) OPEN பண்ணவும். THROUGH THE FOLLOWING LINK:

HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:X:/R/PERSONAL/ERPADMIN_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/DOCUMENTS/NUTECH%20%26%20NAPL%20USERS(OFFICE%20365).XLSX?D=WC9978C848C8040CC9920C8EC5BC98913&CSF=1&WEB=1&E=DK6TZE

2.	EXISTING PASSWORD க்கு பின்புறம் ஒரு புதிய COLUMN INSERT பண்ணவும்.
3.	புதிய PASSWORDS CREATE பண்ணி EXCELல் UPDATE செய்யவும். PASSWORD MUST CONTAIN,
•	UPPERCASE LETTERS 
•	LOWERCASE LETTERS 
•	NUMBERS
•	SYMBOLS
•	MINIMUM 8 CHARACTERS

4.	9-DOT MENU கிளிக் செய்து ADMIN PORTAL OPEN பண்ணவும்.
5.	USERS > ACTIVE USERS SELECT பண்ணவும்.
6.	MAIL ID மீது HOVER பண்ணும் போது KEY ICON வரும். அதைக் கிளிக் செய்து PASSWORD CHANGE செய்யவும்.
7.	எல்லா USERS க்கும் இதே PROCESS பின்பற்றவும்.
8.	ANYDESK / ULTRAVIEWER மூலம் EMPLOYEE SYSTEMS க்குள் சென்று PASSWORD UPDATE செய்யவும்.
9.	முடிந்த பின் UPDATED PASSWORD LIST மேனேஜ்மென்ட் க்கு MAIL அனுப்பவும்.

CHECK:

EXCEL SHEET, USER SYSTEMS இரண்டிலும் PASSWORD UPDATE ஆனதா என CHECK பண்ணவும்.

  description = O365 MAIL STORAGE LIST MONTHLY

PLAN:

SUBMIT A MONTHLY MAILBOX STORAGE REPORT TO MANAGEMENT USING ERP ADMIN OR DIGITECH MAIL ID.

DO:
1.	USE ERP ADMIN/DIGITECH MAIL ID.
2.	CLICK THE 9-DOT ICON (TOP-LEFT) AND OPEN ADMIN PANEL.
3.	GO TO USERS > ACTIVE USERS.
4.	SEARCH EACH MAIL ID IN THE RIGHT-SIDE FIELD.
5.	CLICK THE USER NAME TO OPEN THE POP-UP.
6.	SELECT THE MAIL TAB.
7.	VIEW STORAGE UNDER MAILBOX SECTION.
8.	RECORD DATA IN EXCEL WITH COLUMNS: S.NO, MAIL ID, STORAGE (IN GB).
9.	REPEAT FOR ALL 55 MAILBOXES.
10.	SEND THE REPORT TO MANAGEMENT BY EMAIL.

CHECK:

ENSURE ALL 55 IDS ARE LISTED AND STORAGE VALUES ARE CORRECT. REVIEW FOR CONSISTENCY.
ACT:
CORRECT ANY ERRORS FOUND. UPDATE THE EXCEL FORMAT IF NEEDED FOR BETTER CLARITY NEXT MONTH.


PLAN:

MANAGEMENT க்கு MONTHLY WISE MAILBOX STORAGE REPORT அனுப்ப வேண்டியது அவசியம். இதற்காக ERP ADMIN அல்லது DIGITECH MAIL ID பயன்படுத்த வேண்டும்.

DO:
1.	ERP/DIGITECH MAIL ID USE செய்யவும்.
2.	LEFT SIDE TOP CORNERல் உள்ள 9-DOT ஐ கிளிக் செய்து ADMIN PANEL ஐ திறக்கவும்.
3.	USERS > ACTIVE USERS க்கு செல்லவும்.
4.	SEARCH BARல் MAIL ID உள்ளீடு செய்யவும்.
5.	NAME-ஐ கிளிக் செய்தால் USER POPUP OPEN ஆகும்.
6.	அதில் MAIL TAB ஐ தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.
7.	MAILBOX STORAGE INFO காணலாம்.
8.	EXCEL FILE ல் S.NO, MAIL ID, STORAGE (GB) HEADINGS உடன் DATA உள்ளிடவும்.
9.	55 MAIL IDS க்கும் STORAGE ADD செய்யவும்.
10.	REPORT ஐ MANAGEMENTக்கு அனுப்பவும்.

CHECK:
எல்லா VALUES சரியாக உள்ளதா என்பதை சரிபார்க்கவும்.

ACT:
பிழைகள் இருந்தால் திருத்தி, அடுத்த மாதம் மேம்படுத்தவும்.

PLAN:

DESIGN SOFTWARE LIKE CANVA TO BE USED FOR POSTER CREATION.
GIF FORMAT PREFERRED (ALSO DOWNLOAD VIDEO FORMAT FOR INSTAGRAM).
POSTER TO BE PREPARED BEFORE 5 DAYS FROM  INTERNATIONAL WOMENS DAY  .
 
DO:
DESIGN AND DOWNLOAD POSTER IN BOTH GIF AND MP4 FORMATS.
SEND TO MANAGEMENT FOR APPROVAL.
IF CORRECTIONS ARE REQUIRED, MAKE CHANGES AND RESEND.
 
CHECK:
AFTER APPROVAL, SEND EMAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH WISHES CONTENT AND APPROVED POSTER.
VERIFY THAT POSTER IS READY FOR CIRCULATION.
 
ACT:
POST THE APPROVED POSTER ON FACEBOOK, LINKEDIN, INSTAGRAM, AND X (TWITTER) ON 1 DAY BEFORE.
SEND THE WISHES AND POSTER TO SUPPLIERS AND CUSTOMERS FROM INFO@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM AND INFO@NAPLINDIA.COM ON 1 DAY BEFORE.
 
TANGLISH
 
PLAN:
POSTER DESIGN பண்ண CANVA மாதிரி SOFTWARE USE பண்ணனும்.
GIF FORMAT வேணும். INSTAGRAM-KU VIDEO FORMAT (MP4) DOWNLOAD பண்ணனும்.
5 DAYS-கு முன்னாடி POSTER PREPARE பண்ணனும் .
 
DO:
POSTER DESIGN பண்ணி, GIF & MP4 FORMATல DOWNLOAD பண்ணனும்.
MANAGEMENT-க்கு APPROVALக்கு MAIL அனுப்பணும்.
CORRECTIONS இருந்தா EDIT பண்ணி திருப்பி அனுப்பணும்.
 
CHECK:
APPROVAL கிடைத்த பிறகு, ERP ADMIN-க்கு WISHES CONTENT கூட POSTER அனுப்பணும்.
POSTER CIRCULATE செய்ய தயார் இருக்குதா CHECK பண்ணனும்.
 
ACT:
1 DAY-க்கு முன்னாடி FACEBOOK, LINKEDIN, INSTAGRAM, Xல POST பண்ணணும்.
SAME DAYல WISHES CONTENT & POSTER INFO@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM, INFO@NAPLINDIA.COM லிருந்து SUPPLIERS & CUSTOMERS-க்கு MAIL அனுப்பணும்.

CORRECTIONS இருந்தா EDIT பண்ணி திருப்பி அனுப்பணும்.

1 DAY-க்கு முன்னாடி FACEBOOK, LINKEDIN, INSTAGRAM, Xல POST பண்ணணும்.

  description = DIRECTOR RE-IMBURSEMENT PAYMENT - HR


PLAN:
EACH DIRECTOR IS ALLOCATED ₹3,00,000 PER ANNUM FOR PERSONAL REIMBURSEMENTS. HRA MUST INFORM DIRECTORS OF THE ALLOCATION BY THE 1ST WEEK OF APRIL YEARLY.

DO:
DIRECTORS SUBMIT VALID BILLS TO THE HRA TEAM.
HRA BOOKS BILLS IN THE OLD ERP UNDER "VOUCHER SCREEN".
ACCOUNTS TEAM PROCESSES PAYMENT DIRECTLY TO SUPPLIERS.  NO APPROVAL REQUIRED FROM MANAGEMENT TO PAY THIS PAYMENT
ANY UNUSED AMOUNT IS CARRIED FORWARD TO THE NEXT FINANCIAL YEAR.

CHECK:
HRA TEAM MAINTAINS RECORDS OF REIMBURSEMENTS PER DIRECTOR. MONTHLY STATUS REPORTS MUST BE REVIEWED FOR ACCURACY AND PENDING LIMITS.

ACT:
IF MISUSE OR ERRORS ARE IDENTIFIED, NOTIFY MANAGEMENT AND CORRECT THE ENTRIES. REVIEW POLICY ANNUALLY FOR UPDATES.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
COMPANY: DIRECTORS FEDUP.
USER (HRA, ACCOUNTS TEAM): DISPLINARY ACATION WILL BE TAKEN TO THE RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE.

🟩 TANGLISH VERSION (TAMIL + ENGLISH MIXED)
SOP – DIRECTOR REIMBURSEMENT – PDCA FORMAT

PLAN:
ஒவ்வொரு DIRECTOR-க்கும் வருடம் ₹3,00,000 ALLOCATE பண்ணப்படும். HRA TEAM APRIL மாதம் முதல் வாரத்திலேயே இது பற்றி INFORM பண்ணணும்.

DO:
DIRECTORS VALID BILLS-ஐ HRA-க்கு SUBMIT பண்ணணும்.
HRA, OLD ERP-ல "VOUCHER SCREEN" USE பண்ணி BILLS-ஐ BOOK பண்ணணும்.
ACCOUNTS TEAM DIRECTா SUPPLIERS-க்கு PAYMENT பண்ணணும். NO APPROVAL REQUIRED FROM MANAGEMENT TO PAY THIS PAYMENT
USE ஆகாத AMOUNT அடுத்த வருடத்துக்கு CARRY FORWARD ஆகும்.

CHECK:
HRA TEAM, REIMBURSEMENT RECORDS-ஐ MAINTAIN பண்ணணும். MONTHLY REVIEW பண்ணி PENDING BALANCE-ஐ TRACK பண்ணணும்.

ACT:
MISTAKE இருந்தா MANAGEMENT-க்கு REPORT பண்ணி CORRECT பண்ணணும். POLICY-ஐ YEARLY UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
COMPANY: DIRECTORS FEDUP.
USER (HRA, ACCOUNTS TEAM): DISPLINARY ACATION WILL BE TAKEN TO THE RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE.

Row:
  id = 8837
  seq_no = 901
  checking_point = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - LEAVE ENTRY APPROVAL (NAPL)
  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - LEAVE ENTRY APPROVAL (NAPL)

PLAN:
ENSURE VP-APPROVED LEAVE ENTRIES ARE PROCESSED ON TIME WITH VALID ATTACHMENTS TO MAINTAIN COMPLIANCE AND PAYROLL ACCURACY.

DO:
CHECK MAIL FROM USER OR VP. CONFIRM VP APPROVAL IS MENTIONED.
LOGIN TO OLD ERP → GO TO PAYROLL → LEAVE FORM.
PASTE EMPLOYEE NAME → LOAD ENTRY.
VERIFY ATTACHMENT:
IF PRESENT: APPROVE AND REPLY VIA EMAIL.
IF MISSING: DO NOT APPROVE. REPLY ASKING TO ATTACH LEAVE FORM.
COMPLETE ALL ACTIONS WITHIN 1 WORKING DAY.

CHECK:
VERIFY LEAVE APPROVAL STATUS AND MAIL RESPONSES ARE COMPLETED WITHIN DEADLINE.

ACT:
IF REPEATED ISSUES FOUND (E.G., MISSING ATTACHMENTS), ESCALATE TO HR MANAGER.
TRACK DELAYS AND TAKE CORRECTIVE ACTION.


திட்டமிடல் (PLAN):
VP APPROVE பண்ணிய LEAVE FORM PROCESS பண்ணணும். ATTACHMENT இல்லாம போனா, PAYROLL IMPACT ஆகும்.

செயல் (DO):
USER-ல இருந்து MAIL வந்திருச்சா CHECK பண்ணு. VP APPROVAL MENTION பண்ணியிருக்கணும்.
OLD ERPல LOGIN பண்ணு → PAYROLL → LEAVE FORM க்கு போ.
EMPLOYEE NAME PASTE பண்ணி, ENTRY LOAD பண்ணு.
ATTACHMENT CHECK பண்ணு:
இருந்துச்சுனா: APPROVE பண்ணிட்டு MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணு.
இல்லையெனா: APPROVE பண்ணாதே. ATTACHMENT ATTACH பண்ண சொல்லி REPLY பண்ணு.
இவங்க எல்லாமே ஒரு WORKING DAY-க்குள்ள முடிஞ்சிடணும்.

சரிபார்ப்பு (CHECK):
LEAVE FORM APPROVE பண்ணின STATUS-ம், MAILக்கு TIMELYா REPLY பண்ணியிருக்கோம்னு CHECK பண்ணணும்.

நடவடிக்கை (ACT):
ATTACHMENT இல்லாம FREQUENTா வருதுனா HR MANAGER-க்கே ESCALATE பண்ணு. DELAY ஆச்சுனா REASON TRACK பண்ணி CORRECT பண்ணு.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
TO COMPANY: PAYROLL ERRORS, AUDIT ISSUES, POLICY VIOLATIONS.
TO USER: DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN TO THE RESPECTIVE USER

COMPANYக்கு: PAYROLL MISMATCH, AUDITல PROBLEM, POLICY BREAK ஆகும்.
USERக்கு: DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN TO THE RESPECTIVE USER

  id = 8838
  seq_no = 902
  checking_point = AUDIT CLOSE NCR POINTS - REASSIGNING
  description = AUDIT CLOSE NCR POINTS - REASSIGNING

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM HR DEPARTMENT REGARDING EXITED EMPLOYEE. VERIFY MAIL DETAILS.

DO
OPEN NEW ERP → EMPLOYEE MASTER → SEARCH EXITED EMPLOYEE.
IF EXITED, THEIR AUDIT CLOSE NCR POINTS WILL BE REASSIGNED.
LOGIN → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT OBSERVATION
CLICK "CONSIDER DATE – NO", SELECT "AUDIT TYPE – ALL", CHOOSE NAME.
USE SEARCH → SELECT ENTRY → CLICK “REASSIGN TO” → CHANGE ASSIGN NAME.
REASSIGN ALL NCR POINTS FULLY.

CHECK
VERIFY ALL POINTS SUCCESSFULLY REASSIGNED. NO PENDING ITEMS.

ACT
REPLY MAIL TO HR CONFIRMING REASSIGNMENT. KEEP RECORD FOR AUDIT.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
HR ல் இருந்து வந்த MAIL-ஐ RECEIVE பண்ணிட்டு, அதில இருக்குற DETAILS எல்லாமே CHECK பண்ணணும்.

DO (செய்)
EMPLOYEE LIST-ல அந்த பேரு இல்லனா, அவங்க POINTS அவங்க DEPT-கு SHIFT ஆகும். எல்லா POINTS-ஐYUM அவங்க DEPT PERSON-கு REASSIGN பண்ணணும்.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
எல்லா POINTS-ஐYUM REASSIGN பண்ணியா? CHECK பண்ணுங்க. எதுவும் MISS ஆகக்கூடாது.

ACT (நடத்து)
HR-கு MAIL REPLY பண்ணி CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க. PROOF SAFE-ஆ வைச்சிக்கணும்.

Row:
  id = 8839
  seq_no = 903
  checking_point = CLOSE MOM POINTS - REASSIGNING
  description = CLOSE MOM POINTS - REASSIGNING

 PLAN
RECEIVE THE EMAIL FROM THE HR DEPARTMENT REGARDING MOM POINT REASSIGNMENT.
VERIFY THE MAIL DETAILS THOROUGHLY FOR EMPLOYEE AND TASK ACCURACY.

 DO
LOG IN TO NEW ERP → GO TO EMPLOYEE MASTER → SEARCH FOR THE EMPLOYEE.
IF THE EMPLOYEE HAS LEFT THE COMPANY, REASSIGN THE CHECKLIST POINTS TO THE SAME DEPARTMENT.
NAVIGATE TO NEW ERP → QMS → MEETING → MINUTES OF MEETING.
APPLY FILTERS: SELECT THE DEPARTMENT, STATUS AS "OPEN", AND CONSIDER DATE AS "NO".
USE THE SEARCH BUTTON TO LIST ALL RELEVANT ENTRIES.
SELECT EACH ENTRY → CLICK "REASSIGN TO".
CHANGE THE "ASSIGN BY" AND "ASSIGN TO" FIELDS ACCORDINGLY.
UPDATE THE TARGET DATE TO A FUTURE DATE IF THE CURRENT EFFECTIVE DATE IS IN THE PAST.
SAVE THE CHANGES AFTER EACH UPDATE.
REPEAT UNTIL ALL OPEN MOM POINTS ARE REASSIGNED.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL MOM POINTS ARE REASSIGNED WITH VALID TARGET DATES.
VERIFY THAT NO OPEN POINTS ARE LEFT UNDER THE RESIGNED EMPLOYEE.

ACT
REPLY TO THE ORIGINAL HR MAIL CONFIRMING THAT THE REASSIGNMENT HAS BEEN COMPLETED.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
HR MAIL வந்ததும் அதில் MENTION பண்ணிருந்த DETAILS CHECK பண்ணனும்.

DO (செய்)
EMPLOYEE MASTERல EMPLOYEE NAME SEARCH பண்ணு.
IF EMPLOYEE RESIGNED, CHECKLIST POINTS REASSIGN பண்ணனும் SAME DEPARTMENTக்கு.
LOGIN TO NEW ERP → QMS → MEETING → MINUTES OF MEETING
DEPT. & STATUS "OPEN", CONSIDER DATE "NO" FILTER பண்ணி, SEARCH பண்ணு.
EACH ENTRY SELECT பண்ணி, "REASSIGN TO" கிளிக் பண்ணு.
ASSIGN BY, ASSIGN TO மாற்றி, FUTURE TARGET DATE FIX பண்ணு.
PAST DATE இருந்தா, FUTURE DATEகு CHANGE பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணு.
எல்லா MOM POINTSயும் REASSIGN பண்ணிட்டு முடிச்சுடு.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
MOM ENTRIES REASSIGN ஆயிருக்கா, TARGET DATE FUTUREலா CHECK பண்ணு.

ACT (நடத்து)
REASSIGN PROCESS முடிஞ்சதும் HRக்கு MAIL REPLY பண்ணி CONFIRMATION குடுக்கணும்.
HRக்கு BACK CONFIRMATION MAIL அனுப்பனும், இது முக்கியம்.

PLAN
RECEIVE THE MAIL FROM THE HR DEPARTMENT REGARDING REASSIGNMENT OF CHECKLIST POINTS.
VERIFY ALL MAIL DETAILS, INCLUDING THE EMPLOYEE NAME AND STATUS.

DO
LOG IN TO THE NEW ERP → GO TO EMPLOYEE MASTER → SEARCH FOR THE MENTIONED EMPLOYEE.
IF THE EMPLOYEE HAS LEFT THE COMPANY, CHECKLIST POINTS MUST BE REASSIGNED TO ANOTHER EMPLOYEE IN THE SAME DEPARTMENT.
NAVIGATE TO NEW ERP → QMS → CHECKLIST → MASTER CHECKLIST.
FILTER THE SPECIFIC DEPARTMENT.
USE THE SEARCH BUTTON TO LIST ALL ENTRIES.
SELECT EACH ENTRY → CLICK ON THE "ASSIGN TO" OPTION.
INACTIVATE THE LEFT EMPLOYEE AND ASSIGN THE CHECKLIST POINT TO THE CURRENT ACTIVE EMPLOYEE.
IF THE EFFECTIVE DATE IS IN THE PAST, UPDATE IT TO A VALID FUTURE DATE → THEN SAVE.
REPEAT UNTIL ALL CHECKLIST POINTS ARE REASSIGNED.

CHECK
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL POINTS HAVE BEEN REASSIGNED.
NO CHECKLIST ITEMS REMAIN UNDER THE EXITED EMPLOYEE.
FUTURE TARGET DATES ARE PROPERLY UPDATED.

ACT
REPLY TO THE HR MAIL CONFIRMING THE REASSIGNMENT HAS BEEN COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY.


PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
MAILல இருந்த DETAILS VERIFY பண்ணனும் – EMPLOYEE INFO CORRECTஆ CHECK பண்ணு.

DO (செய்)
NEW ERP → EMPLOYEE MASTERல EMPLOYEE NAME SEARCH பண்ணு.
IF EMPLOYEE LEFT PANNITANGA, CHECKLIST POINTS SAME DEPARTMENT PERSONக்கு REASSIGN பண்ணனும்.
LOGIN → ERP → QMS → CHECKLIST → MASTER CHECKLIST.
DEPARTMENT FILTER பண்ணி, SEARCH பண்ணு.
ஒவ்வொரு ENTRYயும் SELECT பண்ணி, "ASSIGN TO" கிளிக் பண்ணு.
LEFT EMPLOYEE INACTIVE பண்ணிட்டு, POINTS CURRENT EMPLOYEEக்கு ASSIGN பண்ணு.
EFFECTIVE DATE PASTல இருந்தா, FUTURE DATE SET பண்ணிட்டு SAVE பண்ணு.
CHECKLIST ITEMS全部யும் REASSIGN பண்ணனும்.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
ALL POINTS REASSIGNED ஆச்சா? FUTURE DATE வச்சிருக்கா? MISSED ENTRY இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.

ACT (நடத்து)
HR MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி, REASSIGNMENT COMPLETE அப்படின்னு CONFIRM பண்ணு.
HR CONFIRMATION MAIL முக்கியம்.

  checking_point = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - SALE ORDER APPROVAL FOR SITE TEAM (ARAL & GDM)
  description = PLAN
FIRST, RECEIVE MAIL OR TEAMS MESSAGE FROM ARAL AND GDM.
VERIFY THE RECEIVED SALES ORDER TEMPLATE FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, AND RATE.

DO
BEFORE UPDATING THE PRICE IN THE SALE ORDER, CHECK THE PRICE LIST FOR THE LAST 6 MONTHS.
IF THE PRICE LIST IS UPDATED, APPROVE THE SALE ORDER. IF NOT, APPROVAL WILL BE TAKEN FROM HARI SIR.
LOG IN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO CRM → ORDER → SALE ORDER.
PASTE THE ITEM CODE IN THE "ORDER NUMBER" FIELD.
CLICK THE "ACTION" BUTTON → CLICK "MAKE APPROVAL" BUTTON.
ON THE LEFT-HAND SIDE, SELECT THE APPROVAL OPTION → CLICK THE "APPROVAL" TAB → APPROVE THE SALE ORDER.

CHECK
ENSURE THAT:
THE SALE ORDER IS APPROVED CORRECTLY.
THE PRICE LIST IS CHECKED, AND THE APPROVAL PROCESS IS DONE.

ACT
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL OR TEAMS MESSAGE CONFIRMING THE APPROVAL STATUS.
IF THE PRICE LIST IS NOT UPDATED, INFORM THE USER ABOUT UPDATING THE PRICE LIST FOR THE ITEM CODE.


PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
ARAL மற்றும் GDM இருந்து MAIL OR TEAMS வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY மற்றும் RATE CORRECTஆ இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
PRICE UPDATE பண்ணதுக்கு முன்னாடி, LAST 6 MONTHS PRICE LIST பார்த்து VERIFY பண்ணுங்க.
PRICE LIST UPDATE ஆயிருந்தா, SALE ORDER APPROVE பண்ணுங்க, இல்லையா HARI SIR APPROVAL எடுக்கணும்.
LOGIN TO OLD ERP → GO TO CRM → ORDER → SALE ORDER.
PASTE THE ITEM CODE IN "ORDER NUMBER" FIELD.
CLICK ON "ACTION" BUTTON → CLICK "MAKE APPROVAL" BUTTON.
ON THE LEFT-HAND SIDE, SELECT APPROVAL OPTION → CLICK ON "APPROVAL" TAB → APPROVE THE SALE ORDER.
APPROVAL BUTTON PRESS பண்ணி, SALE ORDER APPROVE பண்ணுங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
SALE ORDER IS APPROVED CORRECTLY.
PRICE LIST IS CHECKED, AND APPROVAL PROCESS IS DONE.

ACT (நடத்து
MAIL OR TEAMSக்கு APPROVAL STATUS CONFIRM பண்ணி REPLY அனுப்புங்க.
PRICE LIST UPDATE ஆகல, ITEM CODE PRICE LIST UPDATE பண்ணினு USERக்கு INFORM பண்ணுங்க.

  checking_point = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - PRODUCT CONVERSION - NUTECH
  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - PRODUCT CONVERSION - NUTECH

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM UMAPATHY.
VERIFY THE MAIL FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, AND REASON.
ENSURE THAT UMAPATHY’S APPROVAL IS CLEARLY MENTIONED IN THE MAIL.

DO
LOG IN TO THE OLD ERP SYSTEM.
NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT
IF THE MAIL LACKS REQUIRED DETAILS, REPLY TO THE USER REQUESTING COMPLETE INFORMATION.
IF APPROVAL FROM UMAPATHY IS NOT MENTIONED, REPLY ASKING THE USER TO GET APPROVAL AND RESEND THE MAIL.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
UMAPATHY இருந்து MAIL வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON CORRECTா இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
ENSURE APPROVAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MAIL AS "UMAPATHY".
APPROVAL UMAPATHY எடுக்கனும்.
LOGIN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL.
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM A NEW ENTRY IS CREATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL WITH THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, UMAPATHY APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

Row:
  id = 8843
  seq_no = 907
  checking_point = HRMS POLICY TEST
  description = PLAN:

CONDUCT A MONTHLY HRMS POLICY TEST FOR THE HR DEPARTMENT VIA THE NEW ERP SYSTEM.

DO:

STEP 1: ADD QUESTIONS TO ERP

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP.
             2.	OPEN MENU → CLICK HRMS → OPEN TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY CATEGORY (SCR. 270) → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	GO TO COMPETENCY DETAILS (SCR. 362) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY → ENTER DETAILS → SELECT DEPARTMENT/DESIGNATION → SAVE.
             5.	GO TO QUESTION BANK (SCR. 366) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY/DETAIL → ENTER QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER →  SAVE.

STEP 2: CONDUCT TEST

             1.	IN TRAINING DROPDOWN → OPEN QUESTION GROUP (SCR. 366) → SEARCH BY DEPARTMENT.
             2.	SELECT QUESTIONS → CLICK “CREATE QUESTION” → SAVE.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365) → ADD → SELECT EMPLOYEE → CATEGORY → SUB-CATEGORY → PROFICIENCY → PLAN ID → SAVE.
             4.	EMPLOYEE RECEIVES TEST MAIL WITH EXAM ID.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE TEST SUBMISSION

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGS INTO ERP → MENU → HRMS → USER ANSWER PAGE (SCR. 371).
             2.	ENTER EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID → CONFIRM → ANSWER & SUBMIT.

STEP 4: MAIL SCORE TO MANAGEMENT

             1.	LOGIN ERP → MENU → HRMS → COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365).
             2.	SEARCH EMPLOYEE → VIEW ANSWER → NOTE AVERAGE SCORE.
             3.	MAIL EMPLOYEE NAME AND SCORE TO MANAGEMENT, CC RELEVANT PARTICIPANTS.

CHECK:

ENSURE TEST CONDUCTED, ANSWERS SUBMITTED, SCORES RECORDED AND VERIFIED.

ACT:

REVIEW TEST RESULTS MONTHLY. IMPROVE QUESTION BANK AND TRAINING BASED ON GAPS.

TAMIL :

PLAN:

HR DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் HRMS POLICY TEST CONDUCT பண்ணணும் USING NEW ERP.

DO:

STEP 1: QUESTION ADD பண்ணனும்

             1.	NEW ERP-ல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க.
             2.	LEFT ARROW CLICK பண்ணி MENU OPEN பண்ணி HRMS → TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	SCREEN 270 – COMPETENCY CATEGORY OPEN பண்ணி → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	BACK போய் SCREEN 362 – COMPETENCY DETAILS OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY SELECT → DETAILS ENTER பண்ணி → DEPT/DESIGNATION SELECT → SAVE.
             5.	அப்புறம் SCREEN 366 – QUESTION BANK OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY/DETAIL SELECT → QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER ADD பண்ணி → SAVE.

STEP 2: TEST CONDUCT பண்ணனும்

             1.	SCREEN 366 – QUESTION GROUP-ல் DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஏற்ற QUESTION SELECT பண்ணி → CREATE QUESTION → SAVE.
             2.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → CATEGORY, SUB-CATEGORY, PROFICIENCY, PLAN ID SELECT பண்ணி → SAVE.
             3.	EMPLOYEE-க்கு EXAM ID MAIL-ல போகும்.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE ANSWER பண்ணனும்

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGIN பண்ணி → HRMS → SCREEN 371 – USER ANSWER PAGE.
             2.	EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID ENTER பண்ணி → CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க.
             3.	QUESTIONS LOAD ஆகும் → ANSWER பண்ணி SUBMIT பண்ணணும்.

STEP 4: SCORE MANAGEMENT-க்கு அனுப்பணும்

             1.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → VIEW ANSWER → SCORE கண்டுபிடிக்க.
             2.	EMAIL-ல் EMPLOYEE NAME & SCORE அனுப்பணும், CC-ல் PARTICIPANTS ADD பண்ணி அனுப்பணும்.

CHECK:

SUBMISSION COMPLETE-A, SCORE VERIFY பண்ணி CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

ACT:

EVERY MONTH RESULTS REVIEW பண்ணி, QUESTION BANK IMPROVE பண்ணுங்க.

  checking_point = JOB POSTING ON WEBSITE
  description = JOB POSTING ON WEBSITE

PLAN:

JOB OPENING LISTS RECEIVED FROM THE HR DEPARTMENT MUST BE UPDATED ON THE COMPANY WEBSITE WITHOUT DELAY.

DO:

             1.	HR SENDS THE JOB OPENING LIST VIA EMAIL.
             2.	AS OUR WEBSITE IS HOSTED ON AWS, WE USE FILEZILLA TO ACCESS AND UPDATE SOURCE FILES.

STEPS TO UPDATE JOB POSTING:

             1.	DOWNLOAD FILEZILLA:
                                       HTTPS://DOWNLOAD.FILEZILLA-PROJECT.ORG/CLIENT/FILEZILLA_3.69.0_WIN64_SPONSORED2-SETUP.EXE
             2.	INSTALL AND OPEN FILEZILLA.
             3.	GO TO FILE > SITE MANAGER > NEW SITE, AND ENTER THE FOLLOWING:
                       •	PROTOCOL: SFTP
                       •	HOST: EC2-3-126-152-86.EU-CENTRAL-1.COMPUTE.AMAZONAWS.COM
                       •	LOGON TYPE: KEY FILE
                       •	USER: UBUNTU
                       •	KEY FILE: DOWNLOAD FROM
                                            HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:U:/G/PERSONAL/DIGITECH_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/ECO8MF7S74NFLN_NSMILKYKBRHCK5N2QKLS7WVFIZI-PJW?E=NI9HOZ
             4.	BROWSE AND SELECT THE DOWNLOADED KEY FILE AND CONNECT.
             5.	NAVIGATE TO /VAR/WWW/HTML/APPLICATION/VIEWS/SITE/PAGES/
             6.	LOCATE CAREERS.PHP, RIGHT-CLICK → DOWNLOAD
             7.	OPEN THE FILE LOCALLY, EDIT THE JOB LISTING SECTION, AND SAVE
             8.	IN FILEZILLA, RIGHT-CLICK THE EDITED FILE FROM THE LOCAL SITE → UPLOAD
             9.	WHEN PROMPTED, SELECT OVERWRITE
          10.	VISIT THE WEBSITE TO CONFIRM THE JOB POSTINGS ARE UPDATED.

CHECK:

ENSURE THE UPDATED JOB LISTINGS ARE CORRECTLY DISPLAYED ON THE LIVE SITE.

ACT:

REPEAT THE SAME PROCESS WHENEVER A NEW JOB LIST IS RECEIVED FROM HR.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

HR DEPARTMENTல இருந்து JOB OPENING LIST வந்ததும் WEBSITEல UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

DO:

             1.	HR TEAM MAILல JOB LIST அனுப்புவாங்க.
             2.	நம்ம WEBSITE AWSல HOST பண்ணிருக்கும். அதனால் FILEZILLA SOFTWARE வைத்து தான் ACCESS பண்ண முடியும்.

FILEZILLA SETUP & JOB POSTING UPDATE STEPS:

             1.	FILEZILLA DOWNLOAD பண்ணனும்:
                        HTTPS://DOWNLOAD.FILEZILLA-PROJECT.ORG/CLIENT/FILEZILLA_3.69.0_WIN64_SPONSORED2-SETUP.EXE
             2.	INSTALL பண்ணிட்டு OPEN பண்ணணும்
             3.	FILE > SITE MANAGER > NEW SITE சென்று DETAILS FILL பண்ணணும்:
                       •	PROTOCOL: SFTP
                       •	HOST: EC2-3-126-152-86.EU-CENTRAL-1.COMPUTE.AMAZONAWS.COM
                       •	LOGON TYPE: KEY FILE
                       •	USER: UBUNTU
                       •	KEY FILE:
                                    HTTPS://NUTECHWINDPARTSPVTLTD-MY.SHAREPOINT.COM/:U:/G/PERSONAL/DIGITECH_NUTECHWINDPARTS_COM/ECO8MF7S74NFLN_NSMILKYKBRHCK5N2QKLS7WVFIZI-PJW?E=NI9HOZ
             4.	KEY FILE SELECT பண்ணிட்டு CONNECT பண்ணணும்
             5.	SOURCE FILE PATH: /VAR/WWW/HTML/APPLICATION/VIEWS/SITE/PAGES/
             6.	CAREERS.PHP FILE LOCATE பண்ணி RIGHT-CLICK → DOWNLOAD

CHECK:

             3.	CLICK THE “ANALYZE” BUTTON.

             5.	AT THE TOP OF THE RESULT PAGE, CLICK THE “PRINT” BUTTON.
             6.	CHOOSE “SAVE AS PDF” AND DOWNLOAD THE REPORT.
             7.	SEND THE PDF SEO REPORT VIA EMAIL TO THE MANAGEMENT.

CHECK:

ACT:

  description = MACHINE & OPERATOR OEE REPORT ON DAILY BASIS

PLAN:

ENSURE DAILY OEE DATA IS PROPERLY RECORDED BY PRODUCTION AND VERIFIED BY QMS. TRACK CHECKLIST STATUS AND PERFORM AUDITS TO CONFIRM COMPLIANCE.

DO:

PRODUCTION:

             1.	MONITOR OEE DAILY. IF ABNORMALITIES ARE FOUND, INFORM MANAGEMENT.
             2.	SEND OEE REPORT EVERY MORNING AT BEFORE 11’O CLOCK TO MANAGEMENT VIA MAIL.

QMS DEPARTMENT:

             3.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP USING ADMIN CREDENTIALS.
             4.	NAVIGATE: LEFT ARROW → QMS DROPDOWN → CHECKLIST → CLOSE CHECKLIST.
             5.	ON THE CLOSE CHECKLIST SCREEN:
             6.	TASK TYPE: COMPANY
             7.	EMPLOYEE: FROM PRODUCTION (EX: SURESH)
             8.	DATE: TODAY
             9.	STATUS: ALL
          10.	LOCATE SEQ NO 179, VERIFY IF IT’S CLOSED WITH PROPER MAIL EVIDENCE.
          11.	TAKE A SCREENSHOT FOR RECORDS.
AUDIT PROCESS:
          12.	IN ERP: LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE.
          13.	ADD A NEW AUDIT:
          14.	TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT
          15.	ENTER DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AND CRITERIA
          16.	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR AUDITOR AND AUDITEE
          17.	NAVIGATE TO AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD:
          18.	SELECT AUDIT SCHEDULE
          19.	FILL STATUS: COMPLIANCE (WITH PROOF) OR NC (IF NON-COMPLIANT)
          20.	SAVE

CHECK:

ENSURE DAILY CHECKLIST ENTRIES ARE COMPLETED AND AUDITS LOGGED PROPERLY. REVIEW SCREENSHOTS AND ERP RECORDS.

 ACT:

HIGHLIGHT NON-COMPLIANCE TO CONCERNED TEAMS. ESCALATE REPEATED GAPS TO MANAGEMENT AND IMPROVE CHECKLIST FOLLOW-UP.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

DAILY OEE REPORT-ஐ PRODUCTION TEAM SEND பண்ணணும். QMS TEAM VERIFY பண்ணி CHECKLIST PROPER-A CLOSE பண்ணலானா DAILY AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ண வேண்டியது.

             1.	DAILY OEE REPORT CHECK பண்ணணும். எதாவது ABNORMAL கண்டிப்பா இருந்தா REASON EXPLAIN பண்ணி MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL பண்ணணும்.

             2.	TASK TYPE – COMPANY, EMPLOYEE – SURESH SELECT பண்ணி, DATE – YESTERDAY, STATUS – ALL நு SET பண்ணி SEARCH பண்ணணும்.
             3.	SEQ NO 179 CHECKLIST MAIL ATTACH பண்ணி PROPERLY CLOSE பண்ணிருக்கானு CHECK பண்ணி SCREENSHOT எடுக்கணும்.

AUDIT PROCESS:

             1.	ERP-ல QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE SCREEN OPEN பண்ணி:
                     O	ADD CLICK பண்ணி
                     O	AUDIT TYPE – SURPRISE
                     O	AUDIT DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணணும்
                     O	SAVE ஆனதும் ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணணும்
             2.	AUDIT OBSERVATION SCREEN-ல SCHEDULE NO SELECT பண்ணி OBSERVATION STATUS FILL பண்ணணும்.
                     O	PROPER ATTACH இருந்தா “COMPLIANCE”
                     O	இல்லனா “NC” பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணணும்.

CHECK:

CHECKLIST CLOSE PROPERLY ஆச்சா? SCREENSHOT ATTACH பண்ணிருக்காங்களா-NU DAILY-A CHECK பண்ணணும்.

ACT:

REPEATED NC இருந்தா, OBSERVATION REPORT READY பண்ணி MANAGEMENT-க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும். IMPROVEMENT ACTION எடுக்கணும்.

PLAN:

                       •	UPPERCASE LETTERS 
                       •	LOWERCASE LETTERS

                       •	SYMBOLS

             4.	IN ERP ADMIN MAIL, CLICK THE 9-DOT MENU AND OPEN ADMIN PORTAL.

             7.	REPEAT FOR ALL USERS.
             8.	USE ANY DESK/ULTRA VIEWER TO UPDATE PASSWORDS IN EACH EMPLOYEE’S SYSTEM.
             9.	AFTER COMPLETION, SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD LIST TO MANAGEMENT THROUGH MAIL.

PLAN:
EACH DIRECTOR IS ALLOCATED ₹3,00,000 PER ANNUM FOR PERSONAL REIMBURSEMENTS. HRA MUST INFORM DIRECTORS OF THE ALLOCATION BY THE 1ST WEEK OF APRIL YEARLY.

DO:
DIRECTORS SUBMIT VALID BILLS TO THE HRA TEAM. (ONLY TAX BILLS ARE VALID. MANUAL BILLS ARE NOT APPLICABLE)
HRA BOOKS BILLS IN THE OLD ERP UNDER "VOUCHER SCREEN".
ACCOUNTS TEAM PROCESSES PAYMENT DIRECTLY TO SUPPLIERS.  NO APPROVAL REQUIRED FROM MANAGEMENT TO PAY THIS PAYMENT
ANY UNUSED AMOUNT IS CARRIED FORWARD TO THE NEXT FINANCIAL YEAR.

CHECK:
HRA TEAM MAINTAINS RECORDS OF REIMBURSEMENTS PER DIRECTOR. MONTHLY STATUS REPORTS MUST BE REVIEWED FOR ACCURACY AND PENDING LIMITS.

ACT:
IF MISUSE OR ERRORS ARE IDENTIFIED, NOTIFY MANAGEMENT AND CORRECT THE ENTRIES. REVIEW POLICY ANNUALLY FOR UPDATES.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
COMPANY: DIRECTORS FEDUP.
USER (HRA, ACCOUNTS TEAM): DISPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN TO THE RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE.

HRA, OLD ERP-ல "VOUCHER SCREEN" USE பண்ணி BILLS-ஐ BOOK பண்ணணும்.
ACCOUNTS TEAM DIRECT ஆ SUPPLIERS-க்கு PAYMENT பண்ணணும். இந்த PAYMENT களுக்கு MANAGEMENT APPROVAL தேவையில்லை

Row:
  id = 8850
  seq_no = 914
  checking_point = IGST REFUND
  description = IGST REFUND

PLAN

RECEIVE EXPORT INVOICE FROM SALES. VERIFY FOR CORRECTNESS. RECEIVE SHIPPING BILL AND CHECK IF EXPORT IS UNDER LUT/BOND (NO IGST) OR WITH IGST PAYMENT.

DO

FILE GSTR-1: DECLARE EXPORTS IN TABLE 6A WITH CORRECT SHIPPING BILL, PORT CODE & FOB VALUE.
FILE GSTR-3B: SHOW UNDER ZERO-RATED. PAY IGST IF APPLICABLE.
SHIPPING BILL AUTO-PROCESSES REFUND VIA ICEGATE.


CHECK

CHECK REFUND STATUS IN ICEGATE. MATCH SHIPPING BILL WITH GSTR-1 & 3B. FIX MISMATCHES (INVOICE NO, PORT CODE, IGST).


ACT

REFUND WILL BE CREDITED TO REGISTERED BANK ACCOUNT. MAINTAIN RECORDS (INVOICE, SHIPPING BILL, BRC, RETURN COPY).
RAISE GRIEVANCE ON ICEGATE OR CONTACT GST OFFICER IF DELAYED.


IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:

• LOSS OF IGST REFUND
• FINANCIAL MISMATCH IN GST RETURNS
• DELAY IN WORKING CAPITAL RECOVERY

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

NON-COMPLIANCE OR DELAY OF THE ABOVE SOP WILL LEAD TO WARNING/MEMO. REPEATED ISSUES MAY AFFECT PERFORMANCE APPRAISAL.


PLAN

SALESல இருந்து EXPORT INVOICE வாங்கணும். அதுல எல்லாமே சரியா இருக்குனு CHECK பண்ணணும். SHIPPING BILL வாங்கி, LUT/BONDல EXPORT பண்ணறதா, இல்ல IGST PAY பண்ணி பண்ணறதான்னு CHECK பண்ணணும்.

DO

GSTR-1ல TABLE 6Aல EXPORT DETAILS DECLARE பண்ணணும் (SHIPPING BILL, PORT CODE சரியா இருக்கணும்).
GSTR-3Bல ZERO-RATED SUPPLIESல DECLARE பண்ணணும். IGST PAY பண்ணினா REFUNDக்கு APPLY ஆகும்.
ICEGATEல SHIPPING BILL AUTO REFUND PROCESS ஆகும்.

CHECK

ICEGATEல REFUND STATUS CHECK பண்ணணும். SHIPPING BILL INFO, GSTR-1 & 3B INFO MATCH ஆகணும். INVOICE NO, PORT CODE MISMATCH இருந்தா உடனே RECTIFY பண்ணணும்.

ACT

REFUND GSTல REGISTER பண்ணிருக்க BANK ACCOUNTக்கு வரும். INVOICE, SHIPPING BILL, BRC எல்லா DOCUMENTயும் MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.
DELAY இருந்தா ICEGATE GRIEVANCE RAISE பண்ணலாம். இல்ல OFFICERக்கு FOLLOW-UP பண்ணணும்.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:

• IGST REFUND MISS ஆகும்
• GST RETURNSல MISMATCH வரும்
• COMPANYக்கு WORKING CAPITAL DELAY ஆகும்

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

SOP FOLLOW பண்ணலனா WARNING/MEMO வரும். REPEAT ஆனா PERFORMANCE RATING IMPACT ஆகும்.

  seq_no = 915
  checking_point = MRM POINTS CIRCULATION
  description = MRM POINTS CIRCULATION

PLAN:

            TO ENSURE MONTHLY REVIEW MEETINGS (MRM) ARE PROPERLY SCHEDULED AND DOCUMENTED IN THE NEW ERP SYSTEM. BOTH THE SCHEDULE AND MEETING MINUTES SHOULD BE MAINTAINED DIGITALLY FOR RECORDS AND FOLLOW-UP ACTIONS.

DO:

             1.	CREATE MEETING SCHEDULE:
                     O	LOGIN TO NEW ERP → CLICK GREEN ARROW (LEFT) → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE.
                     O	CLICK ADD AND FILL IN: MEETING TYPE, DATE, FREQUENCY, START/END TIME, INTERVAL, DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS → SAVE.
             2.	MARK ATTENDANCE:
                     O	USE EITHER MOBILE OR WEB LOGIN TO MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH HOST AND PARTICIPANTS POST MEETING.
             3.	ADD MEETING MINUTES:
                     O	GO TO: ERP → GREEN ARROW → QMS → MEETING → MINUTES OF MEETING.
                     O	CLICK ADD, CHOOSE THE RELATED SCHEDULE NUMBER.
                     O	LEFT PANEL SHOWS PARTICIPANTS. USE + BUTTON TO ADD DISCUSSION POINTS.
                     O	FOR EACH POINT, MARK IT AS ACTION OR INFO, ASSIGN TO/FROM, SET TARGET DATE.
                     O	AFTER COMPLETING ENTRIES, UPDATE OUT TIME FOR ALL ATTENDEES AND SAVE.

CHECK:

               1.	VERIFY ALL FIELDS IN THE SCHEDULE AND MINUTES ARE FILLED.
               2.	CONFIRM ACTION POINTS ARE ASSIGNED CORRECTLY.
               3.	ENSURE ATTENDANCE IS FULLY MARKED.

ACT:

             1.	SHARE THE MINUTES PDF WITH MANAGEMENT FOR RECORD AND FOLLOW-UP.
             2.	TRACK THE TARGET DATES TO ENSURE CLOSURE.

TAMIL:

PLAN

               ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் MRM CONDUCT பண்ணனும். அதுக்கான SCHEDULE-ஐ NEW ERP-ல CREATE பண்ணனும். அதே மாதிரி MINUTES OF MEETING-ஐயும் UPDATE பண்ணனும்.

DO

             1.	LOGIN பண்ணுங்க NEW ERP-ல
             2.	LEFT SIDE GREEN ARROW CLICK பண்ணி → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE
             3.	"ADD" CLICK பண்ணி FILL பண்ணனும்:
                         • MEETING TYPE
                         • MEETING DATE, FREQUENCY
                         • START, INTERVAL & END TIME
                         • DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS
                         • SAVE பண்ணுங்க
              4.     ATTENDANCE MARK: SCHEDULE CREATE ஆகும் பிறகு ATTENDANCE UPDATE பண்ணனும். PARTICIPANTS & HOST இருவரும் ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணனும் (WEB/MOBILE).
              5.      MINUTES UPDATE STEPS
                     1.	QMS → MEETING DROPDOWN → MINUTES OF MEETING → "ADD"
                     2.	SCHEDULE NO SELECT பண்ணுங்க
                     3.	LEFT SIDE-ல் PARTICIPANTS LIST வரும்
             6.	BOTTOM-ல "+" BUTTON CLICK பண்ணி POINTS ADD பண்ணுங்க
             7.	ENTER POINT → SELECT (ACTION / INFO) → ASSIGN TO, ASSIGN BY, TARGET DATE
             8.	ATTENDANCE CLOSE பண்ணி "OUT TIME" UPDATE பண்ணனும்
             9.	FINAL-AH SAVE பண்ணுங்க

CHECK

               •	ALL POINTS PROPERLY ENTERED CHECK பண்ணனும்
               •	ATTENDANCE COMPLET UPDATE பண்ணியிருக்கணும்
 
ACT

               •	MISSED ATTENDANCE OR MISSING POINTS இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY RECTIFY பண்ணனும். NEXT MRM-LA REVIEW பண்ணலாம்.

  id = 8852
  seq_no = 916
  checking_point = BUSINESS CARD STOCK MAINTENANCE
  description = SOP FOR BUSINESS CARD STOCK MAINTENANCE

PLAN

MAINTAIN MONTHLY STOCK OF BUSINESS CARDS AS PER THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE.
MINIMUM STOCK SHOULD NOT FALL BELOW 40 NOS.
REORDER LEVEL: 40–70 NOS → RAISE PR & PO.
IF STOCK > 70 → NO PO REQUIRED.

PO TO BE RAISED WITH:
MINIMUM ORDER QTY (E.G. 200 NOS)
MASTER DESIGN TEMPLATE (SOFT COPY) SENT TO SUPPLIER
PROOF APPROVAL BEFORE PRINTING

DO

AFTER RECEIVING PRINTED CARDS:
MATCH QUANTITY WITH PO.
VERIFY CARD MATCHES MASTER IN QUALITY, SIZE, FONT, COLOR, LOGO.
IF ERRORS FOUND → REJECT & ASK FOR REPLACEMENT.

BOOK SUPPLIER BILL.
HAND OVER CARDS TO EMPLOYEE & GET SIGNATURE.
MAKE STOCK ISSUE ENTRY IN ERP & ATTACH ACKNOWLEDGEMENT.

CHECK

VERIFY CARD STOCK MONTHLY AS PER EXCEL.
COMPARE AVAILABLE STOCK WITH EXCEL SHEET.

IF DESIGN CHANGES HAPPEN:
GET MANAGEMENT APPROVAL FOR NEW DESIGN.
SEND MODIFIED SOFT COPY TO SUPPLIER.
APPROVE NEW PROOF BEFORE PRINTING.
VERIFY DESIGN CHANGES ARE CORRECTLY IMPLEMENTED.
REJECT AND ASK FOR REPLACEMENT IF MISMATCH.
KEEP ONE CARD AS "MASTER SAMPLE" FOR FUTURE REFERENCE.

ACT

MAINTAIN MASTER TEMPLATE AND SAMPLE CARDS IN CENTRAL LOCATION.
SEND MONTHLY STOCK VERIFICATION REPORT TO MANAGEMENT BY MAIL.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
DELAY IN ISSUING CARDS TO EMPLOYEES.
BRAND INCONSISTENCY DUE TO WRONG FONTS/COLORS/LOGOS.
WASTAGE OF PRINTING COST DUE TO ERROR CARDS.
POOR SUPPLIER COMMUNICATION CAUSING REWORK/DELAYS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:
IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN


PLAN

மாதந்தோறும் VISITING CARD STOCK-ஐ ATTACHED EXCEL FILE-க்கு BASE பண்ணி VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
குறைந்தபட்சம் 40 VISITING CARDS STOCK இருக்கணும்.
STOCK 40–70 RANGE-இல் இருந்தா PR & PO RAISE பண்ணணும்.
STOCK 70க்கும் மேல் இருந்தா PO வேணாம்.

PO RAISE பண்ணும் போது:

MINIMUM ORDER QTY (உதாரணம் 200 NOS) INCLUDE பண்ணணும்.
MASTER DESIGN TEMPLATE SOFT COPY SUPPLIER-க்கு அனுப்பணும்.
PRINTINGக்கு முன் PROOF-ஐ RECEIVE பண்ணி APPROVAL கொடுக்கணும்.

DO

PRINTED CARDS வந்ததுக்கப்புறம்:
QTY PO-க்கு MATCH ஆகிறதா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
MASTER SAMPLE-ஐ REFER பண்ணி QUALITY, SIZE, FONT, COLOR, LOGO எல்லாம் MATCH ஆகிறதா VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
ஏதாவது தவறு இருந்தா REJECT பண்ணி IMMEDIATE REPLACEMENT கேக்கணும்.

SUPPLIER BILL-ஐ BOOK பண்ணணும்.
EMPLOYEE-க்கு CARD கொடுத்து SIGNATURE வாங்கணும்.
ERP-ல STOCK ISSUE ENTRY பண்ணி, ACKNOWLEDGMENT ATTACH பண்ணணும்.

CHECK

மாதா மாதம் EXCEL SHEET-படி STOCK-ஐ VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
AVAILABLE STOCK-ஐ EXCEL-ஓட COMPARE பண்ணணும்.

DESIGN CHANGE இருந்தா:
MANAGEMENT-இன் APPROVAL வாங்கணும்.
MODIFIED SOFT COPY SUPPLIER-க்கு அனுப்பணும்.
NEW PROOF-ஐ APPROVE பண்ணணும்.
DESIGN CHANGE CORRECT-ஆ IMPLEMENT ஆயிருக்கா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
MATCH ஆகலனா REJECT பண்ணி REPLACEMENT கேக்கணும்.
FUTURE REFERENCE-க்காக ஒரு CARD-ஐ “MASTER SAMPLE”-ஆ வைச்சுக்கணும்.

ACT

MASTER TEMPLATE-ஐ மற்றும் SAMPLE CARDS-ஐ CENTRALIZED-ஆ STORE பண்ணணும்.
STOCK VERIFICATION REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL பண்ணணும் (MONTHLY).
PROCESS-ஐ QUARTER-க்கு ONCE REVIEW பண்ணி IMPROVEMENTS பாக்கணும்.

FOLLOW பண்ணலனா என்ன IMPACT?

EMPLOYEE-க்கு VISITING CARD LATE ஆகிடும்.
FONT/LOGO/COLOR MISMATCH-னா BRAND IMAGE கெட்ட REPUTATION.
WASTE ஆகிற PRINT COST.
SUPPLIER-ஓட CONFUSION & DELAY.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

  id = 8853
  seq_no = 917
  checking_point = PENDING FOR INVOICE AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS
  description = PENDING FOR INVOICE AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS

PLAN:

                  WE NEED TO CONDUCT A SURPRISE AUDIT TO VERIFY PENDING INVOICE ENTRIES UNDER BOTH PO INWARD AND JO INWARD CATEGORIES TO ENSURE BILLING ACCURACY AND AVOID DELAYS.

DO:

             1.	GET PENDING LIST FROM OLD ERP:
                      O	LOGIN TO OLD ERP
                      O	GO TO: MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED
                      O	SET DATE RANGE (FROM 2 DAYS PRIOR) → CLICK SEARCH
                      O	EXPORT THE VISIBLE PENDING ENTRIES TO EXCEL
             2.	SCHEDULE AUDIT IN NEW ERP:
                      O	GO TO: LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE
                      O	CLICK ADD → SELECT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT
                      O	ENTER: DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA
                      O	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH PARTIES
             3.	RAISE AUDIT OBSERVATIONS:
                      O	GO TO: AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD
                      O	SELECT THE SCHEDULED AUDIT
                      O	ENTER STATUS AS COMPLIANCE (WITH PROOF) OR NC (NON-CONFORMANCE)
                      O	SAVE THE OBSERVATION

CHECK:

               •	VERIFY AUDIT COMPLETION
               •	REVIEW OBSERVATION STATUS (COMPLIANCE/NC)
               •	CROSS-CHECK PENDING ENTRIES AGAINST OBSERVATION REMARKS

ACT:

               •	FOR NCS: ESCALATE TO CONCERNED DEPARTMENTS FOR IMMEDIATE CORRECTION
               •	FOR REPEAT ISSUES: PROPOSE PREVENTIVE ACTION IN NEXT MRM
               •	SHARE AUDIT SUMMARY WITH MANAGEMENT


TAMIL:

PLAN (திட்டமிடு):

                 PO INWARD மற்றும் JO INWARD ஆகிய இரண்டிலும் INVOICE RAISE ஆகாத INWARD ENTRIES மீது SURPRISE AUDIT நடத்த வேண்டும். இதன் மூலம் BILLING DELAY மற்றும் தவறுகள் தவிர்க்கலாம்.

DO (செயல்):

             1.	OLD ERP-லிருந்து PENDING LIST எடுக்க:
                     O	OLD ERP-ல LOGIN செய்யவும்
                     O	MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED செல்லவும்
                     O	தேதி 2 நாள் முன் வரை வைக்கவும் → SEARCH செய்யவும்
                     O	கிடைக்கும் PENDING ENTRIES-ஐ EXCEL-ஆக EXPORT செய்யவும்
             2.	NEW ERP-ல் AUDIT SCHEDULE செய்ய:
                     O	LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE செல்லவும்
                     O	ADD கிளிக் செய்யவும்
                     O	AUDIT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA ஆகியவை உள்ளீடு செய்யவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்து AUDITOR மற்றும் AUDITEE இருவருக்கும் ATTENDANCE பதிவு செய்யவும்
             3.	AUDIT OBSERVATION பதிவு செய்ய:
                     O	AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD சென்று
                     O	SCHEDULE NUMBER தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	OBSERVATION STATUS: COMPLIANCE (PROOF உடன்) அல்லது NC என குறிப்பிடவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்யவும்

CHECK (சரிபார்):

               •	AUDIT முறையாக நடந்திருத்ததை உறுதி செய்யவும்
               •	OBSERVATION STATUS சரியாக உள்ளதா என்று பார்க்கவும்
               •	PENDING LIST மற்றும் OBSERVATION DATA-ஐ ஒப்பிட்டு VALIDATE செய்யவும் 

ACT (செயல் மேற்கொள்):

               •	NC இருந்தால் உடனடி ACTIONS-க்கு CONCERN DEPARTMENT-க்கு ESCALATE செய்யவும்
               •	மீண்டும் வரும் ISSUES-க்கு PREVENTIVE ACTION MRM-ல் முன்வைக்கவும்
               •	AUDIT REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL மூலம் SHARE செய்யவும்

PLAN

            TO ENSURE PROFESSIONAL AND CONSISTENT COMMUNICATION, WE NEED TO SEND THE "EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES" DOCUMENT TO ALL EMPLOYEES VIA EMAIL EVERY WEEK.

DO

             1.	LOGIN TO OLD ERP
             2.	GO TO QMS → QMS UPLOAD
             3.	IN DOCUMENT NAME, ENTER: EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES
             4.	SEARCH → DOWNLOAD THE LATEST REVISION

OPTION 2: ACCESS FROM ONEDRIVE

             1.	LOGIN TO ONEDRIVE USING ERP ADMIN MAIL ID
             2.	NAVIGATE TO MY FILES
             3.	LOCATE AND DOWNLOAD THE FILE: EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES

SEND MAIL

               •	OPEN EMAIL
               •	ATTACH THE DOWNLOADED FILE
               •	SEND TO GROUP MAIL: NUTECHFAMILY@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM

CHECK

               •	ENSURE THE LATEST REVISION OF THE FILE IS DOWNLOADED
               •	VERIFY THE FILE CONTENT BEFORE SENDING
               •	CHECK IF MAIL WAS SENT SUCCESSFULLY TO THE GROUP ID
               •	CONFIRM THAT ALL EMPLOYEES ARE INCLUDED IN THE GROUP

ACT

               •	IF ANY MISTAKE OR OUTDATED VERSION WAS SENT, RESEND CORRECTED MAIL IMMEDIATELY
               •	UPDATE THE DOCUMENT LOCATION OR VERSION IN ERP/ONEDRIVE IF NEEDED
               •	MAINTAIN A WEEKLY LOG OF SENT EMAILS FOR FUTURE AUDIT/REFERENCE

PLAN

                எல்லா EMPLOYEES கிட்டயும் PROFESSIONAL MAIL FOLLOW பண்ண சொல்லி "EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES" FILE ஒவ்வொரு வாரமும் MAIL பண்ணணும். FILE இருக்கு ERP QMS UPLOAD லயும், ONEDRIVE (ERP ADMIN) லயும்.

DO

ERP QMS UPLOAD ல இருந்து FILE எடுத்து:

             1.	OLD ERP ல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
             2.	QMS → QMS UPLOAD கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
             3.	DOCUMENT NAMEல EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES அப்படின்னு TYPE பண்ணி SEARCH பண்ணுங்க
             4.	LATEST REVISION FILE DOWNLOAD பண்ணுங்க

             2.	MY FILES ல போய் EMAIL ETIQUETTE RULES FILE கண்டுபிடிக்கங்க

               •	GROUP MAIL ID: NUTECHFAMILY@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM க்கு அனுப்புங்க

               •	MAIL CORRECT GROUP MAIL ID க்கு போச்சா CHECK பண்ணி CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க

ACT

               •	ERP OR ONEDRIVE ல LATEST VERSION UPDATE பண்ண முடியாதா CHECK பண்ணி UPDATE பண்ணுங்க
               •	WEEKLY MAIL LOG MAINTAIN பண்ணுங்க AUDIT PURPOSE காக

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM UMAPATHY.
VERIFY THE MAIL FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, AND REASON.
ENSURE THAT UMAPATHY’S APPROVAL IS CLEARLY MENTIONED IN THE MAIL.

DO
LOG IN TO THE OLD ERP SYSTEM.
NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT
IF THE MAIL LACKS REQUIRED DETAILS, REPLY TO THE USER REQUESTING COMPLETE INFORMATION.
IF APPROVAL FROM UMAPATHY IS NOT MENTIONED, REPLY ASKING THE USER TO GET APPROVAL AND RESEND THE MAIL.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
UMAPATHY இருந்து MAIL வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON CORRECTா இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
ENSURE APPROVAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MAIL AS "UMAPATHY".
APPROVAL UMAPATHY எடுக்கனும்.
LOGIN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL.
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM A NEW ENTRY IS CREATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL WITH THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, UMAPATHY APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

  seq_no = 920
  checking_point = BUSINESS CARD STOCK MAINTENANCE
  description = SOP FOR BUSINESS CARD STOCK MAINTENANCE

PLAN 

MAINTAIN MONTHLY STOCK OF BUSINESS CARDS AS PER THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE.
MINIMUM STOCK SHOULD NOT FALL BELOW 40 NOS.
REORDER LEVEL: 40–70 NOS → RAISE PR & PO.
IF STOCK > 70 → NO PO REQUIRED.

PO TO BE RAISED WITH:
MINIMUM ORDER QTY (E.G. 200 NOS)
MASTER DESIGN TEMPLATE (SOFT COPY) SENT TO SUPPLIER
PROOF APPROVAL BEFORE PRINTING

DO

AFTER RECEIVING PRINTED CARDS:
MATCH QUANTITY WITH PO.
VERIFY CARD MATCHES MASTER IN QUALITY, SIZE, FONT, COLOR, LOGO.
IF ERRORS FOUND → REJECT & ASK FOR REPLACEMENT.

BOOK SUPPLIER BILL.
HAND OVER CARDS TO EMPLOYEE & GET SIGNATURE.
MAKE STOCK ISSUE ENTRY IN ERP & ATTACH ACKNOWLEDGEMENT.

CHECK

VERIFY CARD STOCK MONTHLY AS PER EXCEL.
COMPARE AVAILABLE STOCK WITH EXCEL SHEET.

IF DESIGN CHANGES HAPPEN:
GET MANAGEMENT APPROVAL FOR NEW DESIGN.
SEND MODIFIED SOFT COPY TO SUPPLIER.
APPROVE NEW PROOF BEFORE PRINTING.
VERIFY DESIGN CHANGES ARE CORRECTLY IMPLEMENTED.
REJECT AND ASK FOR REPLACEMENT IF MISMATCH.
KEEP ONE CARD AS "MASTER SAMPLE" FOR FUTURE REFERENCE.

ACT

MAINTAIN MASTER TEMPLATE AND SAMPLE CARDS IN CENTRAL LOCATION.
SEND MONTHLY STOCK VERIFICATION REPORT TO MANAGEMENT BY MAIL.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED:
DELAY IN ISSUING CARDS TO EMPLOYEES.
BRAND INCONSISTENCY DUE TO WRONG FONTS/COLORS/LOGOS.
WASTAGE OF PRINTING COST DUE TO ERROR CARDS.
POOR SUPPLIER COMMUNICATION CAUSING REWORK/DELAYS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:
IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN


PLAN

மாதந்தோறும் VISITING CARD STOCK-ஐ ATTACHED EXCEL FILE-க்கு BASE பண்ணி VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
குறைந்தபட்சம் 40 VISITING CARDS STOCK இருக்கணும்.
STOCK 40–70 RANGE-இல் இருந்தா PR & PO RAISE பண்ணணும்.
STOCK 70க்கும் மேல் இருந்தா PO வேணாம்.

PO RAISE பண்ணும் போது:

MINIMUM ORDER QTY (உதாரணம் 200 NOS) INCLUDE பண்ணணும்.
MASTER DESIGN TEMPLATE SOFT COPY SUPPLIER-க்கு அனுப்பணும்.
PRINTINGக்கு முன் PROOF-ஐ RECEIVE பண்ணி APPROVAL கொடுக்கணும்.

DO

PRINTED CARDS வந்ததுக்கப்புறம்:
QTY PO-க்கு MATCH ஆகிறதா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
MASTER SAMPLE-ஐ REFER பண்ணி QUALITY, SIZE, FONT, COLOR, LOGO எல்லாம் MATCH ஆகிறதா VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
ஏதாவது தவறு இருந்தா REJECT பண்ணி IMMEDIATE REPLACEMENT கேக்கணும்.

SUPPLIER BILL-ஐ BOOK பண்ணணும்.
EMPLOYEE-க்கு CARD கொடுத்து SIGNATURE வாங்கணும்.
ERP-ல STOCK ISSUE ENTRY பண்ணி, ACKNOWLEDGMENT ATTACH பண்ணணும்.

CHECK

மாதா மாதம் EXCEL SHEET-படி STOCK-ஐ VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
AVAILABLE STOCK-ஐ EXCEL-ஓட COMPARE பண்ணணும்.

DESIGN CHANGE இருந்தா:
MANAGEMENT-இன் APPROVAL வாங்கணும்.
MODIFIED SOFT COPY SUPPLIER-க்கு அனுப்பணும்.
NEW PROOF-ஐ APPROVE பண்ணணும்.
DESIGN CHANGE CORRECT-ஆ IMPLEMENT ஆயிருக்கா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
MATCH ஆகலனா REJECT பண்ணி REPLACEMENT கேக்கணும்.
FUTURE REFERENCE-க்காக ஒரு CARD-ஐ “MASTER SAMPLE”-ஆ வைச்சுக்கணும்.

ACT

MASTER TEMPLATE-ஐ மற்றும் SAMPLE CARDS-ஐ CENTRALIZED-ஆ STORE பண்ணணும்.
STOCK VERIFICATION REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL பண்ணணும் (MONTHLY).
PROCESS-ஐ QUARTER-க்கு ONCE REVIEW பண்ணி IMPROVEMENTS பாக்கணும்.

FOLLOW பண்ணலனா என்ன IMPACT?

EMPLOYEE-க்கு VISITING CARD LATE ஆகிடும்.
FONT/LOGO/COLOR MISMATCH-னா BRAND IMAGE கெட்ட REPUTATION.
WASTE ஆகிற PRINT COST.
SUPPLIER-ஓட CONFUSION & DELAY.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

  checking_point = INWARD NOT BILLED PO & JO (PENDING FOR INVOICE) AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS
  description = INWARD NOT BILLED PO & JO (PENDING FOR INVOICE) AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS

PLAN:

                  WE NEED TO CONDUCT A SURPRISE AUDIT TO VERIFY PENDING INVOICE ENTRIES UNDER BOTH PO INWARD AND JO INWARD CATEGORIES TO ENSURE BILLING ACCURACY AND AVOID DELAYS.

DO:

             1.	GET PENDING LIST FROM OLD ERP:
                      O	LOGIN TO OLD ERP
                      O	GO TO: MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED
                      O	SET DATE RANGE (FROM 2 DAYS PRIOR) → CLICK SEARCH
                      O	EXPORT THE VISIBLE PENDING ENTRIES TO EXCEL
             2.	SCHEDULE AUDIT IN NEW ERP:
                      O	GO TO: LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE
                      O	CLICK ADD → SELECT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT
                      O	ENTER: DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA
                      O	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH PARTIES
             3.	RAISE AUDIT OBSERVATIONS:
                      O	GO TO: AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD
                      O	SELECT THE SCHEDULED AUDIT
                      O	ENTER STATUS AS COMPLIANCE (WITH PROOF) OR NC (NON-CONFORMANCE)
                      O	SAVE THE OBSERVATION

CHECK:

               •	VERIFY AUDIT COMPLETION
               •	REVIEW OBSERVATION STATUS (COMPLIANCE/NC)
               •	CROSS-CHECK PENDING ENTRIES AGAINST OBSERVATION REMARKS

ACT:

               •	FOR NCS: ESCALATE TO CONCERNED DEPARTMENTS FOR IMMEDIATE CORRECTION
               •	FOR REPEAT ISSUES: PROPOSE PREVENTIVE ACTION IN NEXT MRM
               •	SHARE AUDIT SUMMARY WITH MANAGEMENT


TAMIL:

PLAN (திட்டமிடு):

                 PO INWARD மற்றும் JO INWARD ஆகிய இரண்டிலும் INVOICE RAISE ஆகாத INWARD ENTRIES மீது SURPRISE AUDIT நடத்த வேண்டும். இதன் மூலம் BILLING DELAY மற்றும் தவறுகள் தவிர்க்கலாம்.

DO (செயல்):

             1.	OLD ERP-லிருந்து PENDING LIST எடுக்க:
                     O	OLD ERP-ல LOGIN செய்யவும்
                     O	MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED செல்லவும்
                     O	தேதி 2 நாள் முன் வரை வைக்கவும் → SEARCH செய்யவும்
                     O	கிடைக்கும் PENDING ENTRIES-ஐ EXCEL-ஆக EXPORT செய்யவும்
             2.	NEW ERP-ல் AUDIT SCHEDULE செய்ய:
                     O	LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE செல்லவும்
                     O	ADD கிளிக் செய்யவும்
                     O	AUDIT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA ஆகியவை உள்ளீடு செய்யவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்து AUDITOR மற்றும் AUDITEE இருவருக்கும் ATTENDANCE பதிவு செய்யவும்
             3.	AUDIT OBSERVATION பதிவு செய்ய:
                     O	AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD சென்று
                     O	SCHEDULE NUMBER தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	OBSERVATION STATUS: COMPLIANCE (PROOF உடன்) அல்லது NC என குறிப்பிடவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்யவும்

CHECK (சரிபார்):

               •	AUDIT முறையாக நடந்திருத்ததை உறுதி செய்யவும்
               •	OBSERVATION STATUS சரியாக உள்ளதா என்று பார்க்கவும்
               •	PENDING LIST மற்றும் OBSERVATION DATA-ஐ ஒப்பிட்டு VALIDATE செய்யவும் 

ACT (செயல் மேற்கொள்):

               •	NC இருந்தால் உடனடி ACTIONS-க்கு CONCERN DEPARTMENT-க்கு ESCALATE செய்யவும்
               •	மீண்டும் வரும் ISSUES-க்கு PREVENTIVE ACTION MRM-ல் முன்வைக்கவும்
               •	AUDIT REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL மூலம் SHARE செய்யவும்

PLAN

              WE NEED TO MONITOR ALL PASSWORDS USED ACROSS OUR WEBSITES. IF ANY PASSWORD IS CHANGED OR UPDATED, IT MUST BE IMMEDIATELY SHARED WITH MR. SIVARAMAN AND UPDATED IN THE ERP PASSWORD LIST. A CHECKLIST IS MAINTAINED WITH AN ATTACHED PASSWORD & WEBSITE EXCEL SHEET.

DO

MONITORING & REPORTING:

             1.	IF YOU UPDATE OR CHANGE ANY PASSWORD FOR A WEBSITE UNDER YOUR CONTROL
             2.	IMMEDIATELY SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD VIA EMAIL TO MR. SIVARAMAN OR TO DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM
             3.	USE THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE IN THE CHECKLIST AS A REFERENCE FOR WEBSITE AND PASSWORD DETAILS

               •	ENSURE THAT THE ERP PASSWORD LIST IS UPDATED WITH THE REVISED PASSWORD
               •	MAINTAIN ACCURATE RECORDS FOR AUDIT AND SECURITY COMPLIANCE

               •	CONFIRM WHETHER THE UPDATED PASSWORD WAS PROPERLY SENT TO SIVARAMAN SIR OR THE DIGITECH MAIL
               •	CHECK IF THE ERP PASSWORD LIST HAS BEEN CORRECTLY UPDATED
               •	VERIFY THE CHECKLIST FILE TO MAKE SURE NO UPDATE IS MISSED

               •	IF ANY UPDATE WAS MISSED, SEND THE MAIL IMMEDIATELY AND UPDATE ERP
               •	AVOID DUPLICATE ENTRIES IN THE PASSWORD LIST
               •	PLAN A MONTHLY PASSWORD LIST AUDIT FOR ACCURACY AND TRACKING

TAMIL

PLAN

             நாம பயன்படுத்துற எல்லா WEBSITES-கும் உண்டான PASSWORDS ஏதாவது UPDATE ஆனா, அதை IMMEDIATE-ஆ SIVARAMAN SIR கிட்ட இல்லனா DIGITECH கிட்ட SHARE பண்ணி, ERPல PASSWORD LIST-லயும் UPDATE பண்ணணும். இந்த CHECKLIST-ல PASSWORD & WEBSITE DETAILS ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கு.

DO

PASSWORD UPDATE MONITORING:

             1.	உங்க CONTROL-ல இருக்குற எந்த ஒரு WEBSITE-ல PASSWORD CHANGE பண்ணினாலும்
             2.	அந்த NEW PASSWORD-ஐ MAIL-ல SIVARAMAN SIR கிட்ட இல்லனா DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM க்கு FORWARD பண்ணணும்
             3.	CHECKLIST-க்கு ATTACHED EXCEL FILE-ல WEBSITE & PASSWORD LIST ALREADY இருக்கு – அதை REFERENCE-A வைக்கலாம்

ERP PASSWORD LIST UPDATE:

               •	ERP-ல இருக்கும் PASSWORD LIST-யும் LATEST UPDATE-க்கு MATCH ஆக UPDATE பண்ணணும்
               •	CONSISTENCY MAINTAIN பண்ணணும் FOR AUDIT & SECURITY PURPOSE

CHECK

               •	UPDATED PASSWORD SIVARAMAN SIR OR DIGITECH MAIL ID-க்கு PROPERLY அனுப்பினீங்களா CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP PASSWORD LIST-ல CORRECT ENTRY ADDED-A CHECK பண்ணுங்க
               •	CHECKLIST-ல ATTACHED FILE VERIFY பண்ணி UPDATE MISS பண்ணலனு ENSURE பண்ணுங்க

ACT

               •	MISSED UPDATES இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY MAIL பண்ணி RECTIFY பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP-ல யாரும் DUPLICATE ENTRY CREATE பண்ணாம LOOK OUT பண்ணுங்க
               •	MONTHLY ONCE PASSWORD LIST AUDIT செய்யவும் PLANNING பண்ணுங்க

  seq_no = 923
  checking_point = STORE LOCATION MAIL UPDATE
  description = STORE LOCATION MAIL UPDATE

PLAN:

STORES TEAM TO CHECK AND VERIFY LOCATION WHILE MAKING PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
IF LOCATION IS NOT FOUND IN ERP, IDENTIFY A NEW PHYSICAL LOCATION IN THE STORE AND NOTE IT DOWN.

DO:

STORES TEAM:

MAKE PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
GO TO STOCK SUMMARY IN ERP.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ENTER ITEM CODE IN THE SEARCH FIELD → CLICK LOAD.
CHECK THE RACK & BIN LOCATION IN THE LINE ITEM.
PLACE THE ITEM IN THE SAME RACK & BIN LOCATION AS SHOWN IN ERP.

IF LOCATION IS NOT AVAILABLE, PLACE THE ITEM IN A NEW LOCATION, AND SEND A MAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH:
ITEM CODE
NEW RACK LOCATION
NEW BIN LOCATION

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

OPEN ERP → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM
EDIT THE ITEM BY ENTERING ITEM CODE		
GO TO “INVENTORY INFORMATION” SECTION
UPDATE RACK & BIN FIELDS WITH NEW LOCATION
REPLY TO STORES TEAM WITH SUBJECT: “LOCATION UPDATED”

CHECK:
DEPARTMENT HEAD TO RANDOMLY AUDIT WHETHER ITEM IS PLACED IN UPDATED ERP LOCATION.
ERP-ADMIN TO VERIFY MAIL TRAIL AND ERP ENTRY LOG WEEKLY.

ACT:
IF ITEM IS NOT PLACED IN THE CORRECT ERP LOCATION:
IMPACT TO COMPANY:

TIME WASTED DURING ITEM RETRIEVAL.
DELAY IN PRODUCTION OR DELIVERY.
MISCOMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEPARTMENTS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN



PLAN:
STORES TEAM PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY பண்ணும்போது ERP-ல ITEM LOCATION CHECK பண்ணணும்.
ERP-ல LOCATION இல்லனா, புது LOCATION FIX பண்ணி, அது NOTE பண்ணிக்கணும்.

DO:
STORES TEAM:

PO/JO INWARD ENTRY ERP-ல பண்ணணும்.
STOCK SUMMARY-க்கு போங்க.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ITEM CODE-ஐ SEARCH FIELD-ல TYPE பண்ணி → LOAD கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க.
LINE ITEM-ல வரும் RACK & BIN LOCATION பாருங்க.
ERP-ல காட்டுற LOCATION-க்கே ITEM வைச்சிடுங்க.

LOCATION தெரியலனா, புது LOCATION-ல வைச்சிட்டு, கீழ்கண்ட DETAILS-ஓட  ERP ADMIN-க்கு MAIL அனுப்பணும்:

ITEM CODE
புது LOCATION NAME

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

ERP OPEN பண்ணி → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM SELECT பண்ணணும்.
ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணி EDIT செய்யணும்.

INVENTORY INFORMATION SECTION-க்கு போய்:
RACK & BIN FIELDS இரண்டிலும் PUDHU LOCATION UPDATE பண்ணணும்.
STORES TEAM-க்கு "LOCATION UPDATED"னு MAIL REPLY பண்ணணும்: 

CHECK:
ERP ADMIN WEEKLY ONCE MAIL TRAIL VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

ACT:
சரியான LOCATION-ல ITEM இல்லன்னா:
COMPANY-க்கு IMPACT:

ITEM தேட நேரம் வீணாகும்.
PRODUCTION/DELIVERY DELAY ஆகும்.
DEPARTMENT-க்குள் MISUNDERSTANDING வரும்.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN
