Row:
  id = 8860
  seq_no = 924
  checking_point = TDS RETURN FILING
  description = TDS RETURN FILING SOP


PLAN (STARTED)

Identify TDS applicable suppliers.
Collect PAN details.
Prepare Excel with PAN, Section, TDS Payable.

Timeline based on quarter:
Jan–Mar → 31st May
Apr–Jun → 31st July
Jul–Sep → 31st Oct
Oct–Dec → 31st Jan


DO (50% WORK COMPLETION)

Verify TDS entries daily (CHECKLIST Seq No. 735).
Ensure monthly payment (every 7th – CHECKLIST Seq No. 64).
Mail Excel to Auditor.
Follow up for successful return filing.
Support auditor for issues (PAN-Aadhaar not linked, PAN not registered).
If supplier delays, proceed with return leaving them & correct later.
Collect Form 16 → Mail to suppliers.
Attach TDS certificate in ERP.


CHECK (75% WORK COMPLETION)

Check filing status with auditor.
Confirm certificates sent to the suppliers
Confirm ERP voucher entry attachment


ACT (100% WORK COMPLETION)

If delay/miss found, take corrective action & update entries.
Make 100% completion entry in Renewal point & mention next renewal date

Impact to Company:
Non-compliance leads to penalties from Income Tax Dept.
Delays in returns reduce supplier trust & compliance rating.

Disciplinary Action:
If the above SOP not followed, disciplinary actions will be taken


PLAN (STARTED)

TDS applicable suppliers-ஐ identify பண்ணணும்
எல்லா suppliers-லையும் PAN number collect பண்ணணும்
PAN, Section, Payable சேர்த்து Excel prepare பண்ணணும்

Quarter  based filing dates:
Jan–Mar – May 31
Apr–Jun – July 31
Jul–Sep – Oct 31
Oct–Dec – Jan 31

DO (50% WORK COMPLETION)

TDS entries daily verify பண்ணணும் (CHECKLIST Seq No. 735)
Payment entries monthly 7th date-க்குள்ள complete பண்ணணும் (CHECKLIST Seq No. 64)
Excel auditor-க்கு mail பண்ணணும்
Return filed status confirm பண்ணணும்
Auditor raise பண்ணும் issues like PAN-Aadhaar link இல்லாமல் or PAN not registered – resolve support கொடுக்கணும்
Supplier delay ஆகுறதுனால return miss ஆகக்கூடாது. Leave பண்ணி file பண்ணி later correction பண்ணணும்
Form 16 auditor-கிட்ட இருந்து வாங்கி supplier-க்கு mail பண்ணணும்
ERP-ல TDS certificate attach பண்ணணும்

CHECK (75% WORK COMPLETION)

Filing done-னு confirm பண்ணணும்
Certificates mail பண்ணியத check பண்ணணும்

ACT (100% WORK COMPLETION)

Delay/miss-னா immediately correct பண்ணி entries update பண்ணணும்
Renewal point ல 100% completion entry பண்ணனும். Next renewal date ஐ mention பண்ணனும்

IMPACT: Filing miss ஆகும்போது penalty வரும், supplier trust affect ஆகும்
If the above SOP not followed, disciplinary actions will be taken

  seq_no = 925
  checking_point = QCP & DRAWING AVAILABILITY VERIFICATION FOR RUNNING ITEMS (DRM REVIEW ITEMS)
  description = QCP & DRAWING AVAILABILITY VERIFICATION FOR RUNNING ITEMS (DRM REVIEW ITEMS)

PLAN

WEEKLY, GET THE DRM EXCEL SHEET FROM ERP.
IDENTIFY ALL ITEMS LISTED IN THE DRM REVIEW.
GET THE BOM (BILL OF MATERIALS) FOR EACH ITEM FROM ERP.
CLASSIFY BOM INTO PURCHASE ITEMS AND MANUFACTURING ITEMS.

INCASE LIST OF ITEMS ARE MORE THAN 10, USE ERP - MATERIAL PLANNING SCREEN

DO

DRAWING AVAILABILITY:
CHECK IF DRAWING/DATA SHEET/SPECIFICATION IS AVAILABLE IN ERP → ITEM MASTER, FOR PURCHASE ITEMS AND MANUFACTURING ITEMS
IF NOT FOUND, MAIL THE DD TEAM REQUESTING THE REQUIRED DOCUMENTS AND ENSURE UPLOAD IN ERP.

QCP AVAILABILITY:
CHECK FOR QCP IN ERP → QUALITY PLAN.
IF FOUND, VERIFY QCP WITH DRAWING/SPECIFICATION REQUIREMENTS.
IF INCOMPLETE/INCORRECT, UPDATE QCP OR INFORM DD TEAM FOR CORRECTION.
IF QCP NOT FOUND, CREATE IT OR REQUEST DD TEAM TO CREATE IT.

CHECK

CROSS-VERIFY UPDATED ITEM MASTER AND QUALITY PLAN TO ENSURE DRAWING AND QCP ARE UPLOADED CORRECTLY.

ENSURE AVAILABILITY:
BEFORE PO RELEASE FOR PURCHASE ITEMS.
BEFORE FIRST PROCESS START FOR MANUFACTURING ITEMS.

ACT

MAINTAIN A WEEKLY CHECKLIST OF REVIEWED ITEMS AND ACTIONS TAKEN.
ESCALATE TO DEPARTMENT HEAD IF DATA IS MISSING FOR MORE THAN ONE CYCLE.

IMPACT IF NOT FOLLOWED

DELAY IN PRODUCTION OR PURCHASE
QUALITY ISSUES DUE TO MISSING OR INCORRECT DATA
CUSTOMER DISSATISFACTION AND RISK OF REJECTION
UNPLANNED COSTS DUE TO REWORK

DISCIPLINARY ACTION

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN



PLAN

WEEKLY-ஆ, ERP-லிருந்து DRM EXCEL SHEET எடுக்கணும்.
அந்த DRM-ல் REVIEW பண்ணப்பட்ட ITEMS-ஐ IDENTIFY பண்ணணும்.
அந்த ITEMS-க்கு ERP-லிருந்து BOM எடுக்கணும்.
BOM-ஐ CLASSIFY பண்ணணும் – PURCHASE ITEMS & MANUFACTURING ITEMS.

DO

DRAWING AVAILABILITY:
ITEM MASTER-ல DRAWING / DATA SHEET / SPECIFICATION இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
இல்லாதபோது, DD TEAM-க்கு MAIL அனுப்பி, அந்த DATA-வ ERP-ல UPLOAD பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

QCP AVAILABILITY:

ERP → QUALITY PLAN-ல QCP இருக்குனா CHECK பண்ணணும்.
இருந்தா, DRAWING/SPECS-க்கு MATCH ஆகுதா VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
CORRECT ஆ இல்லன்னா, QCP-யே UPDATE பண்ணணும் / DD TEAM-க்கு CORRECT பண்ண சொல்லணும்.
QCP இல்லன்னா, CREATE பண்ணணும் அல்லது DD TEAM-க்கு CREATE பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

CHECK

ITEM MASTER & QUALITY PLAN-ல் CORRECTா DATA UPDATE ஆனதா CROSS-CHECK பண்ணணும்.

AVAILABILITY CONFIRM பண்ணணும்:
PURCHASE ITEMS-க்கு PO RELEASE-க்கு முன்னாடி.
MANUFACTURING ITEMS-க்கு FIRST PROCESS-க்கு முன்னாடி.

ACT

REVIEWED ITEMS-க்கும் ACTIONS TAKEN-க்கும் WEEKLY CHECKLIST MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.
MISSING DATA ஒரு CYCLE-க்கும் மேலா இருந்தா, DEPARTMENT HEAD-க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.

IMPACT

PRODUCTION / PURCHASE DELAY ஆகும்.
QUALITY PROBLEM வரும்.
CUSTOMER DISSATISFACTION, REJECTION CHANCES அதிகம்.
REWORK மற்றும் EXTRA COST ஏற்படும்.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

Row:
  id = 8862
  seq_no = 926
  checking_point = INWARD NOT BILLED PO & JO (PENDING FOR INVOICE) AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS
  description = INWARD NOT BILLED PO & JO (PENDING FOR INVOICE) AUDIT FOR ACCOUNTS

PLAN:

                  WE NEED TO CONDUCT A SURPRISE AUDIT TO VERIFY PENDING INVOICE ENTRIES UNDER BOTH PO INWARD AND JO INWARD CATEGORIES TO ENSURE BILLING ACCURACY AND AVOID DELAYS.

DO:

             1.	GET PENDING LIST FROM OLD ERP:
                      O	LOGIN TO OLD ERP
                      O	GO TO: MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED
                      O	SET DATE RANGE (FROM 2 DAYS PRIOR) → CLICK SEARCH
                      O	EXPORT THE VISIBLE PENDING ENTRIES TO EXCEL
             2.	SCHEDULE AUDIT IN NEW ERP:
                      O	GO TO: LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE
                      O	CLICK ADD → SELECT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT
                      O	ENTER: DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA
                      O	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH PARTIES
             3.	RAISE AUDIT OBSERVATIONS:
                      O	GO TO: AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD
                      O	SELECT THE SCHEDULED AUDIT
                      O	ENTER STATUS AS COMPLIANCE (WITH PROOF) OR NC (NON-CONFORMANCE)
                      O	SAVE THE OBSERVATION

CHECK:

               •	VERIFY AUDIT COMPLETION
               •	REVIEW OBSERVATION STATUS (COMPLIANCE/NC)
               •	CROSS-CHECK PENDING ENTRIES AGAINST OBSERVATION REMARKS

ACT:

               •	FOR NCS: ESCALATE TO CONCERNED DEPARTMENTS FOR IMMEDIATE CORRECTION
               •	FOR REPEAT ISSUES: PROPOSE PREVENTIVE ACTION IN NEXT MRM
               •	SHARE AUDIT SUMMARY WITH MANAGEMENT


TAMIL:

PLAN (திட்டமிடு):

                 PO INWARD மற்றும் JO INWARD ஆகிய இரண்டிலும் INVOICE RAISE ஆகாத INWARD ENTRIES மீது SURPRISE AUDIT நடத்த வேண்டும். இதன் மூலம் BILLING DELAY மற்றும் தவறுகள் தவிர்க்கலாம்.

DO (செயல்):

             1.	OLD ERP-லிருந்து PENDING LIST எடுக்க:
                     O	OLD ERP-ல LOGIN செய்யவும்
                     O	MIS → PURCHASE → INWARD NOT BILLED செல்லவும்
                     O	தேதி 2 நாள் முன் வரை வைக்கவும் → SEARCH செய்யவும்
                     O	கிடைக்கும் PENDING ENTRIES-ஐ EXCEL-ஆக EXPORT செய்யவும்
             2.	NEW ERP-ல் AUDIT SCHEDULE செய்ய:
                     O	LEFT ARROW → QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE செல்லவும்
                     O	ADD கிளிக் செய்யவும்
                     O	AUDIT TYPE: SURPRISE AUDIT தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	DATE, TIME, AUDITOR, AUDITEE, AUDIT CRITERIA ஆகியவை உள்ளீடு செய்யவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்து AUDITOR மற்றும் AUDITEE இருவருக்கும் ATTENDANCE பதிவு செய்யவும்
             3.	AUDIT OBSERVATION பதிவு செய்ய:
                     O	AUDIT OBSERVATION → ADD சென்று
                     O	SCHEDULE NUMBER தேர்வு செய்யவும்
                     O	OBSERVATION STATUS: COMPLIANCE (PROOF உடன்) அல்லது NC என குறிப்பிடவும்
                     O	SAVE செய்யவும்

CHECK (சரிபார்):

               •	AUDIT முறையாக நடந்திருத்ததை உறுதி செய்யவும்
               •	OBSERVATION STATUS சரியாக உள்ளதா என்று பார்க்கவும்
               •	PENDING LIST மற்றும் OBSERVATION DATA-ஐ ஒப்பிட்டு VALIDATE செய்யவும்

               •	மீண்டும் வரும் ISSUES-க்கு PREVENTIVE ACTION MRM-ல் முன்வைக்கவும்
               •	AUDIT REPORT-ஐ MANAGEMENT-க்கு MAIL மூலம் SHARE செய்யவும்

PLAN

              WE NEED TO MONITOR ALL PASSWORDS USED ACROSS OUR WEBSITES. IF ANY PASSWORD IS CHANGED OR UPDATED, IT MUST BE IMMEDIATELY SHARED WITH MR. SIVARAMAN AND UPDATED IN THE ERP PASSWORD LIST. A CHECKLIST IS MAINTAINED WITH AN ATTACHED PASSWORD & WEBSITE EXCEL SHEET.

DO

MONITORING & REPORTING:

             1.	IF YOU UPDATE OR CHANGE ANY PASSWORD FOR A WEBSITE UNDER YOUR CONTROL
             2.	IMMEDIATELY SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD VIA EMAIL TO MR. SIVARAMAN OR TO DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM
             3.	USE THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE IN THE CHECKLIST AS A REFERENCE FOR WEBSITE AND PASSWORD DETAILS

UPDATING IN ERP:

               •	ENSURE THAT THE ERP PASSWORD LIST IS UPDATED WITH THE REVISED PASSWORD
               •	MAINTAIN ACCURATE RECORDS FOR AUDIT AND SECURITY COMPLIANCE

CHECK

               •	CONFIRM WHETHER THE UPDATED PASSWORD WAS PROPERLY SENT TO SIVARAMAN SIR OR THE DIGITECH MAIL
               •	CHECK IF THE ERP PASSWORD LIST HAS BEEN CORRECTLY UPDATED
               •	VERIFY THE CHECKLIST FILE TO MAKE SURE NO UPDATE IS MISSED

ACT

               •	IF ANY UPDATE WAS MISSED, SEND THE MAIL IMMEDIATELY AND UPDATE ERP
               •	AVOID DUPLICATE ENTRIES IN THE PASSWORD LIST
               •	PLAN A MONTHLY PASSWORD LIST AUDIT FOR ACCURACY AND TRACKING

TAMIL

PLAN

             நாம பயன்படுத்துற எல்லா WEBSITES-கும் உண்டான PASSWORDS ஏதாவது UPDATE ஆனா, அதை IMMEDIATE-ஆ SIVARAMAN SIR கிட்ட இல்லனா DIGITECH கிட்ட SHARE பண்ணி, ERPல PASSWORD LIST-லயும் UPDATE பண்ணணும். இந்த CHECKLIST-ல PASSWORD & WEBSITE DETAILS ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கு.

             1.	உங்க CONTROL-ல இருக்குற எந்த ஒரு WEBSITE-ல PASSWORD CHANGE பண்ணினாலும்
             2.	அந்த NEW PASSWORD-ஐ MAIL-ல SIVARAMAN SIR கிட்ட இல்லனா DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM க்கு FORWARD பண்ணணும்
             3.	CHECKLIST-க்கு ATTACHED EXCEL FILE-ல WEBSITE & PASSWORD LIST ALREADY இருக்கு – அதை REFERENCE-A வைக்கலாம்

               •	ERP-ல இருக்கும் PASSWORD LIST-யும் LATEST UPDATE-க்கு MATCH ஆக UPDATE பண்ணணும்
               •	CONSISTENCY MAINTAIN பண்ணணும் FOR AUDIT & SECURITY PURPOSE

CHECK

               •	UPDATED PASSWORD SIVARAMAN SIR OR DIGITECH MAIL ID-க்கு PROPERLY அனுப்பினீங்களா CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP PASSWORD LIST-ல CORRECT ENTRY ADDED-A CHECK பண்ணுங்க
               •	CHECKLIST-ல ATTACHED FILE VERIFY பண்ணி UPDATE MISS பண்ணலனு ENSURE பண்ணுங்க

ACT

               •	MISSED UPDATES இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY MAIL பண்ணி RECTIFY பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP-ல யாரும் DUPLICATE ENTRY CREATE பண்ணாம LOOK OUT பண்ணுங்க
               •	MONTHLY ONCE PASSWORD LIST AUDIT செய்யவும் PLANNING பண்ணுங்க

  id = 8864
  seq_no = 928
  checking_point = ACCOUNTS SOP TEST
  description = ACCOUNTS SOP TEST

PLAN:

CONDUCT A MONTHLY SOP TEST FOR THE ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT VIA THE NEW ERP SYSTEM.

DO:

STEP 1: ADD QUESTIONS TO ERP

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP.
             2.	OPEN MENU → CLICK HRMS → OPEN TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY CATEGORY (SCR. 270) → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	GO TO COMPETENCY DETAILS (SCR. 362) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY → ENTER DETAILS → SELECT DEPARTMENT/DESIGNATION → SAVE.
             5.	GO TO QUESTION BANK (SCR. 366) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY/DETAIL → ENTER QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER → SAVE.

STEP 2: CONDUCT TEST

             1.	IN TRAINING DROPDOWN → OPEN QUESTION GROUP (SCR. 366) → SEARCH BY DEPARTMENT.
             2.	SELECT QUESTIONS → CLICK “CREATE QUESTION” → SAVE.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365) → ADD → SELECT EMPLOYEE → CATEGORY → SUB-CATEGORY → PROFICIENCY → PLAN ID → SAVE.
             4.	EMPLOYEE RECEIVES TEST MAIL WITH EXAM ID.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE TEST SUBMISSION

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGS INTO ERP → MENU → HRMS → USER ANSWER PAGE (SCR. 371).
             2.	ENTER EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID → CONFIRM → ANSWER & SUBMIT.

STEP 4: MAIL SCORE TO MANAGEMENT

             1.	LOGIN ERP → MENU → HRMS → COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365).
             2.	SEARCH EMPLOYEE → VIEW ANSWER → NOTE AVERAGE SCORE.
             3.	MAIL EMPLOYEE NAME AND SCORE TO MANAGEMENT, CC RELEVANT PARTICIPANTS.

CHECK:

ENSURE TEST CONDUCTED, ANSWERS SUBMITTED, SCORES RECORDED AND VERIFIED.

ACT:

REVIEW TEST RESULTS MONTHLY. IMPROVE QUESTION BANK AND TRAINING BASED ON GAPS.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் SOP TEST CONDUCT பண்ணணும் USING NEW ERP.

DO:

STEP 1: QUESTION ADD பண்ணனும்

             1.	NEW ERP-ல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க.
             2.	LEFT ARROW CLICK பண்ணி MENU OPEN பண்ணி HRMS → TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	SCREEN 270 – COMPETENCY CATEGORY OPEN பண்ணி → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	BACK போய் SCREEN 362 – COMPETENCY DETAILS OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY SELECT → DETAILS ENTER பண்ணி → DEPT/DESIGNATION SELECT → SAVE.
             5.	அப்புறம் SCREEN 366 – QUESTION BANK OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY/DETAIL SELECT → QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER ADD பண்ணி → SAVE.

STEP 2: TEST CONDUCT பண்ணனும்

             1.	SCREEN 366 – QUESTION GROUP-ல் DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஏற்ற QUESTION SELECT பண்ணி → CREATE QUESTION → SAVE.
             2.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → CATEGORY, SUB-CATEGORY, PROFICIENCY, PLAN ID SELECT பண்ணி → SAVE.
             3.	EMPLOYEE-க்கு EXAM ID MAIL-ல போகும்.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE ANSWER பண்ணனும்

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGIN பண்ணி → HRMS → SCREEN 371 – USER ANSWER PAGE.
             2.	EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID ENTER பண்ணி → CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க.
             3.	QUESTIONS LOAD ஆகும் → ANSWER பண்ணி SUBMIT பண்ணணும்.

STEP 4: SCORE MANAGEMENT-க்கு அனுப்பணும்

             1.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → VIEW ANSWER → SCORE கண்டுபிடிக்க.
             2.	EMAIL-ல் EMPLOYEE NAME & SCORE அனுப்பணும், CC-ல் PARTICIPANTS ADD பண்ணி அனுப்பணும்.

CHECK:

SUBMISSION COMPLETE-A, SCORE VERIFY பண்ணி CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

ACT:

EVERY MONTH RESULTS REVIEW பண்ணி, QUESTION BANK IMPROVE பண்ணுங்க.

  checking_point = SURPRISE AUDIT NUTECH (PRODUCTION) - WEEKLY
  description = SURPRISE AUDIT NUTECH (PRODUCTION) - WEEKLY

PLAN:

           TO ENSURE TIMELY PRODUCTION ENTRY ONCE THE PROCESS IS COMPLETED, WE NEED TO CONDUCT SURPRISE AUDITS IN THE PRODUCTION DEPARTMENT.

DO:

🔹 STEPS TO COLLECT CURRENT PROCESS MATERIAL INFO:

             1.	ASK PRODUCTION FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS NAME AND QUANTITY.
             2.	CHECK THE PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY IN THE OLD ERP.
             3.	GO TO OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             4.	ENTER THE ITEM CODE FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS ITEM.
             5.	COPY THE ROUTE SHEET NUMBER FROM THE SHOWN PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ SEARCH WITH THAT NUMBER.
             7.	VIEW THE PROCESS LIST, IDENTIFY THE PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME.
             8.	GO TO PRODUCTION ENTRY ➝ SEARCH WITH PROCESS NAME & ITEM CODE.
             9.	IF ENTRY IS AVAILABLE FOR THE SAME QTY & PROCESS ➝ MARK AS COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ MARK AS NC.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS ERP SCREEN AUDIT.
             3.	FILL DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             5.	GO TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ CLICK ADD ➝ SELECT AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             6.	BASED ON CRITERIA, IF OK ➝ MARK COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ NC.
             7.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND COMPARE WITH SYSTEM ENTRIES TO ENSURE ACCURACY.

ACT:

IF DELAYS OR MISSING ENTRIES ARE REPEATED, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND RAISE CAPA TO CORRECT THE ISSUE.

Tamil:

PLAN:

           PRODUCTION PROCESS COMPLETE ஆக்குற நேரத்துல PRODUCTION ENTRY SYSTEMல TIMELY CREATE பண்ணுறதுக்கு SURPRISE AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும். இது TIME ACCOUNTABILITY MAINTAIN பண்ணதுக்காக.

DO:

🔸 CURRENT PROCESS MATERIAL CHECK பண்ணுற STEPS:

             1.	PRODUCTION TEAM கிட்ட CURRENT PROCESS NAME & QTY கேளு.
             2.	OLD ERPல PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             3.	OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY LOGIN பண்ணு.
             4.	CURRENT PROCESS ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணு.
             5.	ENTRY SHOW ஆகுறது ROUTE SHEET NUMBER COPY பண்ணு.
             6.	PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ ROUTE SHEET NUMBER SEARCH பண்ணு.
             7.	PROCESS LIST SHOW ஆகும், PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME NOTE பண்ணு.
             8.	PRODUCTION ENTRY SCREENல PROCESS NAME + ITEM CODE வைச்சு SEARCH பண்ணு.
             9.	SAME QTY & PROCESS க்கு ENTRY இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
          10.	IRUNDHA “COMPLIANCE” MARK பண்ணு, இல்லனா “NC” போடு.

🔸 AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION CREATE PROCESS (NEW ERP):

             1.	NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ ADD
             2.	AUDIT TYPE – ERP SCREEN AUDIT SELECT பண்ணு.
             3.	AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணு.
             4.	SAVE பண்ணிட்டு, ATTENDANCE AUDITOR & AUDITEE க்கு MARK பண்ணு.
             5.	QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD ➝ SCHEDULE NUMBER SELECT பண்ணு.
             6.	CRITERIA BASE பண்ணி OBSERVATION STATUS: OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” பண்ணு.
             7.	SAVE.

CHECK:

     AUDIT OUTCOME & ERP ENTRY ACCURACY COMPARE பண்ணி REVIEW பண்ணணும்.

ACT:

  checking_point = SURPRISE AUDIT (DD) NUTECH
  description = SURPRISE AUDIT (DD) NUTECH

PLAN:

         TO ENSURE ALL DRAWING FILES IN DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEMS (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN) ARE PROPERLY UPLOADED TO ERP, PHYSICAL AUDITS MUST BE CONDUCTED REGULARLY.

DO:

🔹 STEPS FOR PHYSICAL AUDIT:

             1.	RANDOMLY SELECT ONE SYSTEM FROM THE DD DEPARTMENT.
             2.	CHECK C DRIVE, D DRIVE, DESKTOP, AND RECYCLE BIN FOR ANY DRAWING FILES.
             3.	IF A DRAWING FILE IS FOUND, OPEN IT WITH ASSISTANCE FROM THE DD TEAM AND COPY THE ITEM CODE.
             4.	OPEN OLD ERP ➝ MASTER ➝ ITEMS ➝ MANUFACTURING ITEMS / PURCHASE ITEMS.
             5.	SEARCH USING THE ITEM CODE AND GO TO THE ATTACHMENT SECTION.
             6.	CHECK IF THE DRAWING IS ATTACHED.
             7.	IF ATTACHED, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT FOUND, MARK AS NCR.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS “ERP SCREEN AUDIT”.
             3.	FILL IN THE DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, AND CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE THE SCHEDULE.
             5.	MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD.
             7.	SELECT THE AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             8.	REVIEW THE CRITERIA SHOWN.
             9.	IF THE CONDITION IS MET, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT, MARK AS NC.
          10.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND VERIFY THAT ALL DRAWING FILES ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED IN THE ERP SYSTEM.

ACT:

IF REPEATED NCRS ARE FOUND, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND IMPLEMENT CAPA TO ENSURE CONSISTENT COMPLIANCE.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

     DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEM DRIVES (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN)ல DRAWING FILES ERPல ATTACH ஆயிருச்சா CHECK பண்ண PERIODIC AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும்.

DO:

🔹 PHYSICAL AUDIT STEPS:

             1.	DD DEPARTMENTல இருந்த SYSTEMSல RANDOMLY ஒரே SYSTEM SELECT பண்ணு.
             2.	C DRIVE, D DRIVE, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BINல DRAWING FILE இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
             3.	DRAWING FILE இருந்தா, DD PERSON HELPல OPEN பண்ணி ITEM CODE COPY பண்ணு.
             4.	OLD ERP ➝ MASTER ➝ ITEMS ➝ MANUFACTURING / PURCHASE ITEMSக்கு போ.
             5.	ITEM CODE வைச்சு SEARCH பண்ணி ATTACHMENT SECTION OPEN பண்ணு.
             6.	DRAWING ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
             7.	ATTACHED இருந்தா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NCR” MARK பண்ணு.

🔹 AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION (NEW ERP):

             1.	NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ ADD.
             2.	AUDIT TYPE – “ERP SCREEN AUDIT” SELECT பண்ணு.
             3.	AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணு.
             4.	SAVE பண்ணிட்டு, AUDITOR & AUDITEEக்கு ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணு.
             5.	QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER SELECT பண்ணு.
             6.	CRITERIA SHOW ஆகும்.
             7.	CRITERIA OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” MARK பண்ணு.
             8.	SAVE பண்ணு.

CHECK:

 ACT:

REPEATED NCRS வந்தா ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFY பண்ணி STRICT CONTROL & CAPA PLAN IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.

  description = EPCG LICENSE RENEWAL

PLAN

IDENTIFY CAPITAL GOODS TO BE IMPORTED UNDER EPCG SCHEME.
CHECK ELIGIBILITY: COMPANY MUST BE AN EXPORTER AND REGISTERED UNDER EEPC OR FIEO.
CALCULATE 6 TIMES EXPORT OBLIGATION AGAINST THE DUTY SAVED.
PREPARE DOCUMENTS SUCH AS IEC, RCMC, GST, PAN, PROFORMA INVOICE, ETC.
COORDINATE WITH PURCHASE, MANAGEMENT

DO

FILL ANF 5B FORM FOR EPCG LICENSE.
APPLY TO DGFT WITH ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS.
GET CERTIFICATES FROM CHARTERED ACCOUNTANT AND CHARTERED ENGINEER.
SUBMIT SELF-CERTIFIED COPIES AND ORIGINALS AS REQUIRED.
TRACK APPLICATION STATUS TILL LICENSE IS RECEIVED.

CHECK

VERIFY RECEIPT OF EPCG LICENSE FROM DGFT.
CROSS-CHECK LICENSE DETAILS – EXPORT OBLIGATION, VALIDITY PERIOD.
MAINTAIN A COMPLIANCE TRACKER FOR YEARLY EXPORT OBLIGATION.
SHARE LICENSE DETAILS WITH ACCOUNTS AND PURCHASE.

ACT

ENSURE YEARLY EXPORT OBLIGATIONS ARE MET AS PER EPCG SCHEME.
IF OBLIGATIONS ARE NOT MET, PREPARE TO PAY DUTIES WITH INTEREST AND PENALTIES.
SUBMIT REGULAR UPDATES TO DGFT IF REQUIRED.
KEEP ALL DOCUMENTS FILED AND ACCESSIBLE FOR AUDIT PURPOSES.

IMPACT TO COMPANY IF NOT FOLLOWED:

HEAVY FINANCIAL BURDEN DUE TO PENALTY AND INTEREST.
LEGAL CONSEQUENCES FOR NON-COMPLIANCE.
INELIGIBILITY FOR FUTURE EPCG OR DGFT SCHEMES.
LOSS OF COMPANY CREDIBILITY AND REPUTATION.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION TO USER IF MISSED:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN



PLAN

IMPORT பண்ண வேண்டிய CAPITAL GOODS-ஐ EPCG SCHEME-க்காக IDENTIFY பண்ணனும் .
ELIGIBILITY CHECK பண்ணனும் – COMPANY EXPORTER ஆக இருக்கணும், EEPC அல்லது FIEO-ல் REGISTER பண்ணிருக்கணும்.
6 TIMES EXPORT OBLIGATION-ஐ DUTY SAVED VALUE-க்கு MATCH பண்ணி CALCULATE பண்ணனும்.
IEC, RCMC, GST, PAN, PROFORMA INVOICE மாதிரியான DOCUMENTS READY பண்ணனும்.
PURCHASE, MANAGEMENT TEAMS-ஓட COORDINATE பண்ணனும்.

DO

EPCG LICENSE-க்கு ANF 5B FORM-ஐ FILL பண்ணனும் .
REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணி DGFT-க்கு APPLICATION SUBMIT பண்ணனும் .
CHARTERED ACCOUNTANT மற்றும் CHARTERED ENGINEER-லிருந்து CERTIFICATE வாங்கனும்.
SELF-CERTIFIED COPY + ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS SUBMIT பண்ணனும்.
LICENSE APPROVAL வரைக்கும் APPLICATION STATUS TRACK பண்ணனும்.

CHECK

DGFT-லிருந்து EPCG LICENSE வந்ததா CHECK பண்ணனும்.
LICENSE DETAILS – EXPORT OBLIGATION, VALIDITY PERIOD-ஐ VERIFY பண்ணனும்.
EXPORT OBLIGATION YEARLY TRACKER MAINTAIN பண்ணனும் COMPLIANCE-க்காக.
LICENSE DETAILS-ஐ ACCOUNTS & PURCHASE DEPARTMENTS-க்கு SHARE பண்ணனும்.

ACT

EPCG SCHEME-க்கு YEARLY EXPORT OBLIGATION MEET பண்ணனும்.
OBLIGATION MEET ஆகலனா, DUTY + INTEREST + PENALTY PAY பண்ண தயாரா இருக்கனும்.
DGFT-க்கு REGULAR UPDATES SUBMIT பண்ணனும் (IF REQUIRED).
AUDIT PURPOSE-க்காக DOCUMENTS-ஐ PROPER-ஆ FILE பண்ணி வைத்திருக்கனும்.

IMPACT TO COMPANY IF NOT FOLLOWED:

PENALTY + INTEREST ஆ COMPANY-க்கு பெரிய FINANCIAL BURDEN வரும்.
LEGAL ISSUES வரும் NON-COMPLIANCE நால.
FUTURE-ல EPCG அல்லது DGFT SCHEMES-க்கு APPLY பண்ண முடியாது.
COMPANY-க்கான CREDIBILITY, REPUTATION கெடும்.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION TO USER IF MISSED:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

PLAN

              WE NEED TO MONITOR ALL PASSWORDS USED ACROSS OUR WEBSITES. IF ANY PASSWORD IS CHANGED OR UPDATED, IT MUST BE IMMEDIATELY SHARED WITH MR. SIVARAMAN AND UPDATED IN THE ERP PASSWORD LIST. A CHECKLIST IS MAINTAINED WITH AN ATTACHED PASSWORD & WEBSITE EXCEL SHEET.

DO

MONITORING & REPORTING:

             1.	IF YOU UPDATE OR CHANGE ANY PASSWORD FOR A WEBSITE UNDER YOUR CONTROL
             2.	IMMEDIATELY SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD VIA EMAIL TO MR. SIVARAMAN OR TO DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM
             3.	USE THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE IN THE CHECKLIST AS A REFERENCE FOR WEBSITE AND PASSWORD DETAILS

UPDATING IN ERP:

               •	ENSURE THAT THE ERP PASSWORD LIST IS UPDATED WITH THE REVISED PASSWORD
               •	MAINTAIN ACCURATE RECORDS FOR AUDIT AND SECURITY COMPLIANCE

CHECK

               •	CONFIRM WHETHER THE UPDATED PASSWORD WAS PROPERLY SENT TO SIVARAMAN SIR OR THE DIGITECH MAIL
               •	CHECK IF THE ERP PASSWORD LIST HAS BEEN CORRECTLY UPDATED
               •	VERIFY THE CHECKLIST FILE TO MAKE SURE NO UPDATE IS MISSED

ACT

               •	IF ANY UPDATE WAS MISSED, SEND THE MAIL IMMEDIATELY AND UPDATE ERP
               •	AVOID DUPLICATE ENTRIES IN THE PASSWORD LIST
               •	PLAN A MONTHLY PASSWORD LIST AUDIT FOR ACCURACY AND TRACKING

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: DELAY IN PASSWORD RECOVERY, POSSIBLE TO FORGOT, 

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

TAMIL

PLAN

               •	CONSISTENCY MAINTAIN பண்ணணும் FOR AUDIT & SECURITY PURPOSE

CHECK

               •	UPDATED PASSWORD SIVARAMAN SIR OR DIGITECH MAIL ID-க்கு PROPERLY அனுப்பினீங்களா CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP PASSWORD LIST-ல CORRECT ENTRY ADDED-A CHECK பண்ணுங்க
               •	CHECKLIST-ல ATTACHED FILE VERIFY பண்ணி UPDATE MISS பண்ணலனு ENSURE பண்ணுங்க

ACT

               •	MISSED UPDATES இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY MAIL பண்ணி RECTIFY பண்ணுங்க
               •	ERP-ல யாரும் DUPLICATE ENTRY CREATE பண்ணாம LOOK OUT பண்ணுங்க
               •	MONTHLY ONCE PASSWORD LIST AUDIT செய்யவும் PLANNING பண்ணுங்க

  checking_point = ACCOUNTS SOP TEST
  description = ACCOUNTS SOP TEST

PLAN:

CONDUCT A MONTHLY SOP TEST FOR THE ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT VIA THE NEW ERP SYSTEM.

DO:

STEP 1: ADD QUESTIONS TO ERP

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP.
             2.	OPEN MENU → CLICK HRMS → OPEN TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY CATEGORY (SCR. 270) → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	GO TO COMPETENCY DETAILS (SCR. 362) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY → ENTER DETAILS → SELECT DEPARTMENT/DESIGNATION → SAVE.
             5.	GO TO QUESTION BANK (SCR. 366) → ADD → SELECT CATEGORY/DETAIL → ENTER QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER → SAVE.

STEP 2: CONDUCT TEST

             1.	IN TRAINING DROPDOWN → OPEN QUESTION GROUP (SCR. 366) → SEARCH BY DEPARTMENT.
             2.	SELECT QUESTIONS → CLICK “CREATE QUESTION” → SAVE.
             3.	GO TO COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365) → ADD → SELECT EMPLOYEE → CATEGORY → SUB-CATEGORY → PROFICIENCY → PLAN ID → SAVE.
             4.	EMPLOYEE RECEIVES TEST MAIL WITH EXAM ID.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE TEST SUBMISSION

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGS INTO ERP → MENU → HRMS → USER ANSWER PAGE (SCR. 371).
             2.	ENTER EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID → CONFIRM → ANSWER & SUBMIT.

STEP 4: MAIL SCORE TO MANAGEMENT

             1.	LOGIN ERP → MENU → HRMS → COMPETENCY MAPPING (SCR. 365).
             2.	SEARCH EMPLOYEE → VIEW ANSWER → NOTE AVERAGE SCORE.
             3.	MAIL EMPLOYEE NAME AND SCORE TO MANAGEMENT, CC RELEVANT PARTICIPANTS.

CHECK:

ENSURE TEST CONDUCTED, ANSWERS SUBMITTED, SCORES RECORDED AND VERIFIED.

ACT:

REVIEW TEST RESULTS MONTHLY. IMPROVE QUESTION BANK AND TRAINING BASED ON GAPS.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: HARD TO FIND SOP UNDERSTAND, POSSIBLE TO DEVIATE SOP

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

TAMIL:

PLAN:

ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் SOP TEST CONDUCT பண்ணணும் USING NEW ERP.

DO:

STEP 1: QUESTION ADD பண்ணனும்

             1.	NEW ERP-ல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க.
             2.	LEFT ARROW CLICK பண்ணி MENU OPEN பண்ணி HRMS → TRAINING DROPDOWN.
             3.	SCREEN 270 – COMPETENCY CATEGORY OPEN பண்ணி → ADD CATEGORY → SAVE.
             4.	BACK போய் SCREEN 362 – COMPETENCY DETAILS OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY SELECT → DETAILS ENTER பண்ணி → DEPT/DESIGNATION SELECT → SAVE.
             5.	அப்புறம் SCREEN 366 – QUESTION BANK OPEN பண்ணி → ADD → CATEGORY/DETAIL SELECT → QUESTION, OPTIONS, ANSWER ADD பண்ணி → SAVE.

STEP 2: TEST CONDUCT பண்ணனும்

             1.	SCREEN 366 – QUESTION GROUP-ல் DEPARTMENT-க்கு ஏற்ற QUESTION SELECT பண்ணி → CREATE QUESTION → SAVE.
             2.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → CATEGORY, SUB-CATEGORY, PROFICIENCY, PLAN ID SELECT பண்ணி → SAVE.
             3.	EMPLOYEE-க்கு EXAM ID MAIL-ல போகும்.

STEP 3: EMPLOYEE ANSWER பண்ணனும்

             1.	EMPLOYEE LOGIN பண்ணி → HRMS → SCREEN 371 – USER ANSWER PAGE.
             2.	EMPLOYEE ID & QUESTION ID ENTER பண்ணி → CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க.
             3.	QUESTIONS LOAD ஆகும் → ANSWER பண்ணி SUBMIT பண்ணணும்.

STEP 4: SCORE MANAGEMENT-க்கு அனுப்பணும்

             1.	SCREEN 365 – COMPETENCY MAPPING-ல EMPLOYEE SELECT பண்ணி → VIEW ANSWER → SCORE கண்டுபிடிக்க.
             2.	EMAIL-ல் EMPLOYEE NAME & SCORE அனுப்பணும், CC-ல் PARTICIPANTS ADD பண்ணி அனுப்பணும்.

CHECK:

SUBMISSION COMPLETE-A, SCORE VERIFY பண்ணி CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

ACT:

EVERY MONTH RESULTS REVIEW பண்ணி, QUESTION BANK IMPROVE பண்ணுங்க.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: HARD TO FIND SOP UNDERSTAND, POSSIBLE TO DEVIATE SOP

  checking_point = SURPRISE AUDIT NUTECH (PRODUCTION) - WEEKLY
  description = SURPRISE AUDIT NUTECH (PRODUCTION) - WEEKLY

PLAN:

           TO ENSURE TIMELY PRODUCTION ENTRY ONCE THE PROCESS IS COMPLETED, WE NEED TO CONDUCT SURPRISE AUDITS IN THE PRODUCTION DEPARTMENT.

DO:

🔹 STEPS TO COLLECT CURRENT PROCESS MATERIAL INFO:

             1.	ASK PRODUCTION FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS NAME AND QUANTITY.
             2.	CHECK THE PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY IN THE OLD ERP.
             3.	GO TO OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             4.	ENTER THE ITEM CODE FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS ITEM.
             5.	COPY THE ROUTE SHEET NUMBER FROM THE SHOWN PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ SEARCH WITH THAT NUMBER.
             7.	VIEW THE PROCESS LIST, IDENTIFY THE PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME.
             8.	GO TO PRODUCTION ENTRY ➝ SEARCH WITH PROCESS NAME & ITEM CODE.
             9.	IF ENTRY IS AVAILABLE FOR THE SAME QTY & PROCESS ➝ MARK AS COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ MARK AS NC.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS ERP SCREEN AUDIT.
             3.	FILL DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             5.	GO TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ CLICK ADD ➝ SELECT AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             6.	BASED ON CRITERIA, IF OK ➝ MARK COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ NC.
             7.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND COMPARE WITH SYSTEM ENTRIES TO ENSURE ACCURACY.

ACT:

IF DELAYS OR MISSING ENTRIES ARE REPEATED, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND RAISE CAPA TO CORRECT THE ISSUE.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: MISSING ON TIME PRODUCTION ENTRY AND PROCESS MISMATCH. 

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

TAMIL:

PLAN:

           PRODUCTION PROCESS COMPLETE ஆக்குற நேரத்துல PRODUCTION ENTRY SYSTEMல TIMELY CREATE பண்ணுறதுக்கு SURPRISE AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும். இது TIME ACCOUNTABILITY MAINTAIN பண்ணதுக்காக.

DO:

🔸 CURRENT PROCESS MATERIAL CHECK பண்ணுற STEPS:

             1.	PRODUCTION TEAM கிட்ட CURRENT PROCESS NAME & QTY கேளு.
             2.	OLD ERPல PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             3.	OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY LOGIN பண்ணு.
             4.	CURRENT PROCESS ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணு.
             5.	ENTRY SHOW ஆகுறது ROUTE SHEET NUMBER COPY பண்ணு.
             6.	PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ ROUTE SHEET NUMBER SEARCH பண்ணு.
             7.	PROCESS LIST SHOW ஆகும், PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME NOTE பண்ணு.
             8.	PRODUCTION ENTRY SCREENல PROCESS NAME + ITEM CODE வைச்சு SEARCH பண்ணு.
             9.	SAME QTY & PROCESS க்கு ENTRY இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
          10.	IRUNDHA “COMPLIANCE” MARK பண்ணு, இல்லனா “NC” போடு.

🔸 AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION CREATE PROCESS (NEW ERP):

             1.	NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ ADD
             2.	AUDIT TYPE – ERP SCREEN AUDIT SELECT பண்ணு.
             3.	AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணு.
             4.	SAVE பண்ணிட்டு, ATTENDANCE AUDITOR & AUDITEE க்கு MARK பண்ணு.
             5.	QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD ➝ SCHEDULE NUMBER SELECT பண்ணு.
             6.	CRITERIA BASE பண்ணி OBSERVATION STATUS: OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” பண்ணு.
             7.	SAVE.

CHECK:

     AUDIT OUTCOME & ERP ENTRY ACCURACY COMPARE பண்ணி REVIEW பண்ணணும்.

ACT:

  checking_point = SURPRISE AUDIT (DD) NUTECH
  description = SURPRISE AUDIT (DD) NUTECH

PLAN:

         TO ENSURE ALL DRAWING FILES IN DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEMS (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN) ARE PROPERLY UPLOADED TO ERP, PHYSICAL AUDITS MUST BE CONDUCTED REGULARLY.

DO:

🔹 STEPS FOR PHYSICAL AUDIT:

             1.	RANDOMLY SELECT ONE SYSTEM FROM THE DD DEPARTMENT.
             2.	CHECK C DRIVE, D DRIVE, DESKTOP, AND RECYCLE BIN FOR ANY DRAWING FILES.
             3.	IF A DRAWING FILE IS FOUND, OPEN IT WITH ASSISTANCE FROM THE DD TEAM AND COPY THE ITEM CODE.
             4.	OPEN OLD ERP ➝ MASTER ➝ ITEMS ➝ MANUFACTURING ITEMS / PURCHASE ITEMS.
             5.	SEARCH USING THE ITEM CODE AND GO TO THE ATTACHMENT SECTION.
             6.	CHECK IF THE DRAWING IS ATTACHED.
             7.	IF ATTACHED, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT FOUND, MARK AS NCR.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS “ERP SCREEN AUDIT”.
             3.	FILL IN THE DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, AND CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE THE SCHEDULE.
             5.	MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD.
             7.	SELECT THE AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             8.	REVIEW THE CRITERIA SHOWN.
             9.	IF THE CONDITION IS MET, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT, MARK AS NC.
          10.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND VERIFY THAT ALL DRAWING FILES ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED IN THE ERP SYSTEM.

ACT:

IF REPEATED NCRS ARE FOUND, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND IMPLEMENT CAPA TO ENSURE CONSISTENT COMPLIANCE.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: POSSIBLE TO MISSING DRAWING ATTACHMENT

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

TAMIL:

PLAN:

     DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEM DRIVES (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN)ல DRAWING FILES ERPல ATTACH ஆயிருச்சா CHECK பண்ண PERIODIC AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும்.

DO:

🔹 PHYSICAL AUDIT STEPS:

             1.	DD DEPARTMENTல இருந்த SYSTEMSல RANDOMLY ஒரே SYSTEM SELECT பண்ணு.
             2.	C DRIVE, D DRIVE, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BINல DRAWING FILE இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
             3.	DRAWING FILE இருந்தா, DD PERSON HELPல OPEN பண்ணி ITEM CODE COPY பண்ணு.
             4.	OLD ERP ➝ MASTER ➝ ITEMS ➝ MANUFACTURING / PURCHASE ITEMSக்கு போ.
             5.	ITEM CODE வைச்சு SEARCH பண்ணி ATTACHMENT SECTION OPEN பண்ணு.
             6.	DRAWING ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
             7.	ATTACHED இருந்தா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NCR” MARK பண்ணு.

🔹 AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION (NEW ERP):

             1.	NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ ADD.
             2.	AUDIT TYPE – “ERP SCREEN AUDIT” SELECT பண்ணு.
             3.	AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணு.
             4.	SAVE பண்ணிட்டு, AUDITOR & AUDITEEக்கு ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணு.
             5.	QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER SELECT பண்ணு.
             6.	CRITERIA SHOW ஆகும்.
             7.	CRITERIA OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” MARK பண்ணு.
             8.	SAVE பண்ணு.

CHECK:

AUDIT RESULTS REVIEW பண்ணி MISSING DRAWINGS ERPல ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கா VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

 ACT:

REPEATED NCRS வந்தா ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFY பண்ணி STRICT CONTROL & CAPA PLAN IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: POSSIBLE TO MISSING DRAWING ATTACHMENT

  description = KM READING REPORT TO SBR VEHICLE PLANS WHATSAPP GROUP

PLAN

          WE MUST SEND A DAILY KM REPORT TO THE SBR VEHICLE PLANS WHATSAPP GROUP. THIS DATA IS COLLECTED THROUGH PHOTOS TAKEN BY DRIVERS WHEN THE VEHICLE STARTS IN THE MORNING AND STOPS AT NIGHT.

DO

1. COLLECT DAILY KM READING PHOTOS FROM DRIVERS.

2. ENSURE EACH PHOTO CLEARLY SHOWS THE DATE AND TIME STAMP.

3. PHOTOS MUST BE TAKEN AT MORNING START AND NIGHT STOP.

4. ONCE THE IMAGE IS RECEIVED, UPDATE THE START AND END KM IN THE EXCEL SHEET.

5. THE EXCEL FILE IS ATTACHED IN THE CHECKLIST FOR YOUR REFERENCE.

6. AFTER UPDATING, SEND THE EXCEL FILE TO THE SBR WHATSAPP GROUP DAILY.

CHECK

VERIFY THAT THE IMAGE HAS THE CORRECT DATE AND TIME. ENSURE KM VALUES ARE UPDATED PROPERLY IN EXCEL. CONFIRM THE REPORT HAS BEEN SHARED IN THE WHATSAPP GROUP.

ACT
IMPACT:
IF THE REPORT IS NOT SENT, A NEGATIVE MEMO WILL BE RAISED. FAILURE TO FOLLOW THIS SOP WILL LEAD TO DISCIPLINARY ACTION.

TAMIL:


PLAN
DAILY KM REPORT-அ SBR VEHICLE PLANS WHATSAPP GROUP-க்கு அனுப்பணும். இப்போதும் MORNING VEHICLE START ஆகும் TIME-லவும் NIGHT STOP TIME-லவும் DRIVER-கிடைய இருந்து PHOTO RECEIVE பண்ணணும்.

DO

1. DRIVER-கிடைய இருந்து DAILY KM READING PHOTO COLLECT பண்ணுங்க.

2. PHOTO-ல DATE & TIME STAMP CLEAR-ஆ இருக்கணும்.

3. MORNING START & NIGHT STOP TIME-ல எடுத்த PHOTO-தான் USE பண்ணணும்.

4. RECEIVED IMAGE-இல் இருந்து EXCEL-ல START & END KM UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

5. EXCEL FILE இந்த CHECKLIST-ல ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கு – அதைப் OPEN பண்ணி UPDATE பண்ணுங்க.

6. UPDATE ஆன EXCEL-அ SBR WHATSAPP GROUP-க்கு DAILY SHARE பண்ணணும்.

CHECK
PHOTO-ல DATE/TIME சரியா இருக்கா-NU CHECK பண்ணுங்க. EXCEL-ல CORRECT-A VALUES UPDATE பண்ணியாச்சா-NU CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க. GROUP-க்கு REPORT அனுப்பியாச்சா-NU VERIFY பண்ணுங்க.

ACT
IMPACT

             1.	IF YOU UPDATE OR CHANGE ANY PASSWORD FOR A WEBSITE UNDER YOUR CONTROL
             2.	IMMEDIATELY SEND THE UPDATED PASSWORD VIA EMAIL TO MR. SIVARAMAN OR TO DIGITECH@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM
             3.	USE THE ATTACHED EXCEL FILE IN THE CHECKLIST AS A REFERENCE FOR WEBSITE AND PASSWORD DETAILS

               •	ENSURE THAT THE ERP PASSWORD LIST IS UPDATED WITH THE REVISED PASSWORD
               •	MAINTAIN ACCURATE RECORDS FOR AUDIT AND SECURITY COMPLIANCE

               •	CHECK IF THE ERP PASSWORD LIST HAS BEEN CORRECTLY UPDATED
               •	VERIFY THE CHECKLIST FILE TO MAKE SURE NO UPDATE IS MISSED

ACT

               •	IF ANY UPDATE WAS MISSED, SEND THE MAIL IMMEDIATELY AND UPDATE ERP
               •	AVOID DUPLICATE ENTRIES IN THE PASSWORD LIST
               •	PLAN A MONTHLY PASSWORD LIST AUDIT FOR ACCURACY AND TRACKING

             IMPACT: DELAY IN PASSWORD RECOVERY, POSSIBLE TO FORGOT,

  description = SURPRISE AUDIT NUTECH (PRODUCTION) - WEEKLY

PLAN:

           TO ENSURE TIMELY PRODUCTION ENTRY ONCE THE PROCESS IS COMPLETED, WE NEED TO CONDUCT SURPRISE AUDITS IN THE PRODUCTION DEPARTMENT.

DO:

🔹 STEPS TO COLLECT CURRENT PROCESS MATERIAL INFO:

             1.	ASK PRODUCTION FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS NAME AND QUANTITY.
             2.	CHECK THE PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY IN THE OLD ERP.
             3.	GO TO OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             4.	ENTER THE ITEM CODE FOR THE CURRENT PROCESS ITEM.
             5.	COPY THE ROUTE SHEET NUMBER FROM THE SHOWN PRODUCTION ENTRY.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ SEARCH WITH THAT NUMBER.
             7.	VIEW THE PROCESS LIST, IDENTIFY THE PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME.
             8.	GO TO PRODUCTION ENTRY ➝ SEARCH WITH PROCESS NAME & ITEM CODE.
             9.	IF ENTRY IS AVAILABLE FOR THE SAME QTY & PROCESS ➝ MARK AS COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ MARK AS NC.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS ERP SCREEN AUDIT.
             3.	FILL DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE AND MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             5.	GO TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ CLICK ADD ➝ SELECT AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             6.	BASED ON CRITERIA, IF OK ➝ MARK COMPLIANCE, ELSE ➝ NC.
             7.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND COMPARE WITH SYSTEM ENTRIES TO ENSURE ACCURACY.

ACT:

IF DELAYS OR MISSING ENTRIES ARE REPEATED, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND RAISE CAPA TO CORRECT THE ISSUE.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: MISSING ON TIME PRODUCTION ENTRY AND PROCESS MISMATCH. 

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

             1.	PRODUCTION TEAM கிட்ட CURRENT PROCESS NAME & QTY கேளு.
             2.	OLD ERPல PREVIOUS PROCESS ENTRY VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             3.	OLD ERP ➝ PRODUCTION ➝ PRODUCTION ENTRY LOGIN பண்ணு.
             4.	CURRENT PROCESS ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணு.
             5.	ENTRY SHOW ஆகுறது ROUTE SHEET NUMBER COPY பண்ணு.
             6.	PLANNING ➝ ROUTESHEET ➝ ROUTE SHEET NUMBER SEARCH பண்ணு.
             7.	PROCESS LIST SHOW ஆகும், PREVIOUS PROCESS NAME NOTE பண்ணு.
             8.	PRODUCTION ENTRY SCREENல PROCESS NAME + ITEM CODE வைச்சு SEARCH பண்ணு.
             9.	SAME QTY & PROCESS க்கு ENTRY இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணு.
          10.	IRUNDHA “COMPLIANCE” MARK பண்ணு, இல்லனா “NC” போடு.

🔸 AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION CREATE PROCESS (NEW ERP):

             1.	NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ ADD
             2.	AUDIT TYPE – ERP SCREEN AUDIT SELECT பண்ணு.
             3.	AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, CRITERIA FILL பண்ணு.
             4.	SAVE பண்ணிட்டு, ATTENDANCE AUDITOR & AUDITEE க்கு MARK பண்ணு.
             5.	QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD ➝ SCHEDULE NUMBER SELECT பண்ணு.
             6.	CRITERIA BASE பண்ணி OBSERVATION STATUS: OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” பண்ணு.
             7.	SAVE.

CHECK:

ACT:

      DELAYயும் MISSING ENTRYயும் RECURRING ஆகுறதா இருந்தா ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFY பண்ணி CAPA INITIATE பண்ணணும்.

  description = SURPRISE AUDIT (DD) NUTECH

PLAN:

         TO ENSURE ALL DRAWING FILES IN DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEMS (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN) ARE PROPERLY UPLOADED TO ERP, PHYSICAL AUDITS MUST BE CONDUCTED REGULARLY.

DO:

🔹 STEPS FOR PHYSICAL AUDIT:

             1.	RANDOMLY SELECT ONE SYSTEM FROM THE DD DEPARTMENT.
             2.	CHECK C DRIVE, D DRIVE, DESKTOP, AND RECYCLE BIN FOR ANY DRAWING FILES.
             3.	IF A DRAWING FILE IS FOUND, OPEN IT WITH ASSISTANCE FROM THE DD TEAM AND COPY THE ITEM CODE.
             4.	OPEN OLD ERP ➝ MASTER ➝ ITEMS ➝ MANUFACTURING ITEMS / PURCHASE ITEMS.
             5.	SEARCH USING THE ITEM CODE AND GO TO THE ATTACHMENT SECTION.
             6.	CHECK IF THE DRAWING IS ATTACHED.
             7.	IF ATTACHED, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT FOUND, MARK AS NCR.

🔹 STEPS TO CREATE AUDIT SCHEDULE & OBSERVATION IN NEW ERP:

             1.	LOGIN TO NEW ERP ➝ QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT SCHEDULE ➝ CLICK ADD.
             2.	SELECT AUDIT TYPE AS “ERP SCREEN AUDIT”.
             3.	FILL IN THE DETAILS: AUDITOR, AUDITEE, NCR APPROVED BY, AND CRITERIA.
             4.	SAVE THE SCHEDULE.
             5.	MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH AUDITOR AND AUDITEE.
             6.	NAVIGATE TO QMS ➝ AUDIT ➝ AUDIT OBSERVATION ➝ ADD.
             7.	SELECT THE AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER.
             8.	REVIEW THE CRITERIA SHOWN.
             9.	IF THE CONDITION IS MET, MARK AS COMPLIANCE; IF NOT, MARK AS NC.
          10.	SAVE THE OBSERVATION.

CHECK:

REVIEW AUDIT RESULTS AND VERIFY THAT ALL DRAWING FILES ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED IN THE ERP SYSTEM.

ACT:

IF REPEATED NCRS ARE FOUND, IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE AND IMPLEMENT CAPA TO ENSURE CONSISTENT COMPLIANCE.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

             IMPACT: POSSIBLE TO MISSING DRAWING ATTACHMENT

             IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

TAMIL:

PLAN:

     DD DEPARTMENT SYSTEM DRIVES (C, D, DESKTOP, RECYCLE BIN)ல DRAWING FILES ERPல ATTACH ஆயிருச்சா CHECK பண்ண PERIODIC AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும்.

🔹 PHYSICAL AUDIT STEPS:

             1.	DD DEPARTMENTல இருந்த SYSTEMSல RANDOMLY ஒரே SYSTEM SELECT பண்ணு.

             7.	ATTACHED இருந்தா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NCR” MARK பண்ணு.

             2.	AUDIT TYPE – “ERP SCREEN AUDIT” SELECT பண்ணு.

             6.	CRITERIA SHOW ஆகும்.
             7.	CRITERIA OKனா “COMPLIANCE”, இல்லனா “NC” MARK பண்ணு.
             8.	SAVE பண்ணு.

IF PROCEDURE NOT FOLLOWED:

PLAN:

DO:

STORES TEAM:

MAKE PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.

STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL

CHECK THE RACK & BIN LOCATION IN THE LINE ITEM.
PLACE THE ITEM IN THE SAME RACK & BIN LOCATION AS SHOWN IN ERP.

IF LOCATION IS NOT AVAILABLE, PLACE THE ITEM IN A NEW LOCATION, AND SEND A MAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH:
ITEM CODE
NEW RACK LOCATION
NEW BIN LOCATION

OPEN ERP → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM
EDIT THE ITEM BY ENTERING ITEM CODE

UPDATE RACK & BIN FIELDS WITH NEW LOCATION

MISCOMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEPARTMENTS.

  description = DEPARTMENT BUDGET PREPARATION

PLAN

REFER TO NEXT YEAR’S SALES PLAN AND DEPARTMENT OBJECTIVES.
COLLECT CURRENT YEAR’S ACTUAL EXPENSES FOR REFERENCE.
GATHER INPUTS FROM EACH HOD REGARDING THEIR REQUIREMENTS.

DO

CONDUCT DEPARTMENT BUDGET PLANNING AS PER THE ANNUAL SCHEDULE.
PREPARE A DETAILED BUDGET WITH PROPER JUSTIFICATION FOR EACH EXPENSE.
FOR CAPEX BUDGET, COLLECT NECESSARY QUOTATIONS FROM SUPPLIERS.

CHECK

REVIEW THE DRAFT BUDGET WITH TOP MANAGEMENT FOR APPROVALS.
CHECK ALL JUSTIFICATIONS AND SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS FOR CORRECTNESS.
ENSURE CAPEX (CAPITAL EXPENSES) AND OPEX (OPERATING EXPENSES) ARE CLEARLY SEGREGATED.

ACT

FINALIZE THE BUDGET AFTER MANAGEMENT APPROVAL.
SHARE APPROVED BUDGET THROUGH OFFICIAL MAIL TO ALL HODS.
HODS MUST PRESENT THEIR BUDGETS IN THE ANNUAL REVIEW MEETING.
UPLOAD THE FINALISED BUDGET DOCUMENTS IN ERP


IMPACT TO COMPANY IF NOT FOLLOWED

MISALIGNED BUDGETS CAN LEAD TO CASH FLOW ISSUES AND OVERSPENDING.
MAY RESULT IN RESOURCE SHORTAGES, DELAYED PURCHASES, AND LOSS OF OPPORTUNITIES.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION FOR NON-COMPLIANCE

DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED



PLAN

அடுத்த ஆண்டு SALES PLAN மற்றும் DEPARTMENT OBJECTIVES-ஐ REFERENCE ஆக எடுக்கவும்.
இந்த ஆண்டு ACTUAL EXPENSES-ஐ கொண்டு வரவும்.
ஒவ்வொரு HOD-ம் தேவையான INPUTS-ஐ எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

DO

வருடத்திற்கான SCHEDULE-க்கு ஏற்ப DEPARTMENT BUDGET MEETING நடத்தவும்.
ஒவ்வொரு செலவுக்கும் சரியான JUSTIFICATION-ஓடு DETAILED BUDGET-ஐ தயாரிக்கவும்.
CAPEX BUDGET-க்கு QUOTATIONS-ஐ VENDOR-களிடமிருந்து பெற வேண்டும்

CHECK

MANAGEMENT உடன் BUDGET DRAFT-ஐ REVIEW செய்து APPROVALS பெற வேண்டும்.
எல்லா JUSTIFICATION மற்றும் SUPPORT DOCUMENTS சரியா இருக்கா என்று CHECK செய்யவும்.
CAPEX (CAPITAL EXPENSES)-ம் OPEX (OPERATING EXPENSES)-ம் தெளிவாக பிரிக்கப்பட்டிருக்க வேண்டும்.

ACT

MANAGEMENT APPROVAL பிறகு BUDGET-ஐ FINALIZE செய்யவும்.
APPROVED BUDGET-ஐ OFFICIAL MAIL-ஐ மூலம் எல்லா HOD-க்கும் அனுப்பவும்.
ANNUAL REVIEW MEETING-ல் HOD-கள் தங்கள் BUDGET-ஐ PRESENT செய்ய வேண்டும்.
FINALISED BUDGET ஐ ERP ல் UPLOAD செய்ய வேண்டும்

IMPACT TO COMPANY IF NOT FOLLOWED

BUDGET சரியாக பண்ணாததால் CASH FLOW பிரச்சனை ஏற்படும்.
RESOURCE குறைபாடு, DELAY IN PROCUREMENT, AND BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY MISS ஆகும்.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION

DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM PLANNING DEPARTMENT.
VERIFY THE MAIL FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, AND REASON.

DO

NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT
IF THE MAIL LACKS REQUIRED DETAILS, REPLY TO THE USER REQUESTING COMPLETE INFORMATION.
IF APPROVAL FROM UMAPATHY IS NOT MENTIONED, REPLY ASKING THE USER TO GET APPROVAL AND RESEND THE MAIL.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
PLANNING DEPARTMENT  இருந்து MAIL வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON CORRECTா இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
ENSURE APPROVAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MAIL AS "PLANNING DEPARTMENT".
APPROVAL PLANNING DEPARTMENT எடுக்கனும்.
LOGIN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL.
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM A NEW ENTRY IS CREATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL WITH THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

  checking_point = INVENTORY STOCK AUTO POSTING
  description = INVENTORY STOCK AUTO POSTING

PLAN

WE MUST VERIFY IF INVENTORY STOCK IS AUTOMATICALLY POSTED IN ERP DAILY. IF NOT, WE SHOULD POST IT MANUALLY.

DO
🔹 STEPS TO CHECK AUTO POSTING:

             1.	LOGIN TO EXISTING ERP USING THE ERP ADMIN ID
             2.	NAVIGATE TO: ACCOUNTS ➜ MIS ➜ STOCK ACCOUNT
             3.	UNDER STOCK ENTRY LIST, SELECT STOCK LEDGER
             4.	CHOOSE THE FROM DATE AND TO DATE ➜ CLICK VIEW
             5.	ONLY ONE DIVISION CAN BE SELECTED AT A TIME, SO REPEAT THE PROCESS FOR ALL DIVISIONS
             6.	IF RECORDS SHOW DATE AND STOCK VALUE, TAKE A SCREENSHOT AND CLOSE THE CHECKLIST
             7.	IF NO RECORDS ARE FOUND, IT MEANS AUTO POST HASN’T HAPPENED – PROCEED TO MANUAL POSTING
🔹 STEPS TO MANUALLY POST STOCK:

             1.	LOGIN TO ERP USING ERP ADMIN ID
             2.	GO TO: MIS ➜ STORES ➜ INVENTORY STOCK
             3.	ON THE INVENTORY SCREEN, CLICK GO TO OLD VERSION
             4.	ENABLE POST TO SIH CHECKBOX ➜ CLICK LOAD
             5.	REPEAT THIS FOR ALL DIVISIONS
             6.	AFTER COMPLETION, RECHECK USING THE AUTO-POST STEPS ABOVE

CHECK

HAVE YOU FOLLOWED THE CHECKLIST? HAVE SCREENSHOTS BEEN TAKEN FOR EACH DIVISION? IS DATA POSTED FOR ALL?

ACT

IMPACT

IF THE CHECKLIST IS MISSED, ERP STOCK MAY NOT MATCH WITH PHYSICAL STOCK. A MEMO WILL BE RAISED AND DISCIPLINARY ACTION MAY FOLLOW.

TAMIL

PLAN

DAILY-யா ERP-ல STOCK VALUES AUTOMATIC-ஆ POST ஆகுதா CHECK பண்ணனும். இல்லாட்டி MANUAL-ஆ POST பண்ணனும்.

DO

📌 INVENTORY AUTO POST CHECK STEPS:

             1.	ERP ADMIN ID-யா USE பண்ணி EXISTION ERPல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
             2.	ACCOUNTS ➜ MIS ➜ STOCK ACCOUNT கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
             3.	கீழே இருக்குற STOCK ENTRY LIST-ல “STOCK LEDGER” SELECT பண்ணுங்க
             4.	FROM & TO DATE SELECT பண்ணி VIEW கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
             5.	ஒரே TIME-ல ஒரு DIVISION-க்கு மட்டும்தான் VIEW பண்ண முடியும், SO ஒவ்வொரு DIVISION-க்கும் REPEAT பண்ணனும்
             6.	RECORD-ல DATE & STOCK VALUE வந்தா SCREENSHOT எடுத்து CHECKLIST CLOSE பண்ணலாம்
             7.	RECORD எதுவும் இல்லன்னா AUTOMATIC-ஆ POST ஆகல – NEXT STEP MOVE பண்ணுங்க
📌 MANUAL STOCK POST STEPS:

             1.	ERP-ல ADMIN ID USE பண்ணி LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
             2.	MIS ➜ STORES ➜ INVENTORY STOCK கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
             3.	SCREEN-ல “GO TO OLD VERSION” கிளிக் பண்ணி செல்லுங்க
             4.	"POST TO SIH" CHECKBOX ENABLE பண்ணி LOAD பண்ணுங்க
             5.	இதையும் எல்லா DIVISION-க்கும் REPEAT பண்ணனும்
             6.	MANUAL POST பண்ணி முடிச்சதும், STEP 2-ல சொல்லிய PROCESS FOLLOW பண்ணி RE-CHECK பண்ணுங்க

CHECK

CHECKLIST FOLLOW பண்ணீங்களா? SCREENSHOT எடுத்து வைச்சீங்களா? எல்லா DIVISION-க்கும் PROCESS APPLY பண்ணீங்களா?

ACT

IMPACT

CHECKLIST MISS பண்ணீங்கன்னா PHYSICAL STOCK & ERP STOCK MISMATCH ஆகும். அதனால MEMO RAISE ஆகும். DISCIPLINARY ACTION எடுத்துருவாங்க.

  checking_point = SALES DAILY REPORT SEND TO VP SIR
  description = SALES DAILY REPORT SEND TO VP SIR

OBJECTIVE:
TO ENSURE DAILY VISIBILITY AND PROACTIVE ACTION ON SALES ACTIVITIES AND DELAYS BY TRACKING AND REPORTING CRITICAL SALES POINTS TO MANAGEMENT.

PLAN

DEFINE CLEAR DAILY REPORTING STRUCTURE FOR ALL KEY SALES STAGES:

	ENQUIRY BOOKED – PENDING FOR QUOTATION
	PROFORMA INVOICE SENT – PENDING FOR LC/ADVANCE
	QUOTATION SENT – PENDING FOR ORDER
	ORDER BOOKED – PENDING FOR INVOICE
	CUSTOMER COMPLAINT BOOKED – PENDING FOR CLOSURE

EACH POINT SHOULD HAVE:

	OPENING COUNT
	NEWLY ADDED COUNT
	COMPLETED COUNT
	PENDING COUNT

தினசரி SALES STATUS REPORT-ல கீழ்கண்ட 5 முக்கியப்புள்ளிகள் MANDATORY-ஆ சேர்க்க வேண்டும்:

	ENQUIRY BOOKED – QUOTATION PENDING
	PROFORMA INVOICE SENT – LC/ADVANCE PENDING
	QUOTATION SENT – ORDER PENDING
	ORDER BOOKED – INVOICE PENDING
	COMPLAINT BOOKED – CLOSURE PENDING

அனைத்து OPENING, NEW, COMPLETED, PENDING COUNT-களோடு DAILY DATA வேண்டும்.


DO

AT THE END OF EACH DAY:

	PREPARE THE SALES REPORT WITH UPDATED STATUS ON ALL 5 POINTS.
	COLLECT INPUT FROM RESPECTIVE INTERNAL TEAMS (SALES - DD, PLANNING, QUALITY).
	SEND REPORT TO MANAGEMENT BEFORE END OF EACH DAY THROUGH EMAIL.


ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் SALES REPORT EVENING MANAGEMENTக்கு  MAIL-ஆ அனுப்ப வேண்டும். REPORT-க்கு தேவையான DATA-வை கீழ்கண்ட TEAMS-ல் இருந்து COLLECT செய்ய வேண்டும்:

	SALES – DD TEAM (QUOTATION FOLLOW-UP)
	PLANNING TEAM (INVOICE FOLLOW-UP)
	QUALITY TEAM (COMPLAINT CLOSURE FOLLOW-UP)


CHECK

REVIEW THE REPORT DAILY TO ENSURE:

	TIMELY INTERNAL FOLLOW-UPS ARE DONE.
	ALL OVERDUE CASES ARE HIGHLIGHTED.
	REASON FOR DELAYS ARE CAPTURED.

DAILY REPORT-ல் உள்ள FOLLOW-UPS CHECK பண்ணி, DELAY ஆனதும் REASON EXPLAIN பண்ணி ESCALATE பண்ணணும். REPORT ACCURACY க்கு MANAGER VERIFY பண்ணணும்.



ACT

IF SOP IS NOT FOLLOWED:

	IMPACT TO COMPANY: DELAY IN CASH FLOW, POOR CUSTOMER SATISFACTION, MISSED OPPORTUNITIES.
	DESCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN IF ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED

SOP FOLLOW பண்ணலனா:

	IMPACT: COMPANY-க்கு CASH FLOW DELAY, CUSTOMER DISSATISFACTION, ORDER MISS ஆகும்.
	DESCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN IF ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED

  description = WORK FROM HOME (WFH) REPORTING

WORK FROM HOME (WFH) REPORT - ACTUAL


ENGLISH

PLAN

REQUEST WFH APPROVAL BY EMAIL FROM VERTICAL HEAD WITH VALID REASON.
PREPARE LIST OF ACTIVITIES TO BE DONE DURING WFH.
SHARE ACTIVITY LIST VIA EMAIL 2 DAYS BEFORE.
GET APPROVAL 1 DAY BEFORE WFH DATE.

DO

WORK AS PER APPROVED ACTIVITY LIST.
ENSURE AVAILABILITY OVER PHONE/MAIL DURING WORK HOURS.
UPDATE VERTICAL HEAD WITH STATUS IF ASKED.

CHECK

END OF WFH DAY, SEND STATUS UPDATE TO VERTICAL HEAD.
MENTION TASKS COMPLETED, PENDING & REASONS IF ANY.

ACT

IF ANY TASKS PENDING, PLAN TIMELINE FOR COMPLETION.
DISCUSS ISSUES (IF ANY) WITH VERTICAL HEAD FOR FUTURE IMPROVEMENT.


TANGLISH:

PLAN

WORK FROM HOME (WFH) காக VALID REASON MENTION பண்ணி VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல APPROVAL கேக்கணும்.
WFH DAY ல பண்ண வேண்டிய ACTIVITIES LIST தயார் பண்ணணும்.
இந்த ACTIVITY LIST, WFH கு 2 DAYS முன்னாடி MAIL பண்ணி, 1 DAY முன்னாடி APPROVAL வாங்கணும்.

DO

APPROVED ACTIVITY LIST BASE பண்ணி வேலை பண்ணணும்.
WORK HOURS குள்ள PHONE / MAIL REACHABLE ஆ இருக்கணும்.
VERTICAL HEAD கேட்கும் போது STATUS UPDATE குடுக்கணும்.

CHECK

WFH முடிச்சதுக்கு அப்புறம் VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல STATUS UPDATE அனுப்பணும்.
COMPLETE ஆன TASK, PENDING TASK & REASON MENTION பண்ணணும்.

ACT

PENDING இருக்கற TASK கு COMPLETION TIME FIX பண்ணணும்.
FUTURE WFH IMPROVE பண்ண VERTICAL HEAD உடன் DISCUSS பண்ணணும்.

               •	DESCRIPTIONS
               •	DEPARTMENT
               •	LEVEL
               •	EFFECTIVE FROM
               •	FREQUENCY
               •	STOCK LINK
               •	PHOTO REQUIRED
               •	DUAL CHECK
               •	CARRY FORWARD

2.	IF ANY CORRECTIONS ARE REQUIRED, SEND THE UPDATED DETAILS TO ERPADMIN@NUTECHWINDPARTS.COM.
3.	IF NO ACTION IS TAKEN, ERP ADMIN WILL SEND YOUR CHECKLIST TO YOUR VERTICAL HEAD’S EMAIL EVERY WEEK.
4.	INFORM YOUR VERTICAL HEAD IF ANY CORRECTIONS ARE NEEDED.
5.	THE VERTICAL HEAD MUST FORWARD THE FINAL UPDATE TO ERP ADMIN.
6.	ERP ADMIN OR THE QMS TEAM WILL MAKE THE NECESSARY UPDATES IN THE SYSTEM.

IF THE CHECKLIST IS NOT UPDATED:
7.	UNWANTED OR IRRELEVANT ITEMS MAY REMAIN, LEADING TO UNNECESSARY WORK OR CONFUSION.
8.	OUTDATED CHECKLISTS CAN AFFECT PROCESS CLARITY AND AUDIT COMPLIANCE.
9.	LACK OF UPDATES MAY RESULT IN DATA MISMATCHES AND FOLLOW-UP DELAYS.

3.	இல்லனா, WEEKLY ONCE ERP ADMIN TEAM உங்கள் CHECKLIST-ஐ உங்கள் VERTICAL HEAD MAIL ID கு FORWARD பண்ணுவாங்க.

•	இது FUTURE-ல் AUDIT & PROCESS CLARITY-க்கு IMPACT ஆகும்.
•	REGULAR UPDATE-இல்லனா SYSTEM DATA MISMATCH & FOLLOW-UP ISSUE வரலாம்.

  checking_point = 100% PHYSICAL VS ERP STOCK AUDIT – GAUGES & INSTRUMENTS
  description = 100% PHYSICAL VS ERP STOCK AUDIT – GAUGES & INSTRUMENTS

PLAN:

TO ENSURE INVENTORY ACCURACY, WE NEED TO PERFORM 100% PHYSICAL STOCK VERIFICATION AGAINST ERP DATA FOR ALL GAUGES AND INSTRUMENTS.

DO:

             1.	CHECK 100% PHYSICAL VS ERP STOCK FOR THE ATTACHED LIST OF GAUGES AND INSTRUMENTS.
             2.	ALSO VERIFY IF ANY ITEMS ARE PENDING IN DC FOR GAUGES AND INSTRUMENTS.
             3.	REFER TO THE ATTACHED CHECKLIST CONTAINING THE ACTUAL ITEM LIST.

ERP STOCK CHECK STEPS:

                       •	LOGIN TO EXISTING ERP
                       •	GO TO STORES → STOCK SUMMARY → GENERAL STOCK
                       •	COPY ITEM CODE FROM ATTACHED EXCEL
                       •	PASTE IN ERP SEARCH BAR
                       •	SELECT RACK AND BIN = ALL, THEN CLICK SEARCH
                       •	YOU WILL SEE CURRENT STOCK QTY, RACK, BIN, AND DC ISSUE STATUS IN RESULTS
             4.	VERIFY THE PHYSICAL STOCK WITH THE ATTACHED EXCEL DATA
             5.	IF ANY MISMATCH IS FOUND, RAISE NC TO THE QUALITY DEPARTMENT. IF STOCK MATCHES, MARK AS COMPLIANCE

NEW ERP AUDIT SCHEDULE STEPS:

                       •	LOGIN TO NEW ERP
                       •	NAVIGATE TO QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE
                       •	CLICK ADD, FILL REQUIRED DETAILS, AND SELECT AUDITEE = QUALITY DEPARTMENT
                       •	ADD CRITERIA AND SAVE

AUDIT OBSERVATION CREATION STEPS:

                       •	LOGIN AS AUDITOR IN NEW ERP
                       •	GO TO QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT OBSERVATION
                       •	CLICK ADD, SELECT THE RELATED AUDIT SCHEDULE NUMBER
                       •	CHECK SYSTEM-GENERATED CRITERIA POINTS
                       •	IF OK, MARK AS COMPLIANCE, ELSE MARK AS NC
                       •	SAVE THE OBSERVATION

CHECK:

AUDITOR TO REVIEW ALL POINTS IN CHECKLIST VS ERP AND RECORD OBSERVATIONS IN NEW ERP.

ACT:

IMPACT:

               •	IF NOT FOLLOWED, THERE MAY BE STOCK LOSS OR INCORRECT RECORDS
               •	NON-COMPLIANCE WILL LEAD TO INTERNAL AUDIT FAILURE
               •	DISCIPLINARY ACTION MAY BE TAKEN FOR SOP VIOLATIONS

TAMIL

PLAN:

      GAUGES & INSTRUMENTS LIST-க்கு 100% PHYSICAL VS ERP STOCK AUDIT பண்ணணும் ACCURATE TRACKING-க்காக.

DO:

             1.	ATTACHED CHECKLIST-ல் MENTION பண்ணிருக்கும் ITEMS-க்கு PHYSICAL VS ERP STOCK VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             2.	GAUGES & INSTRUMENTS-க்கு RELATED PENDING DC-யும் CHECK பண்ணணும்.
             3.	ACTUAL ITEM LIST-க்கு CHECKLIST ATTACHED பண்ணிருக்காங்க – அதை REFERENCE-A எடுத்துக்கோங்க.

EXISTING ERP-ல் STOCK CHECK PROCEDURE:

                       •	EXISTING ERP-க்கு LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
                       •	GO TO STORES → STOCK SUMMARY → GENERAL STOCK
                       •	ATTACHED EXCEL-ல இருந்து ITEM CODE COPY பண்ணி
                       •	ERP SEARCH BAR-ல் PASTE பண்ணுங்க
                       •	RACK = ALL, BIN = ALL SELECT பண்ணி SEARCH பண்ணுங்க
                       •	RESULT-ல STOCK QTY, RACK, BIN, DC STATUS எல்லாம் வரும்
             4.	PHYSICAL STOCK-ஐ ATTACHED EXCEL-ோட COMPARE பண்ணுங்க
             5.	STOCK MISMATCH இருந்தா QUALITY DEPT-க்கு NC RAISE பண்ணுங்க, சரியா இருந்தா COMPLIANCE பண்ணுங்க

NEW ERP-ல் AUDIT SCHEDULE CREATE பண்ணற STEPS:

                       •	NEW ERP-க்கு LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
                       •	QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT SCHEDULE NAVIGATE பண்ணி
                       •	ADD பண்ணி REQUIRED DETAILS ENTER பண்ணி, AUDITEE = QUALITY DEPT SELECT பண்ணுங்க
                       •	CRITERIA ADD பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணுங்க

AUDIT OBSERVATION CREATE பண்ணற STEPS (AUDITOR LOGIN):

                       •	AUDITOR USER ID-ல LOGIN பண்ணி
                       •	QMS → AUDIT → AUDIT OBSERVATION NAVIGATE பண்ணி
                       •	ADD பண்ணி RELATED AUDIT SCHEDULE NO. SELECT பண்ணுங்க
                       •	CRITERIA POINTS AUTO-GENERATE ஆகும் – அதை BASE பண்ணி STOCK CHECK பண்ணுங்க
                       •	OKனா COMPLIANCE, இல்லனா NC MARK பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணுங்க

CHECK:

CHECKLIST VS ERP-ஐ AUDITOR CHECK பண்ணி OBSERVATION ENTER பண்ணணும்.

ACT:

               •	SOP FOLLOW பண்ணலென்றா STOCK LOSS வரலாம், DATA MISMATCH ஆகலாம்
               •	REGULAR AUDIT FAILURE CHANCES இருக்கு
               •	COMPANY SIDE-ல இருந்து DISCIPLINARY ACTION எடுத்துக்கொள்ளலாம்

PLAN:

STORES TEAM TO CHECK AND VERIFY LOCATION WHILE MAKING PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
IF LOCATION IS NOT FOUND IN ERP, IDENTIFY A NEW PHYSICAL LOCATION IN THE STORE AND NOTE IT DOWN.

RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ENTER ITEM CODE IN THE SEARCH FIELD → CLICK LOAD.
CHECK THE RACK & BIN LOCATION IN THE LINE ITEM.
PLACE THE ITEM IN THE SAME RACK & BIN LOCATION AS SHOWN IN ERP.

IF LOCATION IS NOT AVAILABLE, PLACE THE ITEM IN A NEW LOCATION, AND SEND A MAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH:
ITEM CODE
NEW RACK LOCATION
NEW BIN LOCATION

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

OPEN ERP → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM
EDIT THE ITEM BY ENTERING ITEM CODE		
GO TO “INVENTORY INFORMATION” SECTION
UPDATE RACK & BIN FIELDS WITH NEW LOCATION
REPLY TO STORES TEAM WITH SUBJECT: “LOCATION UPDATED”

CHECK:
DEPARTMENT HEAD TO RANDOMLY AUDIT WHETHER ITEM IS PLACED IN UPDATED ERP LOCATION.
ERP-ADMIN TO VERIFY MAIL TRAIL AND ERP ENTRY LOG WEEKLY.

ACT:
IF ITEM IS NOT PLACED IN THE CORRECT ERP LOCATION:
IMPACT TO COMPANY:

TIME WASTED DURING ITEM RETRIEVAL.
DELAY IN PRODUCTION OR DELIVERY.
MISCOMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEPARTMENTS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN



PLAN:
STORES TEAM PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY பண்ணும்போது ERP-ல ITEM LOCATION CHECK பண்ணணும்.
ERP-ல LOCATION இல்லனா, புது LOCATION FIX பண்ணி, அது NOTE பண்ணிக்கணும்.

DO:
STORES TEAM:

PO/JO INWARD ENTRY ERP-ல பண்ணணும்.
STOCK SUMMARY-க்கு போங்க.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ITEM CODE-ஐ SEARCH FIELD-ல TYPE பண்ணி → LOAD கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க.
LINE ITEM-ல வரும் RACK & BIN LOCATION பாருங்க.
ERP-ல காட்டுற LOCATION-க்கே ITEM வைச்சிடுங்க.

LOCATION தெரியலனா, புது LOCATION-ல வைச்சிட்டு, கீழ்கண்ட DETAILS-ஓட  ERP ADMIN-க்கு MAIL அனுப்பணும்:

ITEM CODE
புது LOCATION NAME

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

ERP OPEN பண்ணி → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM SELECT பண்ணணும்.
ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணி EDIT செய்யணும்.

INVENTORY INFORMATION SECTION-க்கு போய்:
RACK & BIN FIELDS இரண்டிலும் PUDHU LOCATION UPDATE பண்ணணும்.
STORES TEAM-க்கு "LOCATION UPDATED"னு MAIL REPLY பண்ணணும்: 

CHECK:
ERP ADMIN WEEKLY ONCE MAIL TRAIL VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

ACT:
சரியான LOCATION-ல ITEM இல்லன்னா:
COMPANY-க்கு IMPACT:

ITEM தேட நேரம் வீணாகும்.
PRODUCTION/DELIVERY DELAY ஆகும்.
DEPARTMENT-க்குள் MISUNDERSTANDING வரும்.

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

Row:
  id = 8885
  seq_no = 949
  checking_point = ACKNOWLEDGEMENT - DEBIT NOTE (SUPPLIER RETURN)
  description = ACKNOWLEDGEMENT - DEBIT NOTE (SUPPLIER RETURN)

PLAN:

ENSURE DAILY MONITORING OF DEBIT NOTE SCREEN TO VERIFY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS. THE OBJECTIVE IS TO IDENTIFY AND ACT ON ANY MISSING OR PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.

DO:

             1.	CHECK DEBIT NOTE SCREEN DAILY FOR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS.
             2.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS PENDING, SEND A FOLLOW-UP EMAIL TO THE PURCHASE DEPARTMENT OR CONCERNED PERSON.
             3.	IF MATERIAL IS SENT VIA LOGISTICS:
                    - SEND AN ACKNOWLEDGEMENT EMAIL TO THE SUPPLIER/RECEIVER IMMEDIATELY.
                    - ATTACH THE SOFT COPY OF THE DEBIT NOTE AND LR COPY IN THE EMAIL.
                    - ATTACH THE SENT EMAIL IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             4.	IF MATERIAL IS HANDED OVER DIRECTLY (OUR SCOPE):
                   - GET SEAL AND SIGNATURE FROM SUPPLIER/RECEIVER.
                  - ATTACH THE SIGNED DOCUMENT IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             5.	IF SUPPLIER/DRIVER COLLECTS MATERIAL DIRECTLY:
                  - OBTAIN SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER, AND ANY GOVERNMENT ID PROOF.
                  - ATTACH THE PROOF IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             6.	VERIFY EACH DEBIT NOTE ENTRY FOR COMPLIANCE WITH THE ABOVE  ACKNOWLEDGEMENT CRITERIA.
             7.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS MISSING, EMAIL THE PERSON WHO RAISED THE DEBIT NOTE FOR FOLLOW-UP.

CHECK:

               •	CROSS-VERIFY EACH DEBIT NOTE ENTRY AGAINST THE CHECKLIST.
               •	ENSURE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED.
               •	MAINTAIN A LOG OF PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS FOR FOLLOW-UP.

ACT + IMPACT:

               •	IF FREQUENT GAPS ARE FOUND, ANALYZE ROOT CAUSES AND IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE ACTIONS.
               •	ESCALATE REPEATED NON-COMPLIANCE TO THE APPROPRIATE AUTHORITY.

IMPACT: ENSURES AUDIT READINESS, REDUCES MATERIAL DISPATCH DISPUTES, STRENGTHENS INTERNAL CONTROLS, AND IMPROVES SUPPLIER ACCOUNTABILITY.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

DAILY BASISல DEBIT NOTE SCREENல ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கும் ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS CHECK பண்ணணும். ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MISSING OR PENDING இருக்கா என்பதை IDENTIFY பண்ணுறது MAIN GOAL.

DO:

             1.	DEBIT NOTE SCREENல் ATTACH பண்ணிய ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS DAILY CHECK பண்ணணும்.
             2.	ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தால் PURCHASE DEPT / CONSENT PERSONக்கு MAIL போடணும்.
             3.	MATERIAL LOGISTICSல அனுப்பினால்:
                  - ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MAIL CONSENT SUPPLIER/RECEIVERக்கு IMMEDIATEஆனு போனாகணும்.
                 - MAILல DEBIT NOTE SOFT COPY + LR COPY ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
                 - அந்த MAIL DEBIT NOTE ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             4.	MATERIAL நம்ம SCOPEல OR DIRECT HANDOVER பண்ணினா:
                 - SUPPLIER/RECEIVER SEAL + SIGNATURE வாங்கணும்.
                 - அதை SCAN பண்ணி DEBIT NOTE ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             5.	SUPPLIER/DRIVER MATERIAL COLLECT பண்ணினா:
                - SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER + GOVT ID PROOF வாங்கி ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             6.	மேலே சொன்ன CRITERIA BASED DEBIT NOTE ENTRIES VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             7.	ATTACHMENT MISSING OR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தா, DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ணின PERSONக்கு IMMEDIATE MAIL போடணும்.

CHECK:

               •	ALL DEBIT NOTE ENTRIESல ABOVE CRITERIA MEET ஆகுதுா என்பதை VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
               •	ATTACHMENTS PROPER இருக்கா CROSS CHECK பண்ணணும்.
               •	PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENT LIST MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.

ACT + IMPACT:

               •	REGULAR GAP IDENTIFIEDனா ROOT CAUSE ANALYSE பண்ணி PREVENTIVE ACTION PLAN IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.
               •	REPEATED DEFAULTER இருந்தா ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.

IMPACT: PROPER DOCUMENTATION ENSURES AUDIT COMPLIANCE, PREVENTS MATERIAL LOSS DISPUTE, AND STRENGTHENS ACCOUNTABILITY.

  id = 8886
  seq_no = 950
  checking_point = REJECTION STOCK ANALYSIS & DEBIT NOTE ESCALATION
  description = REJECTION STOCK ANALYSIS & DEBIT NOTE ESCALATION

PLAN:

WE NEED TO REGULARLY ANALYSE THE REJECTION STOCK AND ENSURE THE DEBIT NOTE IS RAISED PROMPTLY FOR REJECTED MATERIALS.

DO:

             1.	ANALYSE REJECT STOCK AND PREPARE REPORT.
             2.	SEND REPORT TO PURCHASE TEAM FOR ACTION.
             3.	ESCALATE TO PURCHASE TEAM TO CREATE DEBIT NOTE FOR REJECTED MATERIALS.
             4.	FOLLOW THESE STEPS FOR ANALYSIS:
                    A. LOGIN INTO ERP
                    B. GO TO MIS > QUALITY > REJECTION ANALYSIS
                    C. SET FROM DATE AND TO DATE
                    D. ENABLE REJECTION ONLY CHECKBOX
                    E. CLICK SEARCH
                    F. REJECTION ITEM CODES AND QTY WILL APPEAR – CLICK ON REJECTION QTY
                   G. SUPPLIER LIST POPUP WILL OPEN – VERIFY SUPPLIER DETAILS

CHECK:

EXPORT DATA INTO EXCEL AND EMAIL TO PURCHASE TEAM FOR INITIATING DEBIT NOTE PROCESS.

ACT:

IF DEBIT NOTE NOT RAISED WITHIN 2 DAYS, ESCALATE TO MANAGEMENT VIA MAIL.
IMPACT: ENSURES TIMELY ACCOUNTING OF REJECTED STOCK AND FINANCIAL RECOVERY FROM SUPPLIERS, AVOIDING LOSS AND MAINTAINING VENDOR ACCOUNTABILITY.

TAMIL

PLAN:

REJECT STOCK ANALYSE பண்ணி REPORT PREPARE பண்ணி PURCHASE TEAM க்கு அனுப்பணும். REJECTED MATERIAL காக DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

DO:

             1.	REJECT STOCK ANALYSE பண்ணி REPORT READY பண்ணணும்.
             2.	REPORT PURCHASE TEAM க்கு MAIL பண்ணணும்.
             3.	DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்ல ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.
             4.	BELOW STEPS FOLLOW பண்ணி REJECT STOCK CHECK பண்ணலாம்:
                    A. ERPல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
                    B. MIS → QUALITY → REJECTION ANALYSIS க்கு போங்க
                    C. DATE FROM & DATE TO SET பண்ணுங்க
                   D. “REJECTION ONLY” CHECKBOX ENABLE பண்ணுங்க
                   E. SEARCH பண்ணுங்க
                   F. REJECT ITEM CODE & QTY வரும் – REJECT QTY கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
                  G. SUPPLIER LIST POPUP வரும் – SUPPLIER NAME CHECK பண்ணலாம்

CHECK:

EXCELல DATA EXPORT பண்ணி PURCHASE TEAM க்கு MAIL பண்ணி DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

ACT:

2 DAYS கும் மேல DEBIT NOTE RAISE ஆகலனா, MANAGEMENT க்கு ESCALATE MAIL போடணும்.
IMPACT: REJECT MATERIAL கான AMOUNT TRACK ஆகும், SUPPLIER ACCOUNTABILITY MAINTAIN ஆகும், LOSS AVOID பண்ணலாம்.

  seq_no = 951
  checking_point = SUSPENSE AMOUNT REPORT SEND WEEKLY TO RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE
  description = SUSPENSE AMOUNT REPORT SEND WEEKLY TO RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE

PLAN:

TO ENSURE TIMELY CLEARANCE OF SUSPENSE AMOUNTS, A WEEKLY REPORT MUST BE GENERATED AND SENT TO THE RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ENTRY. THIS HELPS IN MAINTAINING ACCOUNT ACCURACY AND SUPPORTS AUDIT COMPLIANCE.

DO:

             1.	LOGIN TO THE EXISTING ERP SYSTEM.
             2.	NAVIGATE TO FINANCE → LEDGER REPORT.
             3.	SET THE DATE RANGE FOR THE WEEK.
             4.	EXPORT THE REPORT AS EXCEL.
             5.	SEND THE REPORT TO THE CONCERNED EMPLOYEE VIA EMAIL.

CHECK:

               •	VERIFY EMAIL IS SENT (CHECK SENT FOLDER OR ERP MAIL LOG).
               •	 THE REPORT INCLUDES THE CORRECT WEEK’S DATA.
               •	ENSURE EMPLOYEE HAS ACKNOWLEDGED RECEIPT (REPLY/READ RECEIPT).

ACT:

               •	IF THERE'S NO ACTION FROM THE EMPLOYEE WITHIN 2 WEEKS, ESCALATE THE MATTER TO THE HOD.
               •	AT THE END OF EVERY MONTH, COMPILE A SUMMARY OF ALL SUSPENSE REPORTS AND BALANCES WITH REMARKS.
               •	IMPACT: REGULAR REPORTING ENSURES FASTER SUSPENSE CLEARANCE, IMPROVES ACCOUNTABILITY, AND AIDS IN SMOOTH AUDIT PROCESSES.
 

TAMIL:

PLAN:

SUSPENSE AMOUNT பாக்கியுள்ள REPORT-ஐ WEEKLY ONCE RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE-க்கு SHARE பண்ணனும். இது ACCOUNT CLEARING SPEED-ஆ நடக்க HELP பண்ணும்.

DO:

             1.	EXISTING ERP-ல LOGIN பண்ணவும்.
             2.	GO TO FINANCE → LEDGER REPORT.
             3.	WEEK RANGE SET பண்ணி SEARCH பண்ணவும்.
             4.	REPORT EXPORT AS EXCEL.
             5.	RESPECTIVE EMPLOYEE MAIL ID-க்கு FORWARD பண்ண WITH SUBJECT: "WEEKLY SUSPENSE AMOUNT – <DATE>".
             6.	MAIL CC – ACCOUNTS HEAD / REPORTING MANAGER.
CHECK:

               •	MAIL SENT LOG CHECK பண்ணனும் – SENT FOLDER / ERP LOG.
               •	ATTACH CORRECT WEEK'S REPORT.
               •	EMPLOYEE ACKNOWLEDGMENT CHECK பண்ணனும் (READ RECEIPT OR REPLY).

ACT:

               •	IF EMPLOYEE RESPONSE DELAY OR AMOUNT NOT CLEARED 2 WEEKS-க்கு மேல, ESCALATE TO HOD.
               •	MONTH-END SUMMARY PREPARE பண்ணி, TOTAL SUSPENSE BALANCE WITH REMARKS SUBMIT பண்ணனும்.
               •	IMPACT – TIMELY SUBMISSION SUSPENSE CLEAR ஆகுறதுக்கு KEY ROLE PLAY பண்ணும்; FINANCIAL AUDIT-க்கும் SUPPORT ஆகும்.

Row:
  id = 8889
  seq_no = 953
  checking_point = JODC ACKNOWLEDGEMENT
  description = JODC ACKNOWLEDGEMENT

PLAN:
ENSURE DAILY MONITORING OF JODC SCREEN TO VERIFY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS. THE OBJECTIVE IS TO IDENTIFY AND ACT ON ANY MISSING OR PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.
DO:
1.	CHECK JODC SCREEN DAILY FOR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS.
2.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS PENDING, SEND A FOLLOW-UP EMAIL TO THE PURCHASE DEPARTMENT OR CONCERNED PERSON.
3.	IF MATERIAL IS SENT VIA LOGISTICS:
  - SEND AN ACKNOWLEDGEMENT EMAIL TO THE SUPPLIER/RECEIVER IMMEDIATELY.
  - ATTACH THE SOFT COPY OF THE JODC AND LR COPY IN THE EMAIL.
  - ATTACH THE SENT EMAIL IN THE JODC ENTRY.
4.	IF MATERIAL IS HANDED OVER DIRECTLY (OUR SCOPE):
  - GET SEAL AND SIGNATURE FROM SUPPLIER/RECEIVER.
  - ATTACH THE SIGNED DOCUMENT IN THE JODC ENTRY.
5.	IF SUPPLIER/DRIVER COLLECTS MATERIAL DIRECTLY:
  - OBTAIN SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER, AND ANY GOVERNMENT ID PROOF.
  - ATTACH THE PROOF IN THE JODC ENTRY.
6.	VERIFY EACH JODC ENTRY FOR COMPLIANCE WITH THE ABOVE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT CRITERIA.
7.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS MISSING, EMAIL THE PERSON WHO RAISED THE JODC FOR FOLLOW-UP.
CHECK:
•	CROSS-VERIFY EACH JODC ENTRY AGAINST THE CHECKLIST.
•	ENSURE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED.
•	MAINTAIN A LOG OF PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS FOR FOLLOW-UP.
ACT + IMPACT:
•	IF FREQUENT GAPS ARE FOUND, ANALYZE ROOT CAUSES AND IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE ACTIONS.
•	ESCALATE REPEATED NON-COMPLIANCE TO THE APPROPRIATE AUTHORITY.
IMPACT: ENSURES AUDIT READINESS, REDUCES MATERIAL DISPATCH DISPUTES, STRENGTHENS INTERNAL CONTROLS, AND IMPROVES SUPPLIER ACCOUNTABILITY.


PLAN:
DAILY BASISல JODC SCREENல ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கும் ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS CHECK பண்ணணும். ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MISSING OR PENDING இருக்கா என்பதை IDENTIFY பண்ணுறது MAIN GOAL.
DO:
1.	JODC SCREENல் ATTACH பண்ணிய ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS DAILY CHECK பண்ணணும்.
2.	ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தால் PURCHASE DEPT / CONSENT PERSONக்கு MAIL போடணும்.
3.	MATERIAL LOGISTICSல அனுப்பினால்:
  - ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MAIL CONSENT SUPPLIER/RECEIVERக்கு IMMEDIATEஆனு போனாகணும்.
  - MAILல JODC SOFT COPY + LR COPY ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
  - அந்த MAIL JODC ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
4.	MATERIAL நம்ம SCOPEல OR DIRECT HANDOVER பண்ணினா:
  - SUPPLIER/RECEIVER SEAL + SIGNATURE வாங்கணும்.
  - அதை SCAN பண்ணி JODC ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
5.	SUPPLIER/DRIVER MATERIAL COLLECT பண்ணினா:
  - SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER + GOVT ID PROOF வாங்கி ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
6.	மேலே சொன்ன CRITERIA BASED JODC ENTRIES VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
7.	ATTACHMENT MISSING OR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தா, JODC RAISE பண்ணின PERSONக்கு IMMEDIATE MAIL போடணும்.
CHECK:
•	ALL JODC ENTRIESல ABOVE CRITERIA MEET ஆகுதுா என்பதை VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
•	ATTACHMENTS PROPER இருக்கா CROSS CHECK பண்ணணும்.
•	PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENT LIST MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.
ACT + IMPACT:
•	REGULAR GAP IDENTIFIEDனா ROOT CAUSE ANALYSE பண்ணி PREVENTIVE ACTION PLAN IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.
REPEATED DEFAULTER இருந்தா ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.
IMPACT: PROPER DOCUMENTATION ENSURES AUDIT COMPLIANCE, PREVENTS MATERIAL LOSS DISPUTE, AND STRENGTHENS ACCOUNTABILITY.

  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - PRODUCT CONVERSION - NAPL

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM PLANNING DEPARTMENT.
VERIFY THE MAIL FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, AND REASON.
ENSURE THAT PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL IS CLEARLY MENTIONED IN THE MAIL.

DO
LOG IN TO THE OLD ERP SYSTEM.
NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT
IF THE MAIL LACKS REQUIRED DETAILS, REPLY TO THE USER REQUESTING COMPLETE INFORMATION.
IF APPROVAL FROM UMAPATHY IS NOT MENTIONED, REPLY ASKING THE USER TO GET APPROVAL AND RESEND THE MAIL.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
PLANNING DEPARTMENT  இருந்து MAIL வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON CORRECTா இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
ENSURE APPROVAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MAIL AS "PLANNING DEPARTMENT".
APPROVAL PLANNING DEPARTMENT எடுக்கனும்.
LOGIN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL.
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM A NEW ENTRY IS CREATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL WITH THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

PLAN:

               •	PLAN TO CONDUCT MANAGEMENT REVIEW MEETING (MRM) MONTHLY AS PER ORGANIZATIONAL REQUIREMENT.
               •	SHARE MEETING AGENDA TO MANAGEMENT TEAM. 
  
DO:

             1.	CREATE MEETING SCHEDULE:
                      O	LOGIN TO NEW ERP → CLICK GREEN ARROW (LEFT) → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE.
                      O	CLICK ADD AND FILL IN: MEETING TYPE, DATE, FREQUENCY, START/END TIME, INTERVAL, DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS → SAVE.
             2.	MARK ATTENDANCE:
                      O	USE EITHER MOBILE OR WEB LOGIN TO MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH HOST AND PARTICIPANTS POST MEETING.

CHECK:

               •	SHARE MOM WITH ALL ATTENDEES FOR CONFIRMATION AND ACTION.
               •	REVIEW ACTION POINTS FROM THE PREVIOUS MRM AND TRACK CLOSURE STATUS.

ACT:

               •	ASSIGN OWNERS AND TARGET DATES FOR ALL NEW ACTION POINTS IDENTIFIED IN THE MEETING.
               •	INITIATE CORRECTIVE OR PREVENTIVE ACTIONS FOR GAPS DISCUSSED.
               •	ESCALATE ANY UNRESOLVED ISSUES OR RESOURCE/TRAINING NEEDS TO TOP MANAGEMENT FOR APPROVAL.
               •	ARCHIVE ALL RECORDS RELATED TO MRM FOR AUDIT READINESS.


TAMIL:

PLAN:

               •	மாதம் ஒருமுறை அல்லது காலாண்டில் ஒருமுறை MRM (MANAGEMENT REVIEW MEETING) நடத்த திட்டமிட வேண்டும்.
               •	AGENDA & INVITE LIST (TOP MANAGEMENT, MR, DEPT. HEADS) ப்ரியர் நாள் CIRCULATE செய்ய வேண்டும்.

DO:

             1.	LOGIN பண்ணுங்க NEW ERP-ல
             2.	LEFT SIDE GREEN ARROW CLICK பண்ணி → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE
             3.	"ADD" CLICK பண்ணி FILL பண்ணனும்:
                       • MEETING TYPE
                       • MEETING DATE, FREQUENCY
                       • START, INTERVAL & END TIME
                       • DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS
                       • SAVE பண்ணுங்க
🎯 SCHEDULE CREATE ஆகும் பிறகு ATTENDANCE UPDATE பண்ணனும். PARTICIPANTS & HOST இருவரும் ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணனும் (WEB/MOBILE).

CHECK:

          • MOM COPY ALL PARTICIPANTS க்கு SHARE பண்ணணும்.
          • LAST MRMல DISCUSSED ACTIONS, DEADLINES REVIEW பண்ணி STATUS UPDATE எடுக்கணும்.

ACT:

         • MOMல FINALIZED ACTION POINTS க்கு RESPONSIBLE PERSON ASSIGN பண்ணி, TIMELINE SET பண்ணணும்.
         • IDENTIFIED GAPS க்கு CORRECTIVE ACTIONS INITIATE பண்ணணும்.
         • RESOURCE REQUIREMENT/TRAINING NEEDS இருந்து இருந்தா MANAGEMENT APPROVAL க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.
