  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - DELETE DOCUMENTS

PLAN:
ENSURE SECURE AND VERIFIED DELETION OF DOCUMENTS FROM ERP SYSTEM ONLY UPON RECEIVING COMPLETE REQUEST WITH VALID REASON AND SUPPORTING DATA.
DO:
1.	RECEIVE EMAIL REQUESTING DOCUMENT DELETION.
2.	VERIFY EMAIL CONTAINS:
• SCREEN DETAIL WITH ENTRY NUMBER
• RELEVANT ATTACHMENTS
• REASON OR REMARKS FOR DELETION
3.	IDENTIFY SCREEN TYPE:
• PURCHASE ITEM ENTRY SCREEN OR
• MANUFACTURING ITEM ENTRY SCREEN
4.	IF IT IS A PURCHASE ITEM ENTRY:
O	LOG IN TO ERP WITH ADMIN ID
O	GO TO: MASTER → INVENTORY → PURCHASE
O	ENTER ITEM CODE, CLICK LOAD
O	CLICK ACTION → DOCUMENT
O	DOWNLOAD THE DOCUMENT AS BACKUP
O	DELETE THE SPECIFIED DOCUMENT
5.	IF IT IS A MANUFACTURING ENTRY, FOLLOW SIMILAR NAVIGATION IN MANUFACTURING MODULE.
6.	AFTER DELETION, REPLY TO THE REQUESTER CONFIRMING DELETION IS COMPLETED.
CHECK:
         
•	ENSURE ALL REQUIRED INFORMATION IS IN THE EMAIL BEFORE ACTION.
•	CONFIRM SCREEN TYPE AND ITEM CODE MATCHES BEFORE DELETION.
•	ALWAYS DOWNLOAD AND STORE DOCUMENT BEFORE DELETION FOR TRACEABILITY.
 ACT:
•	IF EMAIL LACKS DETAILS, REVERT TO SENDER REQUESTING MISSING INFO.
•	MAINTAIN LOG OF DELETED DOCUMENTS (DATE, ENTRY NO, REQUESTER).
•	REVIEW THIS PROCESS PERIODICALLY TO IMPROVE TRACEABILITY AND CONTROL.


PLAN:
DOCUMENT DELETE பண்ணும்போது PROPER MAIL, REASON & BACKUP FILES VERIFY பண்ணி DELETE பண்ணுறது தான் GOAL.
DO:
1.	MAIL ல DOCUMENT DELETE REQUEST வந்ததும் OPEN பண்ணனும்.
2.	MAIL-ல இதெல்லாம் இருக்கணும்:
• SCREEN DETAIL (ENTRY NUMBER கூட)
• ATTACHMENT (SUPPORTING FILE)
• DELETION REASON OR REMARKS
3.	SCREEN TYPE IDENTIFY பண்ணனும்:
• PURCHASE ITEM ENTRY SCREEN
• MANUFACTURING ITEM ENTRY SCREEN
4.	PURCHASE ITEM ENTRYனா:
➤ ERP-க்கு ADMIN ID வச்சு LOGIN பண்ணனும்
➤ GO TO: MASTER → INVENTORY → PURCHASE
➤ "ITEM CODE" ENTER பண்ணி LOAD CLICK பண்ணனும்
➤ ACTION → DOCUMENT SELECT பண்ணனும்
➤ DOCUMENT-ஐ DOWNLOAD பண்ணி SAFE-A வைச்சுட்டு
➤ THEN DOCUMENT-ஐ DELETE பண்ணனும்
5.	MANUFACTURING ENTRY இருந்தா RELATED SCREENல NAVIGATE பண்ணி SAME STEPS FOLLOW பண்ணனும்
6.	DELETE பண்ணியதும் REQUESTER-க்கு REPLY MAIL போடணும் WITH CONFIRMATION.
CHECK:
•	MAIL-ல FULL DETAIL இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணனும்
•	 CORRECT SCREEN & ITEM CODE CONFIRM பண்ணி DELETE பண்ணனும்
•	DELETE பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி FILE-ஐ DOWNLOAD பண்ணி BACKUP வைச்சுக்கணும்
 ACT:
•	DETAIL MISSING இருந்தா MAIL-BACK பண்ணி CLARIFY பண்ணிக்கணும்
•	DELETED ENTRIES-க்கு ஒரு LOG MAINTAIN பண்ணனும் (DATE, ENTRY NO, PERSON)
•	 PROCESS-ஐ REGULAR-A REVIEW பண்ணி IMPROVE பண்ணனும்

Row:
  id = 8893
  seq_no = 957
  checking_point = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - DELETE ENTRY
  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - DELETE ENTRY

PLAN

ENSURE DELETION OF  ENTRIES IS DONE ONLY UPON PROPER EMAIL REQUEST. VERIFY ALL NECESSARY INFORMATION IS INCLUDED BEFORE PROCEEDING.

DO

1.RECEIVE THE EMAIL CONTAINING THE ENTRY TO BE DELETED.
2.ENSURE THE EMAIL INCLUDES:
   • ENTRY DETAILS (E.G., PO NUMBER)
   • ATTACHMENTS (SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS)
   • REASON FOR DELETION OR REMARKS
3.FOR EXAMPLE: IF THE MAIL REFERS TO DELETION OF A PURCHASE ORDER ENTRY.
4.LOG IN TO THE EXISTING ERP SYSTEM USING ERP ADMIN ID.
5.NAVIGATE TO: PURCHASE → PURCHASE ORDER
6.UNDER “PO NO”, ENTER THE ENTRY NUMBER AND CLICK LOAD.
7.IF THE ENTRY WAS WRONGLY CREATED AND A NEW ONE HAS BEEN MADE, PROCEED TO DELETE. OTHERWISE, SHORT CLOSE THE PO.
8.FIRST, ATTEMPT TO DELETE:
     •	SELECT DELETE → CLICK IT.
9.IF DELETION IS NOT APPROPRIATE:
     •	SELECT ACTION → CLOSE TO SHORT CLOSE THE ENTRY.
10.AFTER PERFORMING THE ACTION, REPLY TO THE ORIGINAL EMAIL CONFIRMING THE ENTRY HAS BEEN DELETED OR SHORT CLOSED.

 CHECK
VERIFY THE VALIDITY OF THE REQUEST, CONFIRM BACKUP (IF NEEDED), AND ENSURE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER IS SELECTED. REVIEW IF THE DELETION IS NECESSARY OR IF SHORT CLOSING IS SUFFICIENT.

ACT

IF ANY REQUIRED INFORMATION IS MISSING IN THE MAIL, REQUEST CLARIFICATION BEFORE PROCEEDING. MAINTAIN A RECORD OF DELETED OR SHORT-CLOSED ENTRIES FOR AUDIT PURPOSES.

PLAN

ENTRY DELETE பண்ணறது, PROPER மற்றும் COMPLETE ஆன EMAIL REQUEST வந்ததுக்கு பிறகுதான் செய்யணும். ACTION எடுக்கறதுக்கு முன்னாடி எல்லா REQUIRED INFORMATION இருந்துச்சா நிச்சயமாக CHECK பண்ணணும்.

DO

1.ENTRY DELETE REQUEST MAIL RECEIVE ஆகணும்.
2.MAILல இருக்க வேண்டிய MAIN DETAILS:
   • ENTRY DETAILS (EX: PO NO)
   • ATTACHMENTS (SUPPORTING DOC)
   • REASON FOR DELETION OR REMARKS
3.EXAMPLE – PURCHASE ORDER ENTRY DELETE REQUEST MAIL வந்திருக்கு அப்படின்னு ASSUME பண்ணலாம்.
4.ERP SYSTEMல ADMIN ID USE பண்ணி LOGIN பண்ணனும்.
5.NAVIGATE TO: PURCHASE → PURCHASE ORDER
6."PO NO"ல ENTRY NUMBER TYPE பண்ணி LOAD பண்ணனும்.
7.ENTRY WRONGLY CREATE பண்ணி NEW ENTRY CREATE பண்ணிருப்பாங்கனா DELETE பண்ணனும். OTHERWISE, SHORT CLOSE பண்ணலாம்.
8.FIRST, DELETE OPTION TRY பண்ணனும் –
     •	SELECT DELETE → CLICK IT.
9.IF DELETION NOT SUITABLE,
     •	SELECT ACTION → CLOSE (SHORT CLOSE).
10.DELETE பண்ணதுக்கப்புறம், MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி CONFIRM பண்ணனும் – "ENTRY DELETED" OR "ENTRY SHORT CLOSED".

CHECK

DETAILS & ATTACHMENTS VERIFY பண்ணி தான் DELETE/CLOSE பண்ணனும். WRONG ENTRY CONFIRMATION இல்லையென்றா CLARIFICATION கேட்கனும்.

ACT

INFO COMPLETE இல்லனா MAIL FORWARD பண்ணி CLARIFICATION COLLECT பண்ணனும். COMPLETED ACTION MAILல் CLEARLY MENTION பண்ணனும் FOR RECORD

Row:
  id = 8894
  seq_no = 958
  checking_point = ACKNOWLEDGEMENT - DEBIT NOTE (SUPPLIER RETURN)
  description = ACKNOWLEDGEMENT - DEBIT NOTE (SUPPLIER RETURN)

PLAN:

ENSURE DAILY MONITORING OF DEBIT NOTE SCREEN TO VERIFY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS. THE OBJECTIVE IS TO IDENTIFY AND ACT ON ANY MISSING OR PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.

DO:

             1.	CHECK DEBIT NOTE SCREEN DAILY FOR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ATTACHMENTS.
             2.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS PENDING, SEND A FOLLOW-UP EMAIL TO THE PURCHASE DEPARTMENT OR CONCERNED PERSON.
             3.	IF MATERIAL IS SENT VIA LOGISTICS:
                    - SEND AN ACKNOWLEDGEMENT EMAIL TO THE SUPPLIER/RECEIVER IMMEDIATELY.
                    - ATTACH THE SOFT COPY OF THE DEBIT NOTE AND LR COPY IN THE EMAIL.
                    - ATTACH THE SENT EMAIL IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             4.	IF MATERIAL IS HANDED OVER DIRECTLY (OUR SCOPE):
                   - GET SEAL AND SIGNATURE FROM SUPPLIER/RECEIVER.
                  - ATTACH THE SIGNED DOCUMENT IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             5.	IF SUPPLIER/DRIVER COLLECTS MATERIAL DIRECTLY:
                  - OBTAIN SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER, AND ANY GOVERNMENT ID PROOF.
                  - ATTACH THE PROOF IN THE DEBIT NOTE ENTRY.
             6.	VERIFY EACH DEBIT NOTE ENTRY FOR COMPLIANCE WITH THE ABOVE  ACKNOWLEDGEMENT CRITERIA.
             7.	IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS MISSING, EMAIL THE PERSON WHO RAISED THE DEBIT NOTE FOR FOLLOW-UP.

CHECK:

               •	CROSS-VERIFY EACH DEBIT NOTE ENTRY AGAINST THE CHECKLIST.
               •	ENSURE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ARE PROPERLY ATTACHED.
               •	MAINTAIN A LOG OF PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS FOR FOLLOW-UP.

ACT + IMPACT:

               •	IF FREQUENT GAPS ARE FOUND, ANALYZE ROOT CAUSES AND IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE ACTIONS.
               •	ESCALATE REPEATED NON-COMPLIANCE TO THE APPROPRIATE AUTHORITY.

IMPACT: ENSURES AUDIT READINESS, REDUCES MATERIAL DISPATCH DISPUTES, STRENGTHENS INTERNAL CONTROLS, AND IMPROVES SUPPLIER ACCOUNTABILITY.

TAMIL:

PLAN:

DAILY BASISல DEBIT NOTE SCREENல ATTACH பண்ணிருக்கும் ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS CHECK பண்ணணும். ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MISSING OR PENDING இருக்கா என்பதை IDENTIFY பண்ணுறது MAIN GOAL.

DO:

             1.	DEBIT NOTE SCREENல் ATTACH பண்ணிய ACKNOWLEDGEMENT DOCUMENTS DAILY CHECK பண்ணணும்.
             2.	ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தால் PURCHASE DEPT / CONSENT PERSONக்கு MAIL போடணும்.
             3.	MATERIAL LOGISTICSல அனுப்பினால்:
                  - ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MAIL CONSENT SUPPLIER/RECEIVERக்கு IMMEDIATEஆனு போனாகணும்.
                 - MAILல DEBIT NOTE SOFT COPY + LR COPY ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
                 - அந்த MAIL DEBIT NOTE ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             4.	MATERIAL நம்ம SCOPEல OR DIRECT HANDOVER பண்ணினா:
                 - SUPPLIER/RECEIVER SEAL + SIGNATURE வாங்கணும்.
                 - அதை SCAN பண்ணி DEBIT NOTE ENTRYல ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             5.	SUPPLIER/DRIVER MATERIAL COLLECT பண்ணினா:
                - SIGNATURE, MOBILE NUMBER + GOVT ID PROOF வாங்கி ATTACH பண்ணணும்.
             6.	மேலே சொன்ன CRITERIA BASED DEBIT NOTE ENTRIES VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
             7.	ATTACHMENT MISSING OR ACKNOWLEDGEMENT PENDING இருந்தா, DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ணின PERSONக்கு IMMEDIATE MAIL போடணும்.

CHECK:

               •	ALL DEBIT NOTE ENTRIESல ABOVE CRITERIA MEET ஆகுதுா என்பதை VERIFY பண்ணணும்.
               •	ATTACHMENTS PROPER இருக்கா CROSS CHECK பண்ணணும்.
               •	PENDING ACKNOWLEDGEMENT LIST MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.

ACT + IMPACT:

               •	REGULAR GAP IDENTIFIEDனா ROOT CAUSE ANALYSE பண்ணி PREVENTIVE ACTION PLAN IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.
               •	REPEATED DEFAULTER இருந்தா ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.

IMPACT: PROPER DOCUMENTATION ENSURES AUDIT COMPLIANCE, PREVENTS MATERIAL LOSS DISPUTE, AND STRENGTHENS ACCOUNTABILITY.

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM PLANNING DEPARTMENT.

DO

NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT

NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

PLAN:

STORES TEAM TO CHECK AND VERIFY LOCATION WHILE MAKING PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
IF LOCATION IS NOT FOUND IN ERP, IDENTIFY A NEW PHYSICAL LOCATION IN THE STORE AND NOTE IT DOWN.

DO:

STORES TEAM:

MAKE PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
GO TO STOCK SUMMARY IN ERP.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ENTER ITEM CODE IN THE SEARCH FIELD → CLICK LOAD.
CHECK THE RACK & BIN LOCATION IN THE LINE ITEM.
PLACE THE ITEM IN THE SAME RACK & BIN LOCATION AS SHOWN IN ERP.

IF LOCATION IS NOT AVAILABLE, PLACE THE ITEM IN A NEW LOCATION, AND SEND A MAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH:
ITEM CODE
NEW RACK LOCATION
NEW BIN LOCATION

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

OPEN ERP → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM
EDIT THE ITEM BY ENTERING ITEM CODE		
GO TO “INVENTORY INFORMATION” SECTION
UPDATE RACK & BIN FIELDS WITH NEW LOCATION
REPLY TO STORES TEAM WITH SUBJECT: “LOCATION UPDATED”

CHECK:

ERP-ADMIN TO VERIFY MAIL TRAIL AND ERP ENTRY LOG WEEKLY.

ACT:

IMPACT TO COMPANY:

TIME WASTED DURING ITEM RETRIEVAL.
DELAY IN PRODUCTION OR DELIVERY.
MISCOMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEPARTMENTS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

ENGLISH

PLAN

REQUEST WFH APPROVAL BY EMAIL FROM VERTICAL HEAD WITH VALID REASON.

DO

ENSURE AVAILABILITY OVER PHONE/MAIL DURING WORK HOURS.

CHECK

ACT

DISCUSS ISSUES (IF ANY) WITH VERTICAL HEAD FOR FUTURE IMPROVEMENT.


TANGLISH:

PLAN

WORK FROM HOME (WFH) காக VALID REASON MENTION பண்ணி VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல APPROVAL கேக்கணும்.
WFH DAY ல பண்ண வேண்டிய ACTIVITIES LIST தயார் பண்ணணும்.
இந்த ACTIVITY LIST, WFH கு 2 DAYS முன்னாடி MAIL பண்ணி, 1 DAY முன்னாடி APPROVAL வாங்கணும்.

WORK HOURS குள்ள PHONE / MAIL REACHABLE ஆ இருக்கணும்.
VERTICAL HEAD கேட்கும் போது STATUS UPDATE குடுக்கணும்.

CHECK

WFH முடிச்சதுக்கு அப்புறம் VERTICAL HEAD கிட்ட MAIL ல STATUS UPDATE அனுப்பணும்.
COMPLETE ஆன TASK, PENDING TASK & REASON MENTION பண்ணணும்.

ACT

PENDING இருக்கற TASK கு COMPLETION TIME FIX பண்ணணும்.
FUTURE WFH IMPROVE பண்ண VERTICAL HEAD உடன் DISCUSS பண்ணணும்.

  checking_point = REJECTION STOCK ANALYSIS & DEBIT NOTE ESCALATION
  description = REJECTION STOCK ANALYSIS & DEBIT NOTE ESCALATION

PLAN:

WE NEED TO REGULARLY ANALYSE THE REJECTION STOCK AND ENSURE THE DEBIT NOTE IS RAISED PROMPTLY FOR REJECTED MATERIALS.

DO:

             1.	ANALYSE REJECT STOCK AND PREPARE REPORT.
             2.	SEND REPORT TO PURCHASE TEAM FOR ACTION.
             3.	ESCALATE TO PURCHASE TEAM TO CREATE DEBIT NOTE FOR REJECTED MATERIALS.
             4.	FOLLOW THESE STEPS FOR ANALYSIS:
                    A. LOGIN INTO ERP
                    B. GO TO MIS > QUALITY > REJECTION ANALYSIS
                    C. SET FROM DATE AND TO DATE
                    D. ENABLE REJECTION ONLY CHECKBOX
                    E. CLICK SEARCH
                    F. REJECTION ITEM CODES AND QTY WILL APPEAR – CLICK ON REJECTION QTY
                   G. SUPPLIER LIST POPUP WILL OPEN – VERIFY SUPPLIER DETAILS

CHECK:

EXPORT DATA INTO EXCEL AND EMAIL TO PURCHASE TEAM FOR INITIATING DEBIT NOTE PROCESS.

ACT:

IF DEBIT NOTE NOT RAISED WITHIN 2 DAYS, ESCALATE TO MANAGEMENT VIA MAIL.
IMPACT: ENSURES TIMELY ACCOUNTING OF REJECTED STOCK AND FINANCIAL RECOVERY FROM SUPPLIERS, AVOIDING LOSS AND MAINTAINING VENDOR ACCOUNTABILITY.

TAMIL

PLAN:

REJECT STOCK ANALYSE பண்ணி REPORT PREPARE பண்ணி PURCHASE TEAM க்கு அனுப்பணும். REJECTED MATERIAL காக DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

DO:

             1.	REJECT STOCK ANALYSE பண்ணி REPORT READY பண்ணணும்.
             2.	REPORT PURCHASE TEAM க்கு MAIL பண்ணணும்.
             3.	DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்ல ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.
             4.	BELOW STEPS FOLLOW பண்ணி REJECT STOCK CHECK பண்ணலாம்:
                    A. ERPல LOGIN பண்ணுங்க
                    B. MIS → QUALITY → REJECTION ANALYSIS க்கு போங்க
                    C. DATE FROM & DATE TO SET பண்ணுங்க
                   D. “REJECTION ONLY” CHECKBOX ENABLE பண்ணுங்க
                   E. SEARCH பண்ணுங்க
                   F. REJECT ITEM CODE & QTY வரும் – REJECT QTY கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க
                  G. SUPPLIER LIST POPUP வரும் – SUPPLIER NAME CHECK பண்ணலாம்

CHECK:

EXCELல DATA EXPORT பண்ணி PURCHASE TEAM க்கு MAIL பண்ணி DEBIT NOTE RAISE பண்ண சொல்லணும்.

ACT:

2 DAYS கும் மேல DEBIT NOTE RAISE ஆகலனா, MANAGEMENT க்கு ESCALATE MAIL போடணும்.
IMPACT: REJECT MATERIAL கான AMOUNT TRACK ஆகும், SUPPLIER ACCOUNTABILITY MAINTAIN ஆகும், LOSS AVOID பண்ணலாம்.

PLAN:

               •	PLAN TO CONDUCT MANAGEMENT REVIEW MEETING (MRM) MONTHLY AS PER ORGANIZATIONAL REQUIREMENT.
               •	SHARE MEETING AGENDA TO MANAGEMENT TEAM. 
  
DO:

             1.	CREATE MEETING SCHEDULE:
                      O	LOGIN TO NEW ERP → CLICK GREEN ARROW (LEFT) → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE.
                      O	CLICK ADD AND FILL IN: MEETING TYPE, DATE, FREQUENCY, START/END TIME, INTERVAL, DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS → SAVE.
             2.	MARK ATTENDANCE:
                      O	USE EITHER MOBILE OR WEB LOGIN TO MARK ATTENDANCE FOR BOTH HOST AND PARTICIPANTS POST MEETING.

CHECK:

               •	SHARE MOM WITH ALL ATTENDEES FOR CONFIRMATION AND ACTION.
               •	REVIEW ACTION POINTS FROM THE PREVIOUS MRM AND TRACK CLOSURE STATUS.

ACT:

               •	ASSIGN OWNERS AND TARGET DATES FOR ALL NEW ACTION POINTS IDENTIFIED IN THE MEETING.
               •	INITIATE CORRECTIVE OR PREVENTIVE ACTIONS FOR GAPS DISCUSSED.
               •	ESCALATE ANY UNRESOLVED ISSUES OR RESOURCE/TRAINING NEEDS TO TOP MANAGEMENT FOR APPROVAL.
               •	ARCHIVE ALL RECORDS RELATED TO MRM FOR AUDIT READINESS.


TAMIL:

PLAN:

               •	மாதம் ஒருமுறை அல்லது காலாண்டில் ஒருமுறை MRM (MANAGEMENT REVIEW MEETING) நடத்த திட்டமிட வேண்டும்.
               •	AGENDA & INVITE LIST (TOP MANAGEMENT, MR, DEPT. HEADS) ப்ரியர் நாள் CIRCULATE செய்ய வேண்டும்.

DO:

             1.	LOGIN பண்ணுங்க NEW ERP-ல
             2.	LEFT SIDE GREEN ARROW CLICK பண்ணி → QMS DROPDOWN → MEETING DROPDOWN → MEETING SCHEDULE
             3.	"ADD" CLICK பண்ணி FILL பண்ணனும்:
                       • MEETING TYPE
                       • MEETING DATE, FREQUENCY
                       • START, INTERVAL & END TIME
                       • DEPARTMENT, CHAIRED BY, HOST, PARTICIPANTS
                       • SAVE பண்ணுங்க
🎯 SCHEDULE CREATE ஆகும் பிறகு ATTENDANCE UPDATE பண்ணனும். PARTICIPANTS & HOST இருவரும் ATTENDANCE MARK பண்ணனும் (WEB/MOBILE).

CHECK:

          • MOM COPY ALL PARTICIPANTS க்கு SHARE பண்ணணும்.
          • LAST MRMல DISCUSSED ACTIONS, DEADLINES REVIEW பண்ணி STATUS UPDATE எடுக்கணும்.

ACT:

         • MOMல FINALIZED ACTION POINTS க்கு RESPONSIBLE PERSON ASSIGN பண்ணி, TIMELINE SET பண்ணணும்.
         • IDENTIFIED GAPS க்கு CORRECTIVE ACTIONS INITIATE பண்ணணும்.
         • RESOURCE REQUIREMENT/TRAINING NEEDS இருந்து இருந்தா MANAGEMENT APPROVAL க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.

  checking_point = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - PRODUCT CONVERSION - NUTECH
  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - PRODUCT CONVERSION - NUTECH

PLAN
RECEIVE MAIL FROM PLANNING DEPARTMENT.
VERIFY THE MAIL FOR ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, AND REASON.
ENSURE THAT PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL IS CLEARLY MENTIONED IN THE MAIL.

DO
LOG IN TO THE OLD ERP SYSTEM.
NAVIGATE TO: PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER ALL THE DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL (ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON).
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM THAT A NEW ENTRY NUMBER IS GENERATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL AND MENTION THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER FOR REFERENCE.

CHECK
ENSURE ALL ENTERED DATA MATCHES THE MAIL.
CONFIRM THAT THE ENTRY IS SUCCESSFULLY SAVED.
VERIFY THAT THE REPLY INCLUDES THE CORRECT ENTRY NUMBER.

ACT
IF THE MAIL LACKS REQUIRED DETAILS, REPLY TO THE USER REQUESTING COMPLETE INFORMATION.
IF APPROVAL FROM UMAPATHY IS NOT MENTIONED, REPLY ASKING THE USER TO GET APPROVAL AND RESEND THE MAIL.

PLAN (திட்டமிடு)
PLANNING DEPARTMENT  இருந்து MAIL வந்ததும்.
ITEM CODE, QUANTITY, RATE, REASON CORRECTா இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணுங்க.

DO (செய்)
ENSURE APPROVAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MAIL AS "PLANNING DEPARTMENT".
APPROVAL PLANNING DEPARTMENT எடுக்கனும்.
LOGIN TO THE OLD ERP → GO TO PRODUCTION → PRODUCT CONVERSION → CLICK "CREATE NEW".
ENTER DETAILS FROM THE RECEIVED MAIL.
SAVE THE ENTRY AND CONFIRM A NEW ENTRY IS CREATED.
COPY THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
REPLY TO THE RECEIVED MAIL WITH THE NEW ENTRY NUMBER.
NEW ENTRY NUMBER MAILக்கு REPLY பண்ணி அனுப்புங்க.

CHECK (சோதனை செய்)
CONFIRM THAT:
ALL DETAILS FROM THE MAIL ARE CORRECT.
NEW ENTRY IS CREATED SUCCESSFULLY.
ENTRY NUMBER IS SHARED WITH THE USER.

ACT (நடத்து)
MAILல் DETAILS சரி இல்லா, USERக்கு EXTRA DETAILS கேட்டுப் போங்க.
APPROVAL இல்லனா, PLANNING DEPARTMENT APPROVAL வாங்கி MAIL RESEND பண்ணுங்க.

  description = STORE LOCATION MAIL UPDATE (NAPL)

PLAN:

STORES TEAM TO CHECK AND VERIFY LOCATION WHILE MAKING PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
IF LOCATION IS NOT FOUND IN ERP, IDENTIFY A NEW PHYSICAL LOCATION IN THE STORE AND NOTE IT DOWN.

DO:

STORES TEAM:

MAKE PO INWARD / JO INWARD ENTRY IN ERP.
GO TO STOCK SUMMARY IN ERP.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ENTER ITEM CODE IN THE SEARCH FIELD → CLICK LOAD.
CHECK THE RACK & BIN LOCATION IN THE LINE ITEM.
PLACE THE ITEM IN THE SAME RACK & BIN LOCATION AS SHOWN IN ERP.

IF LOCATION IS NOT AVAILABLE, PLACE THE ITEM IN A NEW LOCATION, AND SEND A MAIL TO ERP ADMIN WITH:
ITEM CODE
NEW RACK LOCATION
NEW BIN LOCATION

ERP-ADMIN TEAM:

OPEN ERP → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM
EDIT THE ITEM BY ENTERING ITEM CODE		
GO TO “INVENTORY INFORMATION” SECTION
UPDATE RACK & BIN FIELDS WITH NEW LOCATION
REPLY TO STORES TEAM WITH SUBJECT: “LOCATION UPDATED”

CHECK:

DEPARTMENT HEAD TO RANDOMLY AUDIT WHETHER ITEM IS PLACED IN UPDATED ERP LOCATION.
ERP-ADMIN TO VERIFY MAIL TRAIL AND ERP ENTRY LOG WEEKLY.

ACT:
IF ITEM IS NOT PLACED IN THE CORRECT ERP LOCATION:
IMPACT TO COMPANY:

TIME WASTED DURING ITEM RETRIEVAL.
DELAY IN PRODUCTION OR DELIVERY.
MISCOMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEPARTMENTS.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN



PLAN:

DO:
STORES TEAM:

PO/JO INWARD ENTRY ERP-ல பண்ணணும்.
STOCK SUMMARY-க்கு போங்க.
STORE TYPE: STORE STOCK
RACK: ALL
BIN: ALL
ITEM CODE-ஐ SEARCH FIELD-ல TYPE பண்ணி → LOAD கிளிக் பண்ணுங்க.
LINE ITEM-ல வரும் RACK & BIN LOCATION பாருங்க.
ERP-ல காட்டுற LOCATION-க்கே ITEM வைச்சிடுங்க.

LOCATION தெரியலனா, புது LOCATION-ல வைச்சிட்டு, கீழ்கண்ட DETAILS-ஓட  ERP ADMIN-க்கு MAIL அனுப்பணும்:

ITEM CODE
புது LOCATION NAME

ERP OPEN பண்ணி → ITEM MASTER → PURCHASE / MANUFACTURING ITEM SELECT பண்ணணும்.
ITEM CODE ENTER பண்ணி EDIT செய்யணும்.

INVENTORY INFORMATION SECTION-க்கு போய்:
RACK & BIN FIELDS இரண்டிலும் PUDHU LOCATION UPDATE பண்ணணும்.
STORES TEAM-க்கு "LOCATION UPDATED"னு MAIL REPLY பண்ணணும்: 

CHECK:
ERP ADMIN WEEKLY ONCE MAIL TRAIL VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

ACT:
சரியான LOCATION-ல ITEM இல்லன்னா:
COMPANY-க்கு IMPACT:

ITEM தேட நேரம் வீணாகும்.
PRODUCTION/DELIVERY DELAY ஆகும்.
DEPARTMENT-க்குள் MISUNDERSTANDING வரும்.

DISCIPLINARY ACTION:

IF THE ABOVE SOP NOT FOLLOWED, DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS WILL BE TAKEN

  seq_no = 975
  checking_point = HEALTH (SANITARY) CERTIFICATE RENEWAL
  description = HEALTH (SANITARY) CERTIFICATE RENEWAL

1. PLAN

ENGLISH:

* IDENTIFY THE APPLICABLE ONLINE PORTAL FOR YOUR STATE OR CITY (E.G., TAMIL NADU: T.N. E-SEVAI, CHENNAI: GREATER CHENNAI CORPORATION).
* COLLECT ESTABLISHMENT DETAILS LIKE NAME, ADDRESS, AND NUMBER OF TOILETS.
* KEEP NECESSARY DOCUMENTS READY SUCH AS SANITATION PROTOCOL AND SELF-AFFIDAVIT SIGNED BY THE AUTHORIZED PERSON.
* PLAN TO RENEW THE CERTIFICATE BEFORE EXPIRY (USUALLY EVERY 1 YEAR).

TANGLISH:

* உங்க STATE அல்லது CITY கு பொருந்தும் ONLINE PORTAL IDENTIFY பண்ணனும் (எ.கா. TAMIL NADU: T.N. E-SEVAI, CHENNAI: GREATER CHENNAI CORPORATION).
* ESTABLISHMENT DETAILS — NAME, ADDRESS, TOILETS COUNT — ரெடி பண்ணனும்.
* தேவையான DOCUMENTS (SANITATION PROTOCOL, SELF-AFFIDAVIT SIGNED BY AUTHORIZED PERSON) ரெடி வைக்கனும்.
* CERTIFICATE EXPIRY கு முன்னாடி RENEWAL PLAN பண்ணனும் (USUALLY 1 YEAR ONCE).

2. DO

ENGLISH:

* VISIT THE RESPECTIVE E-GOVERNANCE OR MUNICIPAL PORTAL.
* REGISTER OR SIGN IN USING YOUR USER ID AND PASSWORD.
* LOCATE THE “SANITARY CERTIFICATE” OR “ISSUE OF SANITARY CERTIFICATE” SERVICE.
* FILL OUT THE ONLINE FORM WITH ACCURATE DETAILS.
* UPLOAD ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS (SANITATION PROTOCOL, SELF-AFFIDAVIT, ETC.).
* SUBMIT THE APPLICATION THROUGH THE PORTAL.
* DOWNLOAD AND STORE THE GENERATED CERTIFICATE SAFELY.

TANGLISH:

* RESPECTIVE E-GOVERNANCE / MUNICIPAL PORTAL கு போங்க.
* USER ID மற்றும் PASSWORD கொண்டு LOGIN பண்ணுங்க (அல்லது REGISTER பண்ணுங்க).
* “SANITARY CERTIFICATE” SERVICE LOCATE பண்ணுங்க.
* ONLINE FORM ல CORRECT DETAILS FILL பண்ணுங்க.
* தேவையான DOCUMENTS (SANITATION PROTOCOL, SELF-AFFIDAVIT, ETC.) UPLOAD பண்ணுங்க.
* APPLICATION SUBMIT பண்ணுங்க.
* GENERATED CERTIFICATE DOWNLOAD பண்ணி SAFE ஆ STORE பண்ணுங்க.

3. CHECK

ENGLISH:

* VERIFY THAT THE APPLICATION HAS BEEN SUCCESSFULLY SUBMITTED AND RECEIVED ACKNOWLEDGMENT.
* CHECK THE STATUS OF APPROVAL ON THE PORTAL REGULARLY.
* ENSURE THE CERTIFICATE IS AVAILABLE FOR DOWNLOAD AND MATCHES ESTABLISHMENT DETAILS.
* MAINTAIN A SOFT AND HARD COPY IN RECORDS FOR AUDIT AND RENEWAL REFERENCE.

TANGLISH:

* APPLICATION SUCCESSFULLY SUBMIT ஆனது CONFIRM பண்ணுங்க, ACKNOWLEDGMENT CHECK பண்ணுங்க.
* PORTAL ல APPROVAL STATUS REGULAR ஆ CHECK பண்ணுங்க.
* CERTIFICATE DOWNLOAD பண்ணும்போது ESTABLISHMENT DETAILS VERIFY பண்ணுங்க.
* SOFT COPY & HARD COPY RECORDS ல வச்சுக்கோங்க — AUDIT / RENEWAL கு USE ஆகும்.

4. ACT

ENGLISH:

* IF ANY DISCREPANCIES ARE FOUND, IMMEDIATELY CONTACT THE RESPECTIVE MUNICIPAL OR E-SEVAI OFFICE.
* UPDATE OR CORRECT INFORMATION IF THE PORTAL REQUESTS CLARIFICATION.
* SCHEDULE THE NEXT RENEWAL BEFORE THE EXPIRY DATE TO AVOID DISRUPTION.
* RECORD THE CERTIFICATE DETAILS IN THE STATUTORY COMPLIANCE REGISTER.

TANGLISH:

* ஏதாவது MISTAKE இருந்தா உடனே MUNICIPAL OFFICE / E-SEVAI OFFICE கிட்ட CONTACT பண்ணுங்க.
* CLARIFICATION கேட்டா UPDATE / CORRECT INFORMATION கொடுங்க.
* EXPIRY DATE கு முன்னாடி NEXT RENEWAL SCHEDULE பண்ணுங்க.
* CERTIFICATE DETAILS STATUTORY COMPLIANCE REGISTER ல NOTE பண்ணி வைக்கனும்.

IMPACT TO COMPANY (IF NOT FOLLOWED)

ENGLISH:

* NON-AVAILABILITY OR EXPIRED SANITARY CERTIFICATE CAN LEAD TO:

  * LEGAL NON-COMPLIANCE AND PENALTIES FROM LOCAL AUTHORITIES
  * SUSPENSION OF TRADE LICENSE OR FACTORY OPERATIONS
  * POOR HYGIENE PERCEPTION AMONG AUDITORS, CUSTOMERS, AND REGULATORY BODIES
  * LOSS OF COMPANY REPUTATION

TANGLISH:

* SANITARY CERTIFICATE இல்லையென்றா / EXPIRY ஆச்சின்னா:

  * LEGAL NON-COMPLIANCE PENALTIES வரலாம்
  * TRADE LICENSE SUSPEND ஆகலாம் / OPERATIONS STOP ஆகலாம்
  * AUDITORS, CUSTOMERS கிட்ட COMPANY HYGIENE IMAGE AFFECT ஆகும்
  * COMPANY REPUTATION குறையலாம்

DISCIPLINARY ACTION TO USER (IF MISSED/NOT FOLLOWED)

ENGLISH:

* FIRST INSTANCE: VERBAL WARNING AND CORRECTION REMINDER.
* SECOND INSTANCE: WRITTEN WARNING AND ESCALATION TO DEPARTMENT HEAD.
* REPEATED NEGLIGENCE: DEDUCTION IN PERFORMANCE RATING AND POSSIBLE DISCIPLINARY INQUIRY.

TANGLISH:

* முதல் தடவை: VERBAL WARNING மற்றும் REMINDER கொடுக்கப்படும்.
* இரண்டாவது தடவை: WRITTEN WARNING கொடுத்து DEPARTMENT HEAD கிட்ட ESCALATE பண்ணப்படும்.
* REPEATED NEGLIGENCE: PERFORMANCE RATING REDUCE பண்ணப்படும், DISCIPLINARY ACTION INITIATE ஆகும்.

  description = OUTWARD REMITTANCE PREPARATION AND IMPORT  PAYMENT

SOP DOCUMENT NUMBER : QMS/FA/004/25-26


•	HAS THE REMITTANCE REQUEST BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE PURCHASE TEAM ALONG WITH THE PO AND PI?
•	DID YOU VERIFY THE CORRECTNESS OF PO AND PI DETAILS BEFORE PROCEEDING?
•	FOR EXISTING SUPPLIERS, WAS THE LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	FOR NEW SUPPLIERS, WAS ANY IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	HAVE ALL MANDATORY FIELDS BEEN FILLED IN THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT?
•	WAS THE DOCUMENT HANDED OVER TO THE DESIGNATED BANK WITHIN +1 WORKING DAY?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT VOUCHER BEEN CREATED IN THE ERP SYSTEM FOR THE IMPORT TRANSACTION?
•	IS THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT ATTACHED TO THE PAYMENT VOUCHER RECORD?
•	ARE ALL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK, ETC.) UPLOADED IN ERP?
•	ARE THE FILENAMES CLEAR AND CONSISTENT FOR EASY AUDIT TRACKING?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE BANK?
•	IS THE REMITTANCE ADVICE SAVED IN THE DIGITAL FOLDER SECURELY?
•	WAS THE ADVICE SHARED WITH THE BUYER THROUGH THE EXISTING MAIL LOOP?
•	IS THE ADVICE COPY ATTACHED IN THE PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD IN ERP?
•	ARE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACHED BEFORE SUBMITTING FOR APPROVAL?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT ENTRY BEEN SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL AS PER POLICY?
•	DID THE ENTRY STATUS UPDATE TO “APPROVED” WITHIN +2 WORKING DAYS?
•	HAVE YOU VERIFIED THAT ALL DOCUMENTS ARE ACCESSIBLE FOR AUDIT REFERENCE?
•	HAS A BACKUP BEEN STORED IN THE SHARED DRIVE OR SECURED FOLDER?
•	DID YOU COMMUNICATE FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION TO THE PURCHASE TEAM?
•	IS THE ENTIRE PROCESS COMPLETED WITHIN THE DEFINED TIMELINE?
•	ARE DOCUMENTS PROPERLY NAMED AND VERSION CONTROLLED?
•	IS THE SOP BEING FOLLOWED FOR EVERY IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE?
•	ARE THERE ANY PENDING REMITTANCE CONFIRMATIONS OR APPROVALS?
•	HAVE ALL RECORDS BEEN CROSS-CHECKED FOR AUDIT READINESS?

•	PURCHASE TEAM-லிருந்து REMITTANCE REQUEST, PO & PI கூட RECEIVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PO, PI DETAILS சரியா VERIFY பண்ணீங்களா PROCEED பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி?
•	EXISTING SUPPLIER-னா LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ஐ USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	புதிய SUPPLIER-க்கு IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ல இருந்து USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ல எல்லா MANDATORY FIELDS-யும் FILL பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENT-ஐ +1 WORKING DAY-க்குள் BANK-க்கு HANDOVER பண்ணீங்களா?
•	IMPORT TRANSACTION-க்கு ERP SYSTEM-ல PAYMENT VOUCHER CREATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ஐ VOUCHER RECORD-க்கு ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK COPY ETC.) ERP-ல UPLOAD பண்ணீங்களா?
•	AUDIT TRACKING EASY-ஆ இருக்க FILENAMES CLEAR-ஆ CONSISTENT-ஆ வைத்தீங்களா?
•	BANK-லிருந்து PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE கிடைச்சுதா?
•	REMITTANCE ADVICE-ஐ SECURELY DIGITAL FOLDER-ல SAVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	EXISTING MAIL LOOP-ல BUYER-க்கு ADVICE SHARE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD-ல ADVICE COPY ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா ERP-ல?
•	APPROVALக்கு SUBMIT பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி எல்லா REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	COMPANY POLICY-க்கு ஏற்ப PAYMENT ENTRY SUBMIT பண்ணீங்களா APPROVALக்கு?
•	ENTRY STATUS “APPROVED”னு +2 WORKING DAYS-க்குள்ள UPDATE ஆச்சா?
•	AUDIT REFERENCEக்கு எல்லா DOCUMENTS-யும் ACCESSIBLE-ஆ இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?
•	SHARED DRIVE அல்லது SECURED FOLDER-ல BACKUP STORE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION-ஐ PURCHASE TEAM-க்கு COMMUNICATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா PROCESS-யும் DEFINE பண்ணிய TIMELINE-க்குள்ள COMPLETE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENTS-க்கு PROPER NAMING & VERSION CONTROL FOLLOW பண்ணீங்களா?
•	ஒவ்வொரு IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE-க்கும் SOP FOLLOW பண்ணுறீங்களா?
•	எந்த REMITTANCE CONFIRMATION அல்லது APPROVAL PENDING இருக்கு?
•	எல்லா RECORDS-யும் AUDIT READINESSக்கு CROSS-CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?

  description = STOCK AUDIT QTY &  LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) - WEEKLY

SOP NO : QMS/FA/005/25-26

🟩 PLAN:

WEEKLY STOCK QUANTITY AND LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) MUST BE MAINTAINED ACCURATELY.
THE OBJECTIVE IS TO ENSURE ZERO STOCK VARIANCE, CORRECT BIN/LOCATION, AND WEEKLY CLOSURE OF DISCREPANCIES WITHOUT FAIL.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ PREPARE WEEKLY AUDIT SCHEDULE AND ITEM LIST.

DOWNLOAD WEEKLY ERP STOCK REPORT.

FINALIZE AUDIT SCOPE: HIGH-VALUE, FAST-MOVING, AND RANDOM ITEMS.

PREPARE LIST WITH ITEM CODES, ERP QTY, AND ERP LOCATION.

2️⃣ CONDUCT PHYSICAL STOCK AUDIT.

PHYSICALLY COUNT THE ITEMS AS PER THE LIST.

VERIFY IF ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION MATCHES.

RECORD ALL VARIANCES AND OBSERVATIONS IMMEDIATELY.

3️⃣ CLOSE THE WEEKLY AUDIT CHECKLIST WITH EVIDENCE.

ATTACH PHYSICAL COUNT SHEETS.

ATTACH LOCATION PHOTOS AS EVIDENCE.

ATTACH ERP SCREENSHOTS BEFORE/AFTER CORRECTIONS (IF ANY).

🟨 CHECK:

DURING WEEKLY REVIEW OR INTERNAL AUDIT, VERIFY THE FOLLOWING:

ARE ALL AUDITED ITEMS DOCUMENTED PROPERLY?

DO ERP QUANTITY AND PHYSICAL QUANTITY MATCH?

DO ERP LOCATIONS AND PHYSICAL LOCATIONS MATCH?

ARE VARIANCE OBSERVATIONS LOGGED AND SUPPORTED WITH EVIDENCE?

IS THE WEEKLY CHECKLIST FULLY COMPLETED AND ATTACHED?

TREND ANALYSIS SHOULD BE DONE TO MONITOR RECURRING ISSUES.

🟥 ACT:

IF ANY VARIANCE OR ISSUE IS IDENTIFIED DURING AUDIT:

REPORT IT IMMEDIATELY TO THE RESPONSIBLE TEAM.

CORRECT WRONG QUANTITIES OR WRONG LOCATIONS IN ERP AFTER APPROVAL.

MOVE MATERIALS TO CORRECT BINS IF MISLOCATED.

IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE AND PREVENTIVE ACTIONS TO AVOID RECURRENCE.

TARGET – ALL WEEKLY DISCREPANCIES MUST BE RESOLVED WITHIN THE SAME WEEK WITHOUT FAIL.



🟩 PLAN:

WEEKLY-ஆ STOCK QTY & LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) AUDIT REGULAR-ஆ MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.
OBJECTIVE – STOCK ACCURACY IMPROVE பண்ணி, WRONG LOCATION / QTY VARIATION AVOID பண்ணணும்.
ALL VARIANCES SHOULD BE IDENTIFIED & CLOSED EVERY WEEK WITHOUT FAIL.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ WEEKLY AUDIT SCHEDULE PREPARE பண்ணணும் (ITEM LIST + LOCATION LIST READY பண்ணி).

ERP-லிருந்த WEEKLY AUDIT ITEMS REPORT DOWNLOAD பண்ணணும்.

HIGH VALUE + FAST MOVING ITEMS PRIORITY-ஆ INCLUDE பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ PHYSICAL STOCK AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும்.

ITEM QTY நேர்ல COUNT பண்ணணும்.

ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

எந்த VARIANCE இருந்தாலும் IMMEDIATE-ஆ OBSERVATION ENTRY போடணும்.

3️⃣ CHECKLIST CLOSE பண்ணணும் WITH ATTACHMENT EVIDENCE.

COUNT SHEET ATTACH பண்ணணும்.

LOCATION PHOTO EVIDENCE UPLOAD பண்ணணும்.

ERP SCREENSHOT BEFORE/AFTER (IF ADJUSTED) ADD பண்ணணும்.

🟨 CHECK:

WEEKLY / INTERNAL AUDIT TIME-ல VERIFY பண்ணணும் –

ERP QTY VS PHYSICAL QTY MATCH ஆகுதா?

ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION PROPER-ஆ இருக்குதா?

VARIANCE OBSERVATION ENTRIES COMPLETE-ஆ இருக்குதா?

EVIDENCE ATTACHMENTS PROPERா இருக்குதா?

DISCREPANCY % TRACK பண்ணி TREND ANALYSIS பண்ணணும்.

🟥 ACT:

VARIANCE FOUND-னா IMMEDIATELY STORES / ERP TEAM-க்கு INFORM பண்ணணும்.

WRONG LOCATION இருந்தா PROPER LOCATION-க்கு MOVE பண்ணி ERP UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

WRONG POSTINGS / MISSING TRANSACTIONS இருந்தா CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுக்கணும் SAME WEEK-ல.

REPEAT ISSUES வந்தா PREVENTIVE MEASURES IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும் (TRAINING / SOP UPDATE / BIN LABELING).

TARGET – ALL WEEKLY VARIANCES SAME WEEK-ல் CLOSE பண்ணணும் WITHOUT FAIL.

  description = 🟩 PLAN:

TO ENSURE ALL PHYSICAL STOCK RECEIPTS RELATED TO CREDIT NOTES ARE PROPERLY RECEIVED AND RECORDED IN THE STORE.
OBJECTIVE – MAINTAIN STOCK ACCURACY, ENSURE PROPER DOCUMENTATION, AND AVOID DISCREPANCIES WHEN CREDIT NOTES ARE ISSUED AGAINST SALES INVOICES.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ ENSURE PHYSICAL STOCK IS RECEIVED FOR EVERY CREDIT NOTE ISSUED.

WHEN A CREDIT NOTE IS RAISED AGAINST ANY SALES INVOICE, THE CORRESPONDING PHYSICAL MATERIAL MUST BE RECEIVED BACK INTO THE STORE.

RECORD ITEM DETAILS, QUANTITY, AND CONDITION AT THE TIME OF RECEIPT.

2️⃣ VERIFY & DOCUMENT STOCK RECEIPT.

MATCH PHYSICAL STOCK WITH THE CREDIT NOTE AND ORIGINAL SALES INVOICE.

UPDATE SYSTEM ENTRIES ACCURATELY.

MAINTAIN PROPER DOCUMENTATION FOR AUDIT TRAILS.

3️⃣ HIGHLIGHT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY.

IF ANY DISCREPANCY, SHORTAGE, DAMAGE, OR MISMATCH IS FOUND, IT MUST BE REPORTED IMMEDIATELY TO THE VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT.

DO NOT PROCEED WITH STOCK AMENDMENTS WITHOUT APPROVAL.

🟨 CHECK:

DURING WEEKLY/MONTHLY AUDITS, VERIFY:

ARE ALL CREDIT-NOTE-RELATED MATERIALS PHYSICALLY RECEIVED?

ARE QUANTITIES AND ITEM DETAILS MATCHING THE CREDIT NOTE?

ARE ALL DISCREPANCIES ESCALATED PROPERLY?

ARE SYSTEM ENTRIES UPDATED CORRECTLY AND SUPPORTED WITH DOCUMENTS?

CROSS-CHECK PHYSICAL STOCK VS SYSTEM STOCK TO ENSURE ACCURACY.

🟥 ACT:

IF ANY ISSUES OR MISMATCHES ARE FOUND, GET APPROVAL FROM THE VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT BEFORE MAKING CORRECTIONS.

IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE AND PREVENTIVE MEASURES TO AVOID RECURRENCE (IMPROVE DOCUMENTATION, STRENGTHEN RETURN PROCESS, IMPROVE VERIFICATION STEPS).

ENSURE ALL CREDIT-NOTE-RELATED STOCK DISCREPANCIES ARE CLOSED IN A TIMELY MANNER.

🟩 PLAN:

CREDIT NOTE ISSUE பண்ணும்போது அதுக்கு RELATED PHYSICAL STOCK CORRECT-ஆ RECEIVE பண்ணணும்.
OBJECTIVE – STOCK ACCURACY MAINTAIN பண்ணணும், DOCUMENTATION PROPER-ஆ இருக்கணும், எந்த DISCREPANCY-யும் AVOID பண்ணணும்.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ CREDIT NOTE ISSUE பண்ணினா, அதுக்கு CORRESPONDING PHYSICAL STOCK STORE-க்கு RECEIVE பண்ணணும்.

SALES INVOICE-க்கு AGAINST CREDIT NOTE RAISE பண்ணும்போது, அந்த ITEM PHYSICAL-ஆ BACK STORE-க்கு வரணும்.

ITEM DETAILS, QTY, CONDITION எல்லாமே RECEIVE TIME-ல RECORD பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ STOCK RECEIVE VERIFY & DOCUMENT பண்ணணும்.

CREDIT NOTE VS PHYSICAL STOCK QUANTITY MATCH பண்ணணும்.

SYSTEM ENTRY CORRECT-ஆ UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

PROPER DOCUMENTATION MAINTAIN பண்ணணும் FOR AUDIT PURPOSE.

3️⃣ எந்த ISSUE இருந்தாலும் IMMEDIATELY HIGHLIGHT பண்ணணும்.

SHORTAGE / DAMAGE / MISMATCH இருந்தா VERTICAL HEAD / MANAGEMENT-க்கு IMMEDIATELY INFORM பண்ணணும்.

APPROVAL இல்லாம STOCK AMENDMENT பண்ணக்கூடாது.

🟨 CHECK:

WEEKLY / MONTHLY AUDIT TIME-ல VERIFY பண்ணணும்:

CREDIT NOTE-க்கு RELATED MATERIALS எல்லாம் PHYSICALLY RECEIVE பண்ணியிருக்காங்களா?

QTY & ITEM DETAILS CREDIT NOTE-ோட MATCH ஆகுதா?

ISSUES PROPER-ஆ ESCALATE பண்ணியிருக்காங்களா?

SYSTEM ENTRY PROPER-ஆ UPDATE பண்ணியிருக்காங்களா WITH DOCUMENTS?

PHYSICAL STOCK VS SYSTEM STOCK CROSS-CHECK பண்ணணும்.

🟥 ACT:

ISSUES / MISMATCHES இருந்தா, STOCK CORRECTION பண்ண முன்னாடி VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT APPROVAL எடுக்கணும்.

RETURN PROCESS, DOCUMENTATION, VERIFICATION STEP IMPROVE பண்ணி PREVENTIVE MEASURES IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.

CREDIT NOTE RELATED STOCK DISCREPANCIES TIMELY CLOSE பண்ணணும் WITHOUT FAIL.

  description = 🟩 PLAN:

ENSURE ALL RETURNABLE DELIVERY CHALLAN (DC) PENDING ITEMS ARE CLOSED ON TIME.
OBJECTIVE – MAINTAIN PROPER TRACKING, REDUCE PENDING DCS, AND ESCALATE ANY ISSUES IMMEDIATELY TO ENSURE TIMELY CLOSURE.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ VERIFY ALL PENDING RETURNABLE DC ITEMS AND FOLLOW UP WITH THE CONCERNED PERSON UNTIL CLOSURE.

UPDATE THE PENDING DC LIST FROM ERP/REGISTER.

CONTINUOUSLY FOLLOW UP WITH THE RESPONSIBLE DEPARTMENT/CUSTOMER FOR MATERIAL RETURN.

2️⃣ IF ANY ISSUE IS FOUND, HIGHLIGHT IT IMMEDIATELY.

IF THERE ARE DELAYS, QUANTITY MISMATCHES, OR MISSING RETURNS, INFORM THE VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT IMMEDIATELY.

INITIATE CORRECTIVE ACTION PROMPTLY.

3️⃣ IF CLOSURE IS NOT POSSIBLE, OBTAIN APPROVAL TO SHORT-CLOSE.

IF THERE IS A GENUINE REASON AND THE DC CANNOT BE CLOSED,
OBTAIN VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT APPROVAL AND PROCEED WITH SHORT CLOSURE.

🟨 CHECK:

DURING AUDITS OR WEEKLY REVIEWS, VERIFY:

ARE FOLLOW-UPS BEING DONE PROPERLY FOR ALL PENDING DCS?

ARE RETURNABLE MATERIALS BEING RETURNED ON TIME?

ARE ISSUES ESCALATED PROMPTLY?

ARE SHORT-CLOSE APPROVALS PROPERLY DOCUMENTED?

TRACK PENDING DC TRENDS TO IDENTIFY RECURRING DELAYS.

🟥 ACT:

RESOLVE LONG-PENDING DC ISSUES BY IDENTIFYING THE ROOT CAUSE.

STRENGTHEN THE FOLLOW-UP AND TRACKING PROCESS.

IMPLEMENT PREVENTIVE MEASURES TO AVOID REPEATED DELAYS.

ENSURE ALL RETURNABLE DC CLOSURES ARE COMPLETED ON TIME WITHOUT FAIL.


🟩 PLAN:

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ PENDING RETURNABLE DC ITEMS VERIFY பண்ணி, CONCERN PERSON-ஐ FOLLOW-UP பண்ணணும் UNTIL CLOSE.

ERP / REGISTER-ல PENDING DC LIST UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

CONCERN DEPARTMENT / CUSTOMER-க்கு FOLLOW-UP CONTINUOUS-ஆ பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ ISSUE FOUND-னா IMMEDIATELY HIGHLIGHT பண்ணணும்.

QTY MISMATCH, MATERIAL NOT RETURNED, DELAY போன்ற ISSUES இருந்தா VERTICAL HEAD / MANAGEMENT-க்கு உடனே INFORM பண்ணணும்.

CORRECTIVE ACTION INITIATE பண்ணணும்.

3️⃣ CLOSURE NOT POSSIBLE-னா, SHORT CLOSE APPROVAL எடுக்கணும்.

GENUINE REASON இருந்தா, CLOSURE POSSIBILITY இல்லாதா,
VERTICAL HEAD / MANAGEMENT APPROVAL எடுத்துட்டு SHORT CLOSE பண்ணணும்.

🟨 CHECK:

AUDIT / WEEKLY REVIEW TIME-ல VERIFY பண்ணணும்:

PENDING DC FOLLOW-UP PROPERLY பண்ணறாங்கலா?

RETURNABLE MATERIALS RETURN ஆயிடுச்சா?

ISSUE ESCALATION TIMELY-ஆ நடந்துருக்கா?

SHORT CLOSE APPROVALS DOCUMENTED-ஆ இருக்கா?

PENDING DC TREND MONITOR பண்ணணும்.

🟥 ACT:

LONG PENDING DC ITEMS ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFY பண்ணி RESOLVE பண்ணணும்.

FOLLOW-UP PROCESS STRENGTHEN பண்ணணும்.

REPEAT ISSUES AVOID பண்ண PREVENTIVE ACTIONS IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும் (BETTER TRACKING, REMINDERS, DOCUMENTATION).

ALL PENDING DC CLOSURE ACTIONS TIMELY COMPLETE பண்ணணும்.

  checking_point = DELIVERY CHALLAN (DC) RETURNABLE - HANDLING
  description = DELIVERY CHALLAN (DC) RETURNABLE - HANDLING

🟩 PLAN:

ENSURE ALL RETURNABLE DCS ARE HANDLED PROPERLY WITH TIMELY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, MOVEMENT, AND DOCUMENTATION.
OBJECTIVE – TRACK MATERIALS/ASSETS SENT OUTSIDE, MAINTAIN PROPER DOCUMENTATION, AND ENSURE RETURN WITHIN ACCEPTABLE TIMELINES.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ ALWAYS GET ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ON DC FROM THE RECEIVER AND ATTACH IT TO THE SAME DC ENTRY.

ENSURE PHYSICAL OR DIGITAL ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS OBTAINED FROM THE CUSTOMER, SUPPLIER, OR OTHER PARTY.

ATTACH THE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT TO THE DC ENTRY FOR RECORD PURPOSES.

2️⃣ ENSURE MATERIALS/ITEMS/ASSETS ARE RETURNED TO THE COMPANY WITHIN THE ACCEPTED DATE.

ALL MATERIALS SENT OUTSIDE (TO SUPPLIERS, CUSTOMERS, OR OTHERS) MUST BE UNDER RESPONSIBLE CUSTODY.

TRACK DELIVERY AND RECEIPT DATES ACTIVELY TO ENSURE TIMELY RETURN.

3️⃣ MATERIAL OUT DATE SHOULD NOT EXCEED 30 DAYS.

IF THE MATERIAL IS STILL OUT BEYOND 30 DAYS, ENSURE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE OR PHYSICAL TRACKING EXISTS.

MAINTAIN A RECORD OF OUTWARD AND INWARD MOVEMENT AT LEAST DOCUMENTALLY/LITERALLY BETWEEN THE COMPANY AND THE EXTERNAL PARTY.

🟨 CHECK:

DURING AUDITS OR REGULAR REVIEWS:

ARE ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS OBTAINED AND ATTACHED FOR ALL DCS?

ARE MATERIALS/ASSETS RETURNED WITHIN THE 30-DAY LIMIT?

ARE OUTWARD AND INWARD MOVEMENTS PROPERLY DOCUMENTED?

IS THERE CLEAR RESPONSIBILITY ASSIGNED FOR TRACKING MATERIALS OUTSIDE THE COMPANY?

🟥 ACT:

IF ACKNOWLEDGEMENT IS MISSING, FOLLOW UP IMMEDIATELY WITH THE CONCERNED PERSON/PARTY.

IF MATERIALS ARE DELAYED BEYOND 30 DAYS, ESCALATE TO VERTICAL HEAD/MANAGEMENT.

IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE MEASURES FOR REPEATED DELAYS OR MISSING ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.

STRENGTHEN TRACKING AND DOCUMENTATION TO ENSURE ALL RETURNABLE DCS ARE HANDLED EFFICIENTLY.

🟩 PLAN:

RETURNABLE DCS PROPER-ஆ HANDLE பண்ணணும் WITH TIMELY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, MOVEMENT, AND DOCUMENTATION.
OBJECTIVE – MATERIALS/ASSETS TRACK பண்ணணும், DOCUMENTATION MAINTAIN பண்ணணும், RETURN ACCEPTABLE TIMELINE-ல ENSURE பண்ணணும்.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ DC-க்கு RECEIVER ACKNOWLEDGEMENT எப்போதும் பண்ணி, SAME DC ENTRY-க்கு ATTACH பண்ணணும்.

CUSTOMER, SUPPLIER, OR OTHERS-ல் இருந்து PHYSICAL / DIGITAL ACKNOWLEDGEMENT COLLECT பண்ணணும்.

DC ENTRY-க்கு ATTACH பண்ணி RECORD MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ MATERIALS/ITEMS/ASSETS COMPANY-க்கு ACCEPT DATE-க்கு RETURN பண்ணணும்.

SUPPLIER / CUSTOMER / OTHERS-க்கு சென்ற எல்லா ITEMS RESPONSIBLE PERSON CUSTODY-ல இருக்கணும்.

DELIVERY & RECEIPT DATE TRACK பண்ணி TIMELY RETURN ENSURE பண்ணணும்.

3️⃣ MATERIAL OUT DATE 30 DAYS EXCEED பண்ணக்கூடாது.

30 DAYS EXCEED ஆனால், DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE OR TRACKING MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.

OUTWARD & INWARD MOVEMENT PROPER-ஆ DOCUMENT பண்ணி, COMPANY VS EXTERNAL PARTY TRACK பண்ணணும்.

🟨 CHECK:

AUDIT / WEEKLY REVIEW TIME-ல VERIFY பண்ணணும்:

DC-க்கு ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS எல்லாம் ATTACH பண்ணியிருக்காங்களா?

MATERIALS/ASSETS 30 DAYS-ல் RETURN ஆயிடுச்சா?

OUTWARD & INWARD MOVEMENT PROPERLY DOCUMENTED-ஆ இருக்குதா?

RESPONSIBILITY CLEAR-ஆ ASSIGN பண்ணிருக்காங்களா?

🟥 ACT:

ACKNOWLEDGEMENT MISSING-னா, IMMEDIATELY FOLLOW-UP பண்ணணும்.

MATERIALS 30 DAYS EXCEED ஆனால், VERTICAL HEAD / MANAGEMENT-க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும்.

REPEATED DELAYS / MISSING ACKNOWLEDGEMENT ISSUES-க்கு CORRECTIVE ACTION IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும்.

TRACKING & DOCUMENTATION IMPROVE பண்ணி, ALL RETURNABLE DCS EFFICIENTLY HANDLE பண்ணணும்.

  id = 8918

  checking_point = SALARY REPORT SEND TO ACCOUNTS
  description = SALARY REPORT SEND TO ACCOUNTS

🟩 PLAN:

SALARY REPORTS MUST BE PREPARED AND SENT TO ACCOUNTS ON TIME.
OBJECTIVE – AVOID DELAYS IN SALARY PROCESSING, MAINTAIN ACCURATE RECORDS, AND MINIMIZE ERRORS.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ PREPARE THE SALARY REPORT.

CALCULATE EMPLOYEE-WISE SALARY, DEDUCTIONS, BONUSES, AND INCENTIVES ACCURATELY.

INCLUDE ADJUSTMENTS FOR LEAVES, OVERTIME, OR ANY OTHER APPLICABLE CHANGES.

2️⃣ SEND THE REPORT TO ACCOUNTS ON TIME.

FORWARD THE REPORT VIA EMAIL OR SYSTEM ON THE AGREED DATE.

CONFIRM RECEIPT WITH ACCOUNTS IF NECESSARY.

3️⃣ FOLLOW-UP AND CLARIFY.

ADDRESS ANY QUERIES FROM ACCOUNTS IMMEDIATELY.

MAKE NECESSARY CORRECTIONS OR ADJUSTMENTS PROMPTLY AND UPDATE RECORDS.

🟨 CHECK:

ARE ALL SALARY ENTRIES ACCURATE?

WAS THE REPORT SENT TO ACCOUNTS ON THE AGREED DATE?

WERE ANY DISCREPANCIES HIGHLIGHTED AND RESOLVED PROMPTLY?

🟥 ACT:

IF ERRORS ARE FOUND, CORRECT THEM IMMEDIATELY AND RESEND TO ACCOUNTS.

IDENTIFY THE ROOT CAUSE FOR RECURRING ISSUES AND IMPLEMENT PREVENTIVE MEASURES.

ENSURE THE SALARY REPORTING PROCESS RUNS SMOOTHLY AND TIMELY EVERY MONTH.

🟩 PLAN:

SALARY REPORT TIMELY PREPARE & ACCOUNTS-க்கு SEND பண்ணணும்.
OBJECTIVE – SALARY PROCESSING DELAY AVOID பண்ணணும், RECORDS PROPER MAINTAIN பண்ணணும், ERRORS MINIMUM-ஆ இருக்கணும்.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ SALARY REPORT PREPARE பண்ணணும்.

EMPLOYEE-WISE SALARY, DEDUCTIONS, BONUSES, INCENTIVES எல்லாம் CORRECT-ஆ CALCULATE பண்ணணும்.

ANY LEAVE, OVERTIME, OR ADJUSTMENTS INCLUDE பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ SEND REPORT TO ACCOUNTS ON TIME.

AGREED DATE-க்கு REPORT EMAIL / SYSTEM-ல் ACCOUNTS-க்கு FORWARD பண்ணணும்.

CONFIRM RECEIPT FROM ACCOUNTS IF NEEDED.

  description = ERP ADMIN ACTIVITIES - ERP ISSUES SOLVING

P – PLAN
RECEIVE AN EMAIL FROM THE USER WITH COMPLETE DETAILS OF THE INTERNAL ERP ISSUE TICKET.

D – DO
ASSESS THE ISSUE TO CHECK WHETHER IT CAN BE RESOLVED INTERNALLY.
IF POSSIBLE, PERFORM THE REQUIRED CORRECTIONS AND REPLY TO THE USER CONFIRMING THE RESOLUTION. (LEAD TIME: 2 DAYS)

C – CHECK
VERIFY WHETHER THE ISSUE IS FULLY RESOLVED AND CONFIRM THAT THE USER HAS ACKNOWLEDGED THE CLOSURE.

A – ACT
IF THE ISSUE CANNOT BE RESOLVED INTERNALLY, ESCALATE THE TICKET BY SENDING AN EMAIL WITH ALL DETAILS TO FSS FOR FURTHER SUPPORT.

TAMIL:

P – PLAN
USER-EMAIL மூலம் வரும் INTERNAL ERP ISSUE TICKET DETAILS எல்லாம் RECEIVE பண்ணனும்.

D – DO
ISSUE INTERNAL-ஆ SOLVE பண்ண முடியுமா என்று ASSESS பண்ணனும்.
POSSIBLE என்றால் தேவையான CORRECTION பண்ணி, 2 DAYS LEAD TIME-க்கு உள்ளே USER-க்கு EMAIL மூலம் RESOLUTION CONFIRM பண்ணனும்.

C – CHECK
ISSUE முழுமையாக RESOLVE ஆனதா என்று VERIFY பண்ணி, USER CONFIRMATION வந்துருக்கா என்று CHECK பண்ணனும்.

A – ACT
INTERNAL-ஆ RESOLVE பண்ண முடியலனா, ISSUE DETAILS எல்லாம் ATTACH பண்ணி FSS-க்கு EMAIL மூலம் ESCALATE பண்ணனும்.

PLAN

DAILY MORNING DDRM 10:30 AM–11:00 AM (OR EXTRA TIME IF REQUIRED) SHOULD BE CONDUCTED.

PREPARE THE LIST OF PENDING ROUTSHEETS (BILLING ITEMS) AND KEEP IT READY.

UPDATE THE LIST OF NON-BILLING ITEMS, COMPLAINTS, FEEDBACK, INTER-DEPARTMENT ISSUES, BREAKDOWNS, REJECTIONS, NPD, AND VAVE POINTS.

COLLECT AND PREPARE THE DESPATCH & PACKING PLAN DATA (INVENTORY + SALES ITEMS).

PREPARE STOCK MOVEMENT DETAILS (INTERNAL & EXTERNAL) FOR WIP.

UPDATE THE MOM SHEET TEMPLATE AND KEEP IT READY.

🅾️ DO

START THE MEETING PUNCTUALLY AT 11:00 AM.

ANALYZE PENDING BILLING ROUTSHEETS.

DISCUSS NON-BILLING ITEMS, COMPLAINTS, FEEDBACK, BREAKDOWNS, REJECTIONS, NPD, AND VAVE POINTS IN THE MOM.

REVIEW THE DESPATCH & PACKING PLAN.

VERIFY INTERNAL & EXTERNAL STOCK MOVEMENT AND DECIDE ACTIONS.

🅲️ CHECK

VERIFY THAT ALL POINTS NOTED IN THE MOM ARE FULLY DISCUSSED.

CHECK THAT RESPONSIBLE PERSONS ARE ASSIGNED FOR PENDING ACTIONS.

CONFIRM THAT WIP MOVEMENT RECORDS ARE CORRECTLY UPDATED.

🅰️ ACT

IMMEDIATELY CIRCULATE DDRM POINTS VIA EMAIL AFTER THE MEETING.

ASSIGN TASKS FOR FOLLOW-UP ON PENDING ACTIONS.

INITIATE CORRECTIVE ACTIONS FOR PROCESS IMPROVEMENT OR TO AVOID DELAYS.

TAMIL

PLAN

நாளாந்திர காலை DDRM 10:30 AM–11:00 AM (அதிக நேரம் வேண்டுமானால் கூட) நடத்த வேண்டும்.

PENDING ROUTSHEETS (BILLING ITEMS) பட்டியலை தயார் செய்து வைக்க வேண்டும்.

NON-BILLING ITEMS, COMPLAINTS, FEEDBACKS, INTER-DEPARTMENT ISSUES, BREAKDOWNS, REJECTIONS, NPD, VAVE POINTS எல்லா பட்டியலும் புதுப்பிக்க வேண்டும்.

DESPATCH & PACKING PLAN (INVENTORY + SALES ITEMS) தரவை சேகரித்து தயாராக வைக்க வேண்டும்.

STOCK MOVEMENT (INTERNAL & EXTERNAL) விவரங்களை WIPக்கு தயார் செய்ய வேண்டும்.

MOM SHEET TEMPLATE புதுப்பித்து வைத்திருக்க வேண்டும்.

🅾️ DO

MEETING நேரத்திற்கு 11:00 AM தொடங்க வேண்டும்.

PENDING BILLING ROUTSHEETS ஐ ANALYZE செய்யுங்கள்.

NON-BILLING ITEMS, COMPLAINTS, FEEDBACKS, BREAKDOWNS, REJECTIONS, NPD, VAVE POINTS MOM-ல் DISCUSS செய்யுங்கள்.

DESPATCH & PACKING PLAN REVIEW செய்யுங்கள்.

INTERNAL & EXTERNAL STOCK MOVEMENT VERIFY செய்து, ACTION DECIDE செய்யுங்கள்.

🅲️ CHECK

MOM-ல் NOTE செய்த POINTS முழுமையாக DISCUSS ஆனதா என்று VERIFY செய்யுங்கள்.

PENDING ACTIONSக்கு RESPONSIBLE PERSON ASSIGN செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது என்று CHECK செய்யுங்கள்.

WIP MOVEMENT RECORDS சரியாக UPDATE ஆனதா என்று CONFIRM செய்யுங்கள்.

🅰️ ACT

MEETING முடிந்ததும் DDRM POINTS MAIL-ல் CIRCULATE செய்ய வேண்டும்.

PENDING ACTIONS FOLLOW-UPக்கு TASK ASSIGN செய்யுங்கள்.

PROCESS IMPROVEMENT / DELAY AVOID செய்ய REQUIRED CORRECTIVE ACTIONS INITIATE செய்யுங்கள்.

SOP DOCUMENT NUMBER : QMS/FA/004/25-26


•	HAS THE REMITTANCE REQUEST BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE PURCHASE TEAM ALONG WITH THE PO AND PI?
•	DID YOU VERIFY THE CORRECTNESS OF PO AND PI DETAILS BEFORE PROCEEDING?
•	FOR EXISTING SUPPLIERS, WAS THE LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	FOR NEW SUPPLIERS, WAS ANY IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	HAVE ALL MANDATORY FIELDS BEEN FILLED IN THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT?
•	WAS THE DOCUMENT HANDED OVER TO THE DESIGNATED BANK WITHIN +1 WORKING DAY?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT VOUCHER BEEN CREATED IN THE ERP SYSTEM FOR THE IMPORT TRANSACTION?
•	IS THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT ATTACHED TO THE PAYMENT VOUCHER RECORD?
•	ARE ALL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK, ETC.) UPLOADED IN ERP?
•	ARE THE FILENAMES CLEAR AND CONSISTENT FOR EASY AUDIT TRACKING?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE BANK?
•	IS THE REMITTANCE ADVICE SAVED IN THE DIGITAL FOLDER SECURELY?
•	WAS THE ADVICE SHARED WITH THE BUYER THROUGH THE EXISTING MAIL LOOP?
•	IS THE ADVICE COPY ATTACHED IN THE PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD IN ERP?
•	ARE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACHED BEFORE SUBMITTING FOR APPROVAL?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT ENTRY BEEN SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL AS PER POLICY?
•	DID THE ENTRY STATUS UPDATE TO “APPROVED” WITHIN +2 WORKING DAYS?
•	HAVE YOU VERIFIED THAT ALL DOCUMENTS ARE ACCESSIBLE FOR AUDIT REFERENCE?
•	HAS A BACKUP BEEN STORED IN THE SHARED DRIVE OR SECURED FOLDER?
•	DID YOU COMMUNICATE FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION TO THE PURCHASE TEAM?
•	IS THE ENTIRE PROCESS COMPLETED WITHIN THE DEFINED TIMELINE?
•	ARE DOCUMENTS PROPERLY NAMED AND VERSION CONTROLLED?
•	IS THE SOP BEING FOLLOWED FOR EVERY IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE?
•	ARE THERE ANY PENDING REMITTANCE CONFIRMATIONS OR APPROVALS?
•	HAVE ALL RECORDS BEEN CROSS-CHECKED FOR AUDIT READINESS?

•	PURCHASE TEAM-லிருந்து REMITTANCE REQUEST, PO & PI கூட RECEIVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PO, PI DETAILS சரியா VERIFY பண்ணீங்களா PROCEED பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி?
•	EXISTING SUPPLIER-னா LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ஐ USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	புதிய SUPPLIER-க்கு IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ல இருந்து USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ல எல்லா MANDATORY FIELDS-யும் FILL பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENT-ஐ +1 WORKING DAY-க்குள் BANK-க்கு HANDOVER பண்ணீங்களா?
•	IMPORT TRANSACTION-க்கு ERP SYSTEM-ல PAYMENT VOUCHER CREATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ஐ VOUCHER RECORD-க்கு ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK COPY ETC.) ERP-ல UPLOAD பண்ணீங்களா?
•	AUDIT TRACKING EASY-ஆ இருக்க FILENAMES CLEAR-ஆ CONSISTENT-ஆ வைத்தீங்களா?
•	BANK-லிருந்து PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE கிடைச்சுதா?
•	REMITTANCE ADVICE-ஐ SECURELY DIGITAL FOLDER-ல SAVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	EXISTING MAIL LOOP-ல BUYER-க்கு ADVICE SHARE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD-ல ADVICE COPY ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா ERP-ல?
•	APPROVALக்கு SUBMIT பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி எல்லா REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	COMPANY POLICY-க்கு ஏற்ப PAYMENT ENTRY SUBMIT பண்ணீங்களா APPROVALக்கு?
•	ENTRY STATUS “APPROVED”னு +2 WORKING DAYS-க்குள்ள UPDATE ஆச்சா?
•	AUDIT REFERENCEக்கு எல்லா DOCUMENTS-யும் ACCESSIBLE-ஆ இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?
•	SHARED DRIVE அல்லது SECURED FOLDER-ல BACKUP STORE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION-ஐ PURCHASE TEAM-க்கு COMMUNICATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா PROCESS-யும் DEFINE பண்ணிய TIMELINE-க்குள்ள COMPLETE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENTS-க்கு PROPER NAMING & VERSION CONTROL FOLLOW பண்ணீங்களா?
•	ஒவ்வொரு IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE-க்கும் SOP FOLLOW பண்ணுறீங்களா?
•	எந்த REMITTANCE CONFIRMATION அல்லது APPROVAL PENDING இருக்கு?
•	எல்லா RECORDS-யும் AUDIT READINESSக்கு CROSS-CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?

  checking_point = STOCK AUDIT QTY &  LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) - WEEKLY
  description = STOCK AUDIT QTY &  LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) - WEEKLY

SOP NO : QMS/FA/005/25-26

🟩 PLAN:

WEEKLY STOCK QUANTITY AND LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) MUST BE MAINTAINED ACCURATELY.
THE OBJECTIVE IS TO ENSURE ZERO STOCK VARIANCE, CORRECT BIN/LOCATION, AND WEEKLY CLOSURE OF DISCREPANCIES WITHOUT FAIL.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ PREPARE WEEKLY AUDIT SCHEDULE AND ITEM LIST.

DOWNLOAD WEEKLY ERP STOCK REPORT.

FINALIZE AUDIT SCOPE: HIGH-VALUE, FAST-MOVING, AND RANDOM ITEMS.

PREPARE LIST WITH ITEM CODES, ERP QTY, AND ERP LOCATION.

2️⃣ CONDUCT PHYSICAL STOCK AUDIT.

PHYSICALLY COUNT THE ITEMS AS PER THE LIST.

VERIFY IF ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION MATCHES.

RECORD ALL VARIANCES AND OBSERVATIONS IMMEDIATELY.

3️⃣ CLOSE THE WEEKLY AUDIT CHECKLIST WITH EVIDENCE.

ATTACH PHYSICAL COUNT SHEETS.

ATTACH LOCATION PHOTOS AS EVIDENCE.

ATTACH ERP SCREENSHOTS BEFORE/AFTER CORRECTIONS (IF ANY).

🟨 CHECK:

DURING WEEKLY REVIEW OR INTERNAL AUDIT, VERIFY THE FOLLOWING:

ARE ALL AUDITED ITEMS DOCUMENTED PROPERLY?

DO ERP QUANTITY AND PHYSICAL QUANTITY MATCH?

DO ERP LOCATIONS AND PHYSICAL LOCATIONS MATCH?

ARE VARIANCE OBSERVATIONS LOGGED AND SUPPORTED WITH EVIDENCE?

IS THE WEEKLY CHECKLIST FULLY COMPLETED AND ATTACHED?

TREND ANALYSIS SHOULD BE DONE TO MONITOR RECURRING ISSUES.

🟥 ACT:

IF ANY VARIANCE OR ISSUE IS IDENTIFIED DURING AUDIT:

REPORT IT IMMEDIATELY TO THE RESPONSIBLE TEAM.

CORRECT WRONG QUANTITIES OR WRONG LOCATIONS IN ERP AFTER APPROVAL.

MOVE MATERIALS TO CORRECT BINS IF MISLOCATED.

IMPLEMENT CORRECTIVE AND PREVENTIVE ACTIONS TO AVOID RECURRENCE.

TARGET – ALL WEEKLY DISCREPANCIES MUST BE RESOLVED WITHIN THE SAME WEEK WITHOUT FAIL.



🟩 PLAN:

WEEKLY-ஆ STOCK QTY & LOCATION (ERP VS PHYSICAL) AUDIT REGULAR-ஆ MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்.
OBJECTIVE – STOCK ACCURACY IMPROVE பண்ணி, WRONG LOCATION / QTY VARIATION AVOID பண்ணணும்.
ALL VARIANCES SHOULD BE IDENTIFIED & CLOSED EVERY WEEK WITHOUT FAIL.

🟦 DO:
1️⃣ WEEKLY AUDIT SCHEDULE PREPARE பண்ணணும் (ITEM LIST + LOCATION LIST READY பண்ணி).

ERP-லிருந்த WEEKLY AUDIT ITEMS REPORT DOWNLOAD பண்ணணும்.

HIGH VALUE + FAST MOVING ITEMS PRIORITY-ஆ INCLUDE பண்ணணும்.

2️⃣ PHYSICAL STOCK AUDIT CONDUCT பண்ணணும்.

ITEM QTY நேர்ல COUNT பண்ணணும்.

ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION VERIFY பண்ணணும்.

எந்த VARIANCE இருந்தாலும் IMMEDIATE-ஆ OBSERVATION ENTRY போடணும்.

3️⃣ CHECKLIST CLOSE பண்ணணும் WITH ATTACHMENT EVIDENCE.

COUNT SHEET ATTACH பண்ணணும்.

LOCATION PHOTO EVIDENCE UPLOAD பண்ணணும்.

ERP SCREENSHOT BEFORE/AFTER (IF ADJUSTED) ADD பண்ணணும்.

🟨 CHECK:

WEEKLY / INTERNAL AUDIT TIME-ல VERIFY பண்ணணும் –

ERP QTY VS PHYSICAL QTY MATCH ஆகுதா?

ERP LOCATION VS PHYSICAL LOCATION PROPER-ஆ இருக்குதா?

VARIANCE OBSERVATION ENTRIES COMPLETE-ஆ இருக்குதா?

EVIDENCE ATTACHMENTS PROPERா இருக்குதா?

DISCREPANCY % TRACK பண்ணி TREND ANALYSIS பண்ணணும்.

🟥 ACT:

VARIANCE FOUND-னா IMMEDIATELY STORES / ERP TEAM-க்கு INFORM பண்ணணும்.

WRONG LOCATION இருந்தா PROPER LOCATION-க்கு MOVE பண்ணி ERP UPDATE பண்ணணும்.

WRONG POSTINGS / MISSING TRANSACTIONS இருந்தா CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுக்கணும் SAME WEEK-ல.

REPEAT ISSUES வந்தா PREVENTIVE MEASURES IMPLEMENT பண்ணணும் (TRAINING / SOP UPDATE / BIN LABELING).

TARGET – ALL WEEKLY VARIANCES SAME WEEK-ல் CLOSE பண்ணணும் WITHOUT FAIL.

CHECKLIST POINTS FOR MONITORING

IS COMPANY SWOT CONDUCTED AS PER SCHEDULE AFTER 7 PM WITHOUT AFFECTING PRODUCTION?
ARE ALL DEPARTMENTS REPRESENTED AND PARTICIPANTS ATTENDED PHYSICALLY OR VIA TEAMS?
ARE DEPARTMENT SWOTS, SALES PLAN, IMS POLICY, BMC, VISION, MISSION, VALUES, PURPOSE REFERRED?

TANGLISH

SOP DOCUMENT NUMBER : QMS/FA/004/25-26 - OUTWARD REMITTANCE PREPARATION AND IMPORT PAYMENT SOP

CHECKLIST MONITORING POINTS:

•	HAS THE REMITTANCE REQUEST BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE PURCHASE TEAM ALONG WITH THE PO AND PI?
•	DID YOU VERIFY THE CORRECTNESS OF PO AND PI DETAILS BEFORE PROCEEDING?
•	FOR EXISTING SUPPLIERS, WAS THE LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	FOR NEW SUPPLIERS, WAS ANY IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE USED?
•	HAVE ALL MANDATORY FIELDS BEEN FILLED IN THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT?
•	WAS THE DOCUMENT HANDED OVER TO THE DESIGNATED BANK WITHIN +1 WORKING DAY?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT VOUCHER BEEN CREATED IN THE ERP SYSTEM FOR THE IMPORT TRANSACTION?
•	IS THE OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT ATTACHED TO THE PAYMENT VOUCHER RECORD?
•	ARE ALL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK, ETC.) UPLOADED IN ERP?
•	ARE THE FILENAMES CLEAR AND CONSISTENT FOR EASY AUDIT TRACKING?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE BEEN RECEIVED FROM THE BANK?
•	IS THE REMITTANCE ADVICE SAVED IN THE DIGITAL FOLDER SECURELY?
•	WAS THE ADVICE SHARED WITH THE BUYER THROUGH THE EXISTING MAIL LOOP?
•	IS THE ADVICE COPY ATTACHED IN THE PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD IN ERP?
•	ARE ALL REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACHED BEFORE SUBMITTING FOR APPROVAL?
•	HAS THE PAYMENT ENTRY BEEN SUBMITTED FOR APPROVAL AS PER POLICY?
•	DID THE ENTRY STATUS UPDATE TO “APPROVED” WITHIN +2 WORKING DAYS?
•	HAVE YOU VERIFIED THAT ALL DOCUMENTS ARE ACCESSIBLE FOR AUDIT REFERENCE?
•	HAS A BACKUP BEEN STORED IN THE SHARED DRIVE OR SECURED FOLDER?
•	DID YOU COMMUNICATE FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION TO THE PURCHASE TEAM?
•	IS THE ENTIRE PROCESS COMPLETED WITHIN THE DEFINED TIMELINE?
•	ARE DOCUMENTS PROPERLY NAMED AND VERSION CONTROLLED?
•	IS THE SOP BEING FOLLOWED FOR EVERY IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE?
•	ARE THERE ANY PENDING REMITTANCE CONFIRMATIONS OR APPROVALS?
•	HAVE ALL RECORDS BEEN CROSS-CHECKED FOR AUDIT READINESS?

•	PURCHASE TEAM-லிருந்து REMITTANCE REQUEST, PO & PI கூட RECEIVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PO, PI DETAILS சரியா VERIFY பண்ணீங்களா PROCEED பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி?
•	EXISTING SUPPLIER-னா LAST PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ஐ USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	புதிய SUPPLIER-க்கு IMPORT PAYMENT ENTRY TEMPLATE-ல இருந்து USE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ல எல்லா MANDATORY FIELDS-யும் FILL பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENT-ஐ +1 WORKING DAY-க்குள் BANK-க்கு HANDOVER பண்ணீங்களா?
•	IMPORT TRANSACTION-க்கு ERP SYSTEM-ல PAYMENT VOUCHER CREATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	OUTWARD REMITTANCE DOCUMENT-ஐ VOUCHER RECORD-க்கு ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS (PO, PI, LETTERS, BANK ACK COPY ETC.) ERP-ல UPLOAD பண்ணீங்களா?
•	AUDIT TRACKING EASY-ஆ இருக்க FILENAMES CLEAR-ஆ CONSISTENT-ஆ வைத்தீங்களா?
•	BANK-லிருந்து PAYMENT REMITTANCE ADVICE கிடைச்சுதா?
•	REMITTANCE ADVICE-ஐ SECURELY DIGITAL FOLDER-ல SAVE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	EXISTING MAIL LOOP-ல BUYER-க்கு ADVICE SHARE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	PAYMENT ENTRY RECORD-ல ADVICE COPY ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா ERP-ல?
•	APPROVALக்கு SUBMIT பண்ணுறதுக்கு முன்னாடி எல்லா REQUIRED DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணீங்களா?
•	COMPANY POLICY-க்கு ஏற்ப PAYMENT ENTRY SUBMIT பண்ணீங்களா APPROVALக்கு?
•	ENTRY STATUS “APPROVED”னு +2 WORKING DAYS-க்குள்ள UPDATE ஆச்சா?
•	AUDIT REFERENCEக்கு எல்லா DOCUMENTS-யும் ACCESSIBLE-ஆ இருக்கா CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?
•	SHARED DRIVE அல்லது SECURED FOLDER-ல BACKUP STORE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	FINAL APPROVAL CONFIRMATION-ஐ PURCHASE TEAM-க்கு COMMUNICATE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	எல்லா PROCESS-யும் DEFINE பண்ணிய TIMELINE-க்குள்ள COMPLETE பண்ணீங்களா?
•	DOCUMENTS-க்கு PROPER NAMING & VERSION CONTROL FOLLOW பண்ணீங்களா?
•	ஒவ்வொரு IMPORT REMITTANCE CASE-க்கும் SOP FOLLOW பண்ணுறீங்களா?
•	எந்த REMITTANCE CONFIRMATION அல்லது APPROVAL PENDING இருக்கு?
•	எல்லா RECORDS-யும் AUDIT READINESSக்கு CROSS-CHECK பண்ணீங்களா?

  checking_point = DSC MAINTAINING
  description = DSC MAINTAINING

PL REFER THE SOP - QMS/FA/008/25-26 - DSC MAINTAINING - SOP

MONITORING CHECKLIST POINTS :

•  IS THE DSC VALIDITY CHECKED REGULARLY?
•  IS THE DSC USED ONLY FOR AUTHORIZED PURPOSES?
•  IS THE DSC TOKEN SECURELY STORED?
•  ARE RENEWAL REMINDERS SENT ON TIME?
•  IS THE DSC MASTER REGISTER UPDATED?
•  WAS DSC REVOKED IMMEDIATELY AFTER EMPLOYEE EXIT?
•  ANY UNAUTHORIZED OR PERSONAL USAGE DETECTED?
•  ARE AUDIT RECORDS MAINTAINED PROPERLY?

• DSC-ன் செல்லுபடித் தன்மை (VALIDITY) அடிக்கடி சரிபார்க்கப்படுகிறதா?
• DSC அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட (AUTHORIZED) நோக்கங்களுக்காக மட்டுமே பயன்படுத்தப்படுகிறதா?
• DSC டோக்கன் பாதுகாப்பாக (SECURE) வைத்துப் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகிறதா?
• புதுப்பித்தல் (RENEWAL) நினைவூட்டல்கள் சரியான நேரத்தில் அனுப்பப்படுகிறதா?
• DSC மாஸ்டர் பதிவேடு (MASTER REGISTER) முறையாக புதுப்பிக்கப்படுகிறதா?
• பணியாளர் பணிநீக்கம் / வெளியேறும் போது DSC உடனடியாக ரத்து (REVOKE) செய்யப்படுகிறதா?
• அனுமதி இல்லாத அல்லது தனிப்பட்ட பயன்பாடு கண்டறியப்பட்டுள்ளதா?
• தணிக்கை (AUDIT) பதிவுகள் முறையாக பராமரிக்கப்படுகிறதா?
  category = CHECK LIST
  frequency = MONTHLY

  description = 

QMS/FA/009/25-26
QMS/FA/009/25-2
THE PURPOSE OF THIS SOP IS TO ENSURE ACCURATE COLLECTION, ANALYSIS, VALIDATION, AND TIMELY PREPARATION OF MRM PPT SLIDES (SLIDE 1 TO SLIDE 34) USING ERP, TALLY AND DEPARTMENTAL INPUTS, AND TO SUBMIT THE PPT WITH MANAGEMENT APPROVAL WITHIN THE DEFINED TIMELINE. & SENT ON THE 2ND WORKING DAY OF EVERY MONTH, ENABLING TIMELY DECISION-MAKING AND PERFORMANCE MONITORING.

SCOPE

THIS SOP APPLIES TO:
•	MONTHLY MANAGEMENT REVIEW MEETING (MRM) PPT
•	SLIDES COVERING:
O	BUDGET VS ACTUAL
O	SALES, SEGMENT, DTR, INVENTORY, DEBTORS, CREDITORS
O	RECONCILIATION, GST, BREAK-EVEN, MOM, AUDIT & WEAKNESS
•	FINANCE, ACCOUNTS, SALES, PURCHASE, QMS, AND ERP USERS
RESPONSIBILITY
COLLECT DATA FROM ERP, TALLY
•	PREPARE SLIDES 2–34 AS PER DEFINED METHODOLOGY
•	ENSURE FORMULAS, PERIOD SELECTION, AND ACCURACY
•  ACCOUNTS MANAGER / FINANCE HEAD:
•	REVIEW CALCULATIONS, RECONCILIATION, AND INTERPRETATIONS
•	VALIDATE FIGURES WITH MIS AND ERP
•	APPROVE PPT BEFORE MANAGEMENT SUBMISSION
•  SALES / PURCHASE / QMS TEAMS:
•	PROVIDE SALES, COLLECTION, CONSUMPTION, SURVEY, AND TARGET DATA
•	SHARE REQUIRED EXCEL FILES ON TIME
MANAGEMENT:
•	REVIEW AND APPROVE THE MRM PPT
•	FIX TARGETS AND CORRECTIVE ACTIONS

நோக்கம் (PURPOSE)

இந்த SOP-யின் நோக்கம், NUTECH WIND PARTS PVT. LTD.-க்கு AIRTEL BUSINESS BILL-ஐ TIME-க்கு PAYMENT செய்ய ENSURE பண்ணுவது.
LATE PAYMENT காரணமாக SERVICE DISRUPTION, PENALTY, BUSINESS IMPACT 

பொருந்தும் வரம்பு (SCOPE)

•  ACCOUNTS TEAM
•  FINANCE DEPARTMENT
•  TELECOM BILL HANDLING செய்யும் எல்லா STAFF-க்கும்

பொறுப்பு (RESPONSIBILITY)

ACCOUNTS EXECUTIVE	BILL VERIFICATION & PAYMENT
FINANCE OFFICER	MONITORING & COMPLIANCE
FINANCE HEAD	ESCALATION HANDLING
IT/ADMIN	EMAIL & ACCESS MANAGEMENT

PDCA FORMAT – TANGLISH
P – PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)

•  27TH அன்று REGISTERED MAIL CHECK பண்ணணும்
•  BILL AMOUNT CORRECT-ஆ இருக்கா VERIFY பண்ணணும்
•  DUE DATE-க்கு முன்னாடி PAYMENT PLAN பண்ணணும்
•  PAYMENT TRACKER UPDATE பண்ணணும்
D – DO (செயல்படுத்தல்)

•  AIRTEL BUSINESS PORTAL-ல LOGIN பண்ணி PAYMENT செய்யணும்
•  ONLINE PAYMENT COMPLETE பண்ணணும்
•  RECEIPT DOWNLOAD பண்ணி SAVE பண்ணணும்
•  TRACKER-ல ENTRY UPDATE பண்ணணும்

C – CHECK (சரிபார்த்தல்)

•  PAYMENT STATUS PORTAL-ல CHECK பண்ணணும்
•  RECEIPT AMOUNT & BILL AMOUNT MATCH ஆகுதா?
•  OUTSTANDING BALANCE இருக்கா?
•  CONFIRMATION MAIL வந்துதா?
.A – ACT (திருத்தம் & மேம்பாடு)

•	ERROR இருந்தா உடனே RECTIFY பண்ணணும்
•	DELAY இருந்தா FINANCE HEAD-க்கு ESCALATE பண்ணணும்
•	REPEATED ISSUE இருந்தா SOP UPDATE பண்ணணும்
கம்பெனிக்கு ஏற்படும் பாதிப்பு (IMPACT)

•	SERVICE CUT / SUSPENSION
•	LATE FEE & PENALTY
•	BUSINESS COMMUNICATION PROBLEM
•	COMPANY REPUTATION DAMAGE
•	AUDIT ISSUE
ஒழுக்க நடவடிக்கை (DISCIPLINARY ACTION)

1ST TIME: VERBAL WARNING & RETRAINING.

2ND TIME: WRITTEN WARNING.

3RD TIME: SHOW-CAUSE NOTICE / PERFORMANCE IMPACT.

REPEATED NEGLIGENCE: COMPANY POLICY-படி DISCIPLINARY ACTION.

  checking_point = DSC- MAINTAINING SOP
  description = QUESTIONABLE CHECKLIST –DSC- MAINTAINING SOP

•  IS THE DSC VALIDITY CHECKED REGULARLY?
•  IS THE DSC USED ONLY FOR AUTHORIZED PURPOSES?
•  IS THE DSC TOKEN SECURELY STORED?
•  ARE RENEWAL REMINDERS SENT ON TIME?
•  IS THE DSC MASTER REGISTER UPDATED?
•  WAS DSC REVOKED IMMEDIATELY AFTER EMPLOYEE EXIT?
•  ANY UNAUTHORIZED OR PERSONAL USAGE DETECTED?
•  ARE AUDIT RECORDS MAINTAINED PROPERLY?

நோக்கம் (PURPOSE)

இந்த SOP-இன் நோக்கம், COMPANY-யில் பயன்படுத்தப்படும் DIGITAL SIGNATURE CERTIFICATE (DSC)-ஐ சரியான முறையில் MAINTAIN பண்ணி, STATUTORY COMPLIANCE, DATA SECURITY, AND AUTHORIZED USAGE ENSURE பண்ணுவது.

பொருந்தும் வரம்பு (SCOPE)

இந்த SOP APPLY ஆகும்:
•	DSC USE பண்ணும் 
•	ACCOUNTS & FINANCE, HR, AND COMPLIANCE AND SALES
•	COMPANY NAME-ல ISSUE செய்யப்பட்ட எல்லா DSC-களுக்கும்



பொறுப்பு (RESPONSIBILITY)

•  DSC USER:
•	DSC TOKEN-ஐ பாதுகாப்பாக வைத்திருக்கணும்
•	EXPIRY DATE-க்கு முன்னாடி RENEWAL ARRANGE பண்ணணும் F&A
•	PERSONAL USE STRICTLY AVOID பண்ணணும்
•  DEPARTMENT HEAD:
•	TEAM-ல DSC USAGE CHECK பண்ணணும்
•	RENEWAL REQUEST TIMELY-ஆ INITIATE பண்ணணும்
•  IT / COMPLIANCE TEAM:
•	DSC MASTER REGISTER MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்
•	VALIDITY & AUDIT REGULAR-ஆ CONDUCT பண்ணணும்
•  MANAGEMENT:
•	SOP FOLLOW ஆகலனா DISCIPLINARY ACTION INITIATE பண்ணணும்

PDCA FORMAT – TANGLISH
P – PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)

•  யாருக்கு DSC தேவைன்னு IDENTIFY பண்ணுதல்
•  AUTHORIZED PURPOSE DEFINE பண்ணுதல்
•  DSC MASTER REGISTER CREATE பண்ணுதல்
•  RENEWAL REMINDER PLAN பண்ணுதல்
.

D – DO (செயல்படுத்தல்)

•  PROPER APPROVAL இல்லாமல் DSC ISSUE பண்ணக்கூடாது
•  DSC DETAILS RECORD பண்ணணும்
•  AUTHORIZED USER-கிட்ட தான் DSC இருக்கணும்
•  OFFICIAL PURPOSE மட்டும் USE பண்ணணும்





C – CHECK (சரிபார்த்தல்)

•  MONTHLY-ஆ DSC VALIDITY CHECK பண்ணணும்
•  UNAUTHORIZED USAGE இருக்கானு VERIFY பண்ணணும்
•  TOKEN SECURITY REVIEW பண்ணணும்

A – ACT (திருத்தம் & மேம்பாடு)

•	EXPIRY-க்கு முன்னாடியே DSC RENEW பண்ணணும்
•	EMPLOYEE EXIT ஆனா DSC IMMEDIATELY REVOKE பண்ணணும்
•	DEVIATIONS இருந்தா CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுக்கணும்
.


ஒழுக்க நடவடிக்கை (DISCIPLINARY ACTION)

1ST TIME: VERBAL WARNING & RETRAINING.

2ND TIME: WRITTEN WARNING.

3RD TIME: SHOW-CAUSE NOTICE / PERFORMANCE IMPACT.

REPEATED NEGLIGENCE: COMPANY POLICY-படி DISCIPLINARY ACTION.

  description = QUESTIONABLE CHECKLIST –VP DRIVER ALLOWANCE PROCESSING SOP
•  DID HRA SEND VP DRIVER ALLOWANCE DETAILS ON THE 7TH?
•  WERE THE SUBMITTED DETAILS COMPLETE AND ACCURATE?
•  DID ACCOUNTS VERIFY THE ALLOWANCE DETAILS?
•  WAS PAYMENT PROCESSED ON THE 7TH?
•  WERE ANY DISCREPANCIES IDENTIFIED?
•  WERE DISCREPANCIES COMMUNICATED AND CORRECTED?
•  ARE RECORDS MAINTAINED FOR AUDIT REFERENCE?
•  WERE DELAYS OR LAPSES REVIEWED AND ADDRESSED?

SOP- VP DRIVER ALLOWANCE PROCESSING  (TANGLISH)
நோக்கம் (PURPOSE)

VP DRIVER-க்கு ALLOWANCE TIME-க்கு CORRECT-ஆ PAY பண்ண, HRA மற்றும் ACCOUNTS TEAM-க்கிடையே CLEAR PROCESS & ACCOUNTABILITY MAINTAIN பண்ணுவதற்காக இந்த SOP உருவாக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது.

பொருந்தும் வரம்பு (SCOPE)

•  HRA DEPARTMENT
•  ACCOUNTS TEAM
•  VP DRIVER ALLOWANCE PAYMENTS
•  MONTHLY PROCESSING CYCLE
 பொறுப்பு (RESPONSIBILITY)

HRA DEPARTMENT	VP DRIVER ALLOWANCE DETAILS TIME-க்கு SEND பண்ணுதல்
ACCOUNTS TEAM	DETAILS VERIFY பண்ணி PAYMENT PROCESS பண்ணுதல்
MANAGEMENT	OVERALL MONITORING (APPROVAL தேவையில்லை)

PDCA FORMAT – TANGLISH
P – PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)

•  MONTHLY ALLOWANCE SUBMISSION & PAYMENT DATE FIX பண்ணுதல்.
•  HRA & ACCOUNTS RESPONSIBILITIES CLEARLY DEFINE பண்ணுதல்.
•  MANAGEMENT APPROVAL DEPENDENCY REMOVE பண்ணுதல்.

D – DO (செயல்படுத்தல்)

•  HRA, ALLOWANCE DETAILS-ஐ 7-ஆம் தேதி ACCOUNTS-க்கு SHARE பண்ணும்.
•  ACCOUNTS TEAM VERIFICATION பண்ணும்.
•  PAYMENT SAME DAY-ல் COMPLETE பண்ணப்படும்.

C – CHECK (சரிபார்த்தல்)

•  HRA-லிருந்து DETAILS வந்ததா CHECK பண்ணுதல்.
•  AMOUNT & RECORDS CORRECT-ஆ இருக்கா VERIFY பண்ணுதல்.
•  PAYMENT 7-ஆம் தேதி நடந்ததா CONFIRM பண்ணுதல்.

A – ACT (திருத்தம் & மேம்பாடு)
•	MISSING / WRONG DETAILS இருந்தா CORRECT பண்ணுதல்.
•	DELAY அல்லது ERROR இருந்தா CONCERNED TEAM-க்கு INFORM பண்ணுதல்.
•	PROCESS IMPROVEMENT தேவைப்பட்டா IMPLEMENT பண்ணுதல்.
 கம்பெனிக்கு ஏற்படும் பாதிப்பு (IMPACT)

•  VP DRIVER-க்கு TIMELY PAYMENT கிடைக்கும்.
•  DEPARTMENT COORDINATION IMPROVE ஆகும்.
•  FOLLOW-UPS & DELAYS குறையும்.
•  FINANCIAL RECORDS TRANSPARENT & AUDITABLE-ஆ இருக்கும்.
•  OPERATIONAL EFFICIENCY IMPROVE ஆகும்.

ஒழுக்க நடவடிக்கை (DISCIPLINARY ACTION)

•  முதல் முறை: VERBAL INTIMATION & CORRECTION GUIDANCE.
•  இரண்டாம் முறை: WRITTEN EXPLANATION கேட்கப்படும்.
•  மீண்டும் மீண்டும்: MANAGEMENT-க்கு ESCALATION & DISCIPLINARY ACTION.
•  INCOMPLETE / WRONG DATA: RECTIFICATION வரைக்கும் PAYMENT HOLD.

  checking_point = MANPOWER CONTRACT – EXECUTIVES BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS - SOP
  description = MONITORING POINTS)-MANPOWER CONTRACT – EXECUTIVES BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS - SOP
•	WAS THE MANPOWER BILL COLLECTED ON THE 25TH?
•	ARE SALARY DETAILS MATCHING ATTENDANCE AND CONTRACT?
•	ARE PF & ESI CHALLANS AND FILING PROOFS ATTACHED?
•	IS THE SERVICE PO CREATED AND VALID?
•	WERE MISMATCHES DISCUSSED AND RESOLVED BEFORE BOOKING?
•	WAS THE BILL BOOKED ONLY AFTER FULL VERIFICATION?
•	WAS PAYMENT MADE ON OR BEFORE THE 7TH WITH SALARY?
•	ANY MANAGEMENT APPROVAL TAKEN UNNECESSARILY?
•	ANY DEVIATION DOCUMENTED AND JUSTIFIED?
•	IS MONTHLY COMPLIANCE REVIEW MAINTAINED?
________________________________________
________________________________________
SOP – TANG LISH VERSION
MANPOWER CONTRACT – EXECUTIVES
BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS
(TAMIL + ENGLISH MIXED, TAMIL WORDS IN தமிழ் FONT)
________________________________________
1. PURPOSE (நோக்கம்)
இந்த SOP-ன் நோக்கம், MANPOWER CONTRACT EXECUTIVES-க்கு சம்பந்தமான BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS-ஐ SYSTEMATIC, TIMELY, AND COMPLIANT ஆ FOLLOW பண்ணுவது.
இதனால் SALARY ACCURACY, PF & ESI COMPLIANCE, மற்றும் SALARY-கூட PAYMENT ON-TIME ENSURE ஆகும்.
________________________________________
2. SCOPE (வரம்பு)
இந்த SOP APPLY ஆகும்:
•	HRA TEAM
•	ACCOUNTS TEAM
•	CONTRACT EXECUTIVES
•	MANPOWER CONTRACTORS
இதுல COVER ஆகுறது:
•	MONTHLY MANPOWER EXECUTIVE BILLS
•	SALARY VERIFICATION
•	PF & ESI COMPLIANCE CHECK
•	SERVICE PO CREATION
•	BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT
________________________________________
3. RESPONSIBILITIES (பொறுப்புகள்)
HRA TEAM
•	MANPOWER BILL-ஐ 25-ம் தேதியில் COLLECT பண்ணணும்
•	SALARY DETAILS CONTRACT & ATTENDANCE-க்கு MATCH ஆக VERIFY பண்ணணும்
•	PF & ESI FILING EVIDENCE CHECK பண்ணணும்
•	SERVICE PO CREATE பண்ணணும்
•	VERIFIED BILL-ஐ ACCOUNTS-க்கு SUBMIT பண்ணணும்
•	MISMATCH இருந்தா CONTRACTOR-கூட DISCUSS பண்ணி RESOLVE பண்ணணும்
CONTRACTOR
•	CORRECT SALARY BREAKUP-உடன் BILL SUBMIT பண்ணணும்
•	PF & ESI CHALLANS & FILING PROOF PROVIDE பண்ணணும்
•	ISSUE இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY RESOLVE பண்ணணும்
ACCOUNTS TEAM
•	VERIFIED BILL-ஐ ACCOUNTING SYSTEM-ல BOOK பண்ணணும்
•	SALARY-கூட 7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT RELEASE பண்ணணும்
•	RECORDS & AUDIT TRAIL MAINTAIN பண்ணணும்
MANAGEMENT
•	இந்த PAYMENT-க்கு MANAGEMENT APPROVAL தேவையில்லை
________________________________________
4. SOP – PDCA FORMAT
PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)
•	TIMELINE SET பண்ணணும் (25TH – BILL COLLECT, 7TH – PAYMENT)
•	PF & ESI VERIFICATION CHECKLIST PREPARE பண்ணணும்
•	SOP-ஐ HRA, ACCOUNTS, CONTRACTOR-க்கு COMMUNICATE பண்ணணும்
DO (நடைமுறை)
•	HRA BILL COLLECT பண்ணுவார்
•	SALARY, PF, ESI VERIFY பண்ணுவார்
•	SERVICE PO CREATE பண்ணுவார்
•	ACCOUNTS-க்கு BILL SUBMIT பண்ணப்படும்
•	ACCOUNTS BILL BOOK பண்ணி PAYMENT PROCESS பண்ணும்
CHECK (சரிபார்ப்பு)
•	SALARY & ATTENDANCE MATCH ஆகுதா?
•	PF & ESI CHALLAN ATTACH பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	DELAY / MISMATCH இருக்கா?
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT ஆனதா?
ACT (திருத்த நடவடிக்கை)
•	MISMATCH இருந்தா CONTRACTOR-கூட RESOLVE பண்ணணும்
•	ERROR இருந்தா IMMEDIATELY CORRECT பண்ணணும்
•	REPEATED ISSUE இருந்தா CONTROL STRONG பண்ணணும்
•	STATUTORY CHANGE இருந்தா SOP UPDATE பண்ணணும்
________________________________________
5. IMPACT TO THE COMPANY (நிறுவனத்துக்கு தாக்கம்)
•	CONTRACT EXECUTIVES-க்கு SALARY ON-TIME கிடைக்கும்
•	PF & ESI COMPLIANCE STRONG ஆகும்
•	PENALTY & LEGAL RISK AVOID ஆகும்
•	CONTRACTOR RELATIONSHIP IMPROVE ஆகும்
•	AUDIT & PAYROLL GOVERNANCE STRONG ஆகும்
________________________________________
6. DISCIPLINARY ACTION (SOP FOLLOW பண்ணலனா)
VIOLATION	நடவடிக்கை
HRA DELAY-ஆ BILL COLLECT பண்ணினா	WRITTEN WARNING
PF / ESI VERIFY பண்ணாதது	WARNING & RETRAINING
MISMATCH தெரிந்தும் BILL BOOK பண்ணியது	EXPLANATION MEMO
ACCOUNTS DELAY-ஆ PAYMENT பண்ணினா	PERFORMANCE IMPACT
REPEATED SOP VIOLATION	INCREMENT HOLD / ROLE RESTRICTION
INTENTIONAL NEGLIGENCE / MANIPULATION	DISCIPLINARY ACTION / TERMINATION
________________________________________



7. QUESTIONABLE CHECKLIST (MONITORING POINTS)
•	BILL 25-ம் தேதியில் COLLECT பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	SALARY ATTENDANCE & CONTRACT-க்கு MATCH ஆகுதா?
•	PF & ESI CHALLANS ATTACH பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	SERVICE PO VALID-ஆ CREATE பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	MISMATCH CONTRACTOR-கூட RESOLVE பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	VERIFICATION கப்புறம் தான் BILL BOOK பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் SALARY-கூட PAYMENT ஆனதா?
•	MANAGEMENT APPROVAL UNNECESSARILY எடுத்தார்களா?
•	DEVIATION DOCUMENT பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	MONTHLY COMPLIANCE REVIEW MAINTAIN பண்ணப்படுதா?
________________________________________

  seq_no = 1065
  checking_point = TIFFIN BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS - SOP
  description = (MONITORING POINTS)-TIFFIN BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT PROCESS - SOP
•	WAS THE TIFFIN BILL RECEIVED FROM HR ON OR BEFORE THE 3RD?
•	ARE INVOICE AND SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS ATTACHED?
•	IS THE BILL AS PER VENDOR AGREEMENT / ATTENDANCE COUNT?
•	WAS THE BILL BOOKED CORRECTLY IN ACCOUNTS?
•	WAS APPROVAL OBTAINED WITHOUT DELAY?
•	WAS PAYMENT RELEASED ON OR BEFORE THE 7TH?
•	IS ANY DELAY PROPERLY DOCUMENTED AND APPROVED?
•	ARE PENDING LUNCH BILLS ESCALATED TIMELY?
•	IS SEGREGATION OF DUTIES FOLLOWED?
•	IS MONTHLY TRACKING AND REVIEW MAINTAINED?
________________________________________
________________________________________
SOP – TANG LISH VERSION
HR-ல இருந்து TIFFIN BILL RECEIVE & PAYMENT PROCESS
(TIFFIN – BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT)
________________________________________
1. PURPOSE (நோக்கம்)
இந்த SOP-ன் நோக்கம், HR DEPARTMENT-ல இருந்து TIFFIN BILL-ஐ ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் RECEIVE பண்ணி, அந்த BILL-க்கு 7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT COMPLETE பண்ணுவது.
இதனால் EMPLOYEE LUNCH SERVICE INTERRUPTION, DELAY, DISPUTE எல்லாம் AVOID பண்ணலாம்.
________________________________________
2. SCOPE (வரம்பு)
இந்த SOP APPLY ஆகும்:
•	HR DEPARTMENT – TIFFIN BILL COLLECT & SUBMIT பண்ணுறவர்கள்
•	ACCOUNTS & FINANCE DEPARTMENT
•	MANAGEMENT / APPROVING AUTHORITY
•	MONTHLY-ஆ PAY பண்ணப்படும் LUNCH / CANTEEN / FOOD VENDOR BILLS
________________________________________
3. RESPONSIBILITIES (பொறுப்புகள்)
HR DEPARTMENT
•	VENDOR-ல இருந்து TIFFIN BILL & DOCUMENTS COLLECT பண்ணணும்
•	BILL-ஐ 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் ACCOUNTS-க்கு SUBMIT பண்ணணும்
•	BILL DETAILS CORRECT-ஆ இருக்க ENSURE பண்ணணும்
ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT
•	HR-ல இருந்து வந்த BILL-ஐ VERIFY பண்ணணும்
•	ACCOUNTING SYSTEM-ல CORRECT-ஆ BOOK பண்ணணும்
•	FINANCE TEAM-கூட COORDINATE பண்ணணும்
FINANCE DEPARTMENT
•	FUND AVAILABILITY CHECK பண்ணணும்
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT RELEASE பண்ணணும்
•	ACCOUNTING COMPLIANCE ENSURE பண்ணணும்
APPROVING AUTHORITY
•	BILL-ஐ TIMELY-ஆ REVIEW & APPROVE பண்ணணும்
•	SOP TIMELINE FOLLOW ஆகுறதா ENSURE பண்ணணும்
________________________________________
4. SOP – PDCA FORMAT
PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)
•	MONTHLY TIMELINE SET பண்ணணும் (3RD – BILL RECEIVE, 7TH – PAYMENT)
•	APPROVAL PROCESS DEFINE பண்ணணும்
•	HR, ACCOUNTS, FINANCE-க்கு TIMELINES COMMUNICATE பண்ணணும்
DO (நடைமுறை)
•	HR TIFFIN BILL-ஐ 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் SUBMIT பண்ணுவார்
•	ACCOUNTS BILL VERIFY & BOOK பண்ணுவார்
•	FINANCE APPROVAL கப்புறம் PAYMENT PROCESS பண்ணும்
•	VENDOR-க்கு 7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT COMPLETE ஆகும்
CHECK (சரிபார்ப்பு)
•	BILL RECEIVE DATE & PAYMENT DATE CHECK
•	VENDOR AGREEMENT / ATTENDANCE-க்கு MATCH ஆக BILL VERIFY
•	DELAY / PENDING BILLS MONITOR
•	MONTHLY INTERNAL REVIEW CONDUCT
ACT (திருத்த நடவடிக்கை)
•	DELAY இருந்தா உடனே CORRECTIVE ACTION எடுக்கணும்
•	HR–ACCOUNTS–FINANCE COORDINATION IMPROVE பண்ணணும்
•	REPEATED ISSUE இருந்தா SOP UPDATE பண்ணணும்
•	CONCERNED STAFF-க்கு TRAINING / GUIDANCE கொடுக்கணும்
________________________________________
5. IMPACT TO THE COMPANY (நிறுவனத்துக்கு தாக்கம்)
TIFFIN VENDOR-க்கு TIMELY PAYMENT போகும்
•	EMPLOYEE LUNCH FACILITY DISRUPTION AVOID ஆகும்
•	EMPLOYEE SATISFACTION & WELFARE IMPROVE ஆகும்
•	COST CONTROL & FINANCIAL DISCIPLINE MAINTAIN ஆகும்
•	AUDIT & INTERNAL CONTROL STRONG ஆகும்
________________________________________
6. DISCIPLINARY ACTION (SOP FOLLOW பண்ணலனா)
VIOLATION	நடவடிக்கை
HR DELAY-ஆ BILL SUBMIT பண்ணினா	WRITTEN WARNING
INCOMPLETE / WRONG LUNCH BILL	BILL REJECT & RESUBMISSION
ACCOUNTS / FINANCE DELAY	WARNING & EXPLANATION MEMO
REPEATED DELAY	INCREMENT HOLD / PERFORMANCE IMPACT
INTENTIONAL NEGLIGENCE / MISUSE	DISCIPLINARY ACTION / TERMINATION
________________________________________
7. QUESTIONABLE CHECKLIST (MONITORING POINTS)
•	HR-ல இருந்து TIFFIN BILL 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் வந்ததா?
•	SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	VENDOR AGREEMENT / ATTENDANCE-க்கு MATCH ஆக BILL இருக்கா?
•	ACCOUNTS-ல CORRECT-ஆ BOOK பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	APPROVAL DELAY இல்லாம கிடைத்ததா?
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT RELEASE ஆனதா?
•	DELAY REASON DOCUMENT பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	PENDING BILLS ESCALATE பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	SEGREGATION OF DUTIES FOLLOW பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	MONTHLY TRACKING & REVIEW MAINTAIN பண்ணப்படுதா?
________________________________________

  checking_point = ALEX BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT - SOP
  description = (MONITORING POINTS)-ALEX BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT - SOP
•	WAS THE ADVOCATE BILL RECEIVED FROM HR ON OR BEFORE THE 3RD?
•	ARE SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS AND APPROVALS ATTACHED?
•	IS THE BILL AS PER ADVOCATE AGREEMENT OR ENGAGEMENT LETTER?
•	WAS THE BILL BOOKED CORRECTLY IN ACCOUNTS?
•	WAS APPROVAL OBTAINED WITHOUT DELAY?
•	WAS PAYMENT RELEASED ON OR BEFORE THE 7TH?
•	ANY REASON FOR DELAY DOCUMENTED AND APPROVED?
•	ARE PENDING OR OVERDUE BILLS ESCALATED?
•	IS SEGREGATION OF DUTIES FOLLOWED?
•	IS THE PROCESS REVIEWED MONTHLY?
________________________________________
________________________________________
SOP – TANG LISH VERSION
HR-ல இருந்து ADVOCATE FEES BILL RECEIVE & PAYMENT PROCESS
(BILL BOOKING & PAYMENT)
________________________________________
1. PURPOSE (நோக்கம்)
இந்த SOP-ன் நோக்கம், HR DEPARTMENT-ல இருந்து ADVOCATE FEES BILL-ஐ ஒவ்வொரு மாதமும் 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் RECEIVE பண்ணி, அந்த BILL-க்கு 7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT COMPLETE பண்ணுவது.
இதனால் DELAY, DISPUTE, LEGAL ISSUE எல்லாம் AVOID பண்ண முடியும்.
________________________________________
2. SCOPE (வரம்பு)
இந்த SOP APPLY ஆகும்:
•	HR DEPARTMENT – ADVOCATE BILL COLLECT & SUBMIT பண்ணுறவர்கள்
•	ACCOUNTS & FINANCE DEPARTMENT
•	MANAGEMENT / APPROVING AUTHORITY
•	MONTHLY-ஆ PAY பண்ணப்படும் அனைத்து ADVOCATE / LEGAL FEES BILLS
________________________________________
3. RESPONSIBILITIES (பொறுப்புகள்)
HR DEPARTMENT
•	ADVOCATE FEES BILL & DOCUMENTS COLLECT பண்ணணும்
•	BILL-ஐ 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் ACCOUNTS-க்கு SUBMIT பண்ணணும்
•	BILL DETAILS CORRECT-ஆ இருக்க ENSURE பண்ணணும்
ACCOUNTS DEPARTMENT
•	HR-ல இருந்து வந்த BILL-ஐ VERIFY பண்ணணும்
•	ACCOUNTING SYSTEM-ல CORRECT-ஆ BOOK பண்ணணும்
•	FINANCE TEAM-கூட COORDINATE பண்ணணும்
FINANCE DEPARTMENT
•	FUND AVAILABILITY & COMPLIANCE CHECK பண்ணணும்
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT RELEASE பண்ணணும்
•	ACCOUNTING & STATUTORY COMPLIANCE ENSURE பண்ணணும்
APPROVING AUTHORITY
•	BILL-ஐ TIMELY-ஆ REVIEW & APPROVE பண்ணணும்
•	SOP TIMELINE FOLLOW ஆகுறதா ENSURE பண்ணணும்
________________________________________
4. SOP – PDCA FORMAT
PLAN (திட்டமிடல்)
•	MONTHLY TIMELINE SET பண்ணணும் (3RD – BILL RECEIPT, 7TH – PAYMENT)
•	APPROVAL PROCESS & RESPONSIBILITY DEFINE பண்ணணும்
•	HR, ACCOUNTS, FINANCE-க்கு TIMELINES COMMUNICATE பண்ணணும்
DO (நடைமுறை)
•	HR BILL-ஐ 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் SUBMIT பண்ணுவார்

•	ADVOCATE-க்கு 7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT COMPLETE ஆகும்
CHECK (சரிபார்ப்பு)
•	BILL RECEIVE DATE & PAYMENT DATE CHECK
•	AGREEMENT-க்கு MATCH ஆக BILL இருக்கா VERIFY
•	DELAY / PENDING BILLS MONITOR
•	MONTHLY INTERNAL REVIEW CONDUCT
ACT (திருத்த நடவடிக்கை)
•	DELAY இருந்தா உடனே ACTION எடுக்கணும்
•	HR–ACCOUNTS–FINANCE COORDINATION IMPROVE பண்ணணும்
•	REPEATED ISSUE இருந்தா SOP UPDATE பண்ணணும்
•	CONCERNED STAFF-க்கு TRAINING / CLARIFICATION கொடுக்கணும்
________________________________________

•	ADVOCATE-க்கு TIMELY PAYMENT போகும்
•	LEGAL SERVICE DISRUPTION AVOID ஆகும்
•	CASH FLOW & FINANCIAL DISCIPLINE IMPROVE ஆகும்
•	AUDIT & COMPLIANCE STRONG ஆகும்
•	COMPANY PROFESSIONAL IMAGE BETTER ஆகும்
________________________________________

VIOLATION	நடவடிக்கை

INCOMPLETE / WRONG BILL SUBMISSION	BILL REJECT & RESUBMISSION
ACCOUNTS / FINANCE DELAY	WARNING & EXPLANATION MEMO

________________________________________

•	HR-ல இருந்து BILL 3-ம் தேதிக்குள் வந்ததா?
•	SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS ATTACH பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	ADVOCATE AGREEMENT-க்கு MATCH ஆக BILL இருக்கா?
•	ACCOUNTS-ல CORRECT-ஆ BOOK பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	APPROVAL DELAY இல்லாம கிடைத்ததா?
•	7-ம் தேதிக்குள் PAYMENT RELEASE ஆனதா?
•	DELAY REASON DOCUMENT பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	PENDING BILLS ESCALATE பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	SEGREGATION OF DUTIES FOLLOW பண்ணப்பட்டதா?
•	MONTHLY REVIEW & TRACKING MAINTAIN பண்ணப்படுதா?
